papers.title: Deep Wave Network for Modeling Multi-Scale Physical Dynamics
papers.abstract: Performance of deep learning models is strongly governed by architectural capacity, with width and depth as primary controls. However, in physical-science applications, models are often compared at a single fixed size or by separating accuracy and computational cost, which can be misleading since architectures exhibit different accuracy-cost scaling as width and depth vary. This issue is particularly relevant for U-Net-type encoder-decoder models, widely used for multi-scale gas, fluid, and plasma dynamics due to their ability to represent features across spatial scales. A U-Net constructs a multi-resolution representation via an encoder that progressively reduces spatial resolution, followed by a decoder that restores it for prediction. Skip connections link corresponding encoder and decoder features, preserving fine-scale information and improving optimization. In practice, U-Net width is routinely tuned, while depth is typically kept fixed (a set number of down/up-sampling stages with few convolutions per stage), limiting systematic exploration of depth for improving the accuracy-cost trade-off. We address this limitation by increasing effective depth through stacking multiple encoder-decoder "waves" in series, with skip connections both within and across waves to enable progressive cross-scale refinement. We call this architecture a Deep Wave Network (DW-Net). Training data, optimization, and schedules are kept identical across models. Instead of evaluating single configurations, we train multiple width variants of each architecture and compare accuracy vs. GPU time Pareto fronts. Across several 2D and 3D flow benchmarks, DW-Net models consistently improve the Pareto frontier over single-wave U-Nets, achieving higher accuracy at matched cost or similar accuracy at reduced cost, and reaching low-error regimes with up to 3x less training time under identical training settings.

analysis.tldr: 提出Deep Wave Network (DW-Net)，通过堆叠多个编码器-解码器“波”并引入跨波跳跃连接，在物理动力学建模中实现精度-成本帕累托前沿的持续改进。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有U-Net架构在物理科学应用中通常固定深度，仅调整宽度，限制了精度-成本权衡的系统性探索；不同架构在宽度和深度变化时表现出不同的精度-成本缩放，单点比较可能产生误导。
analysis.problem: 如何通过增加有效深度来改进U-Net型编码器-解码器模型在多尺度物理动力学建模中的精度-成本权衡。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: U-Net的深度通常固定（少量下/上采样阶段，每阶段少量卷积），限制了精度提升；通过堆叠多个编码器-解码器“波”并引入跨波跳跃连接，可实现渐进式跨尺度细化。
analysis.method: Deep Wave Network (DW-Net)：将多个编码器-解码器“波”串联堆叠，每个波内部有跳跃连接，波之间也有跨波跳跃连接，以增加有效深度并实现渐进式跨尺度细化。
contributions: 提出DW-Net架构，通过堆叠多个编码器-解码器波并引入跨波跳跃连接，有效增加深度以改进多尺度物理动力学建模。
在多个2D和3D流动基准上，通过比较精度-成本帕累托前沿，证明DW-Net持续优于单波U-Net，在相同成本下达到更高精度或相同精度下减少训练时间（最高3倍）。
analysis.experiments: 在多个2D和3D流动基准上，训练每个架构的多个宽度变体，比较精度与GPU时间的帕累托前沿。摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 可能仅适用于具有多尺度特征的物理动力学问题，通用性有待验证。
堆叠多个波可能增加模型复杂度和内存占用，未讨论对推理延迟的影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to physical sciences (physics, chemistry, biology, etc.)
analysis.reason: 方法创新性较高（堆叠波结构），但实验信息有限且应用领域较专，推荐阅读摘要。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Deep Wave Network (DW-Net)，通过堆叠多个编码器-解码器“波”并引入跨波跳跃连接，在物理动力学建模中实现精度-成本帕累托前沿的持续改进。

papers.title: ANDRE: An Attention-based Neuro-symbolic Differentiable Rule Extractor
papers.abstract: Inductive Logic Programming (ILP) aims to learn interpretable first-order rules from data, but existing symbolic and neuro-symbolic approaches struggle to scale to noisy and probabilistic settings. Classical ILP relies on discrete combinatorial rule search and is brittle under uncertainty, while differentiable ILP methods typically depend on predefined rule templates or inaccurate fuzzy operators that suffer from vanishing gradients or poor approximation of logical structure when reasoning over probabilistic predicate valuations. This paper proposes an Attention-based Neuro-symbolic Differentiable Rule Extractor (ANDRE), a novel ILP framework that learns first-order logic programs by optimizing over a continuous rule space with attention-based logical operators. ANDRE replaces both rule templates and logical operators with fully differentiable, attention-driven conjunction and disjunction operators that approximate logical min-max semantics, enabling accurate, stable, and interpretable reasoning over probabilistic data. By softly selecting, negating, or excluding predicates within each rule, ANDRE supports flexible rule induction while preserving symbolic structure. Extensive experiments on classical ILP benchmarks, large-scale knowledge bases, and synthetic datasets with probabilistic predicates and noisy supervision demonstrate that ANDRE achieves competitive or superior predictive performance while reliably recovering correct symbolic rules under uncertainty. In particular, ANDRE remains robust to moderate label noise, substantially outperforming existing differentiable ILP methods in both rule extraction quality and stability.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于注意力的可微规则提取器ANDRE，通过注意力驱动的逻辑算子实现概率数据下的可解释一阶规则学习。
analysis.research_motivation: 归纳逻辑编程（ILP）旨在从数据中学习可解释的一阶规则，但现有符号和神经符号方法难以扩展到含噪声和概率设定：经典ILP依赖离散组合搜索，对不确定性脆弱；可微ILP方法通常依赖预定义规则模板或不精确的模糊算子，存在梯度消失或逻辑结构近似差的问题。
analysis.problem: 如何在概率数据和噪声监督下，实现可扩展、稳定且可解释的一阶逻辑规则学习。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出基于注意力的神经符号可微规则提取器（ANDRE），用注意力驱动的合取和析取算子替代规则模板和逻辑算子，近似逻辑min-max语义，支持软选择、否定或排除谓词，实现完全可微的连续规则空间优化。
contributions: 提出ANDRE框架，用注意力机制实现可微逻辑算子，避免预定义模板和模糊算子缺陷。
在经典ILP基准、大规模知识库和含噪声概率数据集上，ANDRE在规则提取质量和稳定性上显著优于现有可微ILP方法。
analysis.experiments: 在经典ILP基准、大规模知识库以及含概率谓词和噪声监督的合成数据集上进行实验，ANDRE在预测性能和规则恢复上具有竞争力或优越性，对中等标签噪声鲁棒。
limitations: 可能对极复杂规则或极高维谓词空间扩展性有限。
注意力机制可能引入额外计算开销。

papers.title: MedFabric and EtHER: A Data-Centric Framework for Word-Level Fabrication Generation and Detection in Medical LLMs
papers.abstract: Large Language Models exhibit strong reasoning and semantic understanding capabilities but often hallucinate in domains that require expert knowledge, among which fabrications, the generation of factually incorrect yet fluent statements, pose the greatest risk in medical contexts. Existing medical hallucination datasets inadequately capture fabrication phenomena due to limited fabrication coverage, stylistic disparities between human and LLM-authored texts, and distributional drift during hallucinated sample synthesis. To address this, we propose a data-centric pipeline to generate realistic and word-level fabrications that preserve syntactic and stylistic fidelity while introducing subtle factual deviations, resulting in MedFabric. Building upon this dataset, we introduce ETHER, a modular word-level fabrication detector integrating Text2Table Decomposition, Word Masking and Filling and Hybrid Sentence Pair Evaluation to enhance factual alignment. Empirical results demonstrate that MedFabric outperforms state-of-the-art detectors by over 15% on word-level fabrication benchmarks while maintaining consistent performance across structural similarities, offering a comprehensive framework for reliable and domain-specific factuality detection.

analysis.tldr: 提出数据为中心的医疗LLM幻觉检测框架，包含真实感词级虚构数据集MedFabric和检测器ETHER，在词级虚构基准上超越SOTA超15%。
analysis.research_motivation: 医疗LLM中的虚构（factually incorrect yet fluent statements）风险极高，现有医疗幻觉数据集因虚构覆盖有限、人机文本风格差异及合成样本分布漂移而无法充分捕捉虚构现象。
analysis.problem: 如何生成保留句法和风格保真度但引入细微事实偏差的逼真词级虚构数据，并构建有效的词级虚构检测器以增强医疗LLM的事实对齐。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有医疗幻觉数据集存在虚构覆盖有限、人机文本风格差异、合成样本分布漂移等问题，导致无法充分捕捉虚构现象。
analysis.method: 提出数据为中心的流水线：MedFabric数据集通过保留句法和风格保真度同时引入细微事实偏差生成逼真词级虚构；ETHER检测器采用Text2Table分解、词掩码填充和混合句对评估的模块化设计。
contributions: 提出MedFabric数据集，通过数据为中心流水线生成保留风格保真度的词级虚构样本。
提出ETHER检测器，结合Text2Table分解、词掩码填充和混合句对评估实现词级虚构检测。
在词级虚构基准上超越SOTA超15%，且在不同结构相似性下保持稳定性能。
analysis.experiments: 在词级虚构基准上评估，MedFabric驱动的ETHER检测器相比SOTA提升超15%，且在不同结构相似性下性能一致。
limitations: 可能仅针对医疗领域，泛化性未验证。
词级虚构检测的细粒度可能带来更高计算开销。

papers.title: Actionable Real-Time Modeling of Surgical Team Dynamics via Time-Expanded Interaction Graphs
papers.abstract: Surgical team performance arises from complex interactions between technical execution and non-technical skills, including communication and coordination dynamics. However, current surgical AI systems predominantly model visual workflow signals, lacking structured representations of intraoperative team interactions over time. We propose a real-time actionable approach for modeling surgical team dynamics using time-expanded interaction graphs, where team members are modeled as time-indexed nodes and communication exchanges define directed edges. This spatio-temporal expansion enables dynamic interaction modeling, while allowing efficient inference with a static graph neural network. The model predicts procedural efficiency as the deviation from the expected duration and supports real-time deployment. Beyond prediction, we perform a counterfactual analysis to identify minimal changes in communication structure and interpretable behavioral variables associated with improved predicted outcomes. Experiments on recorded surgical procedures show that structured modeling of team interactions improves early identification of prolonged interventions and provides coherent, actionable explanations. This work advances surgical AI toward real-time, team-aware, and actionable decision support in the operating room.

papers.title: Audio-Visual Intelligence in Large Foundation Models
papers.abstract: Audio-Visual Intelligence (AVI) has emerged as a central frontier in artificial intelligence, bridging auditory and visual modalities to enable machines that can perceive, generate, and interact in the multimodal real world. In the era of large foundation models, joint modeling of audio and vision has become increasingly crucial, i.e., not only for understanding but also for controllable generation and reasoning across dynamic, temporally grounded signals. Recent advances, such as Meta MovieGen and Google Veo-3, highlight the growing industrial and academic focus on unified audio-vision architectures that learn from massive multimodal data. However, despite rapid progress, the literature remains fragmented, spanning diverse tasks, inconsistent taxonomies, and heterogeneous evaluation practices that impede systematic comparison and knowledge integration. This survey provides the first comprehensive review of AVI through the lens of large foundation models. We establish a unified taxonomy covering the broad landscape of AVI tasks, ranging from understanding (e.g., speech recognition, sound localization) to generation (e.g., audio-driven video synthesis, video-to-audio) and interaction (e.g., dialogue, embodied, or agentic interfaces). We synthesize methodological foundations, including modality tokenization, cross-modal fusion, autoregressive and diffusion-based generation, large-scale pretraining, instruction alignment, and preference optimization. Furthermore, we curate representative datasets, benchmarks, and evaluation metrics, offering a structured comparison across task families and identifying open challenges in synchronization, spatial reasoning, controllability, and safety. By consolidating this rapidly expanding field into a coherent framework, this survey aims to serve as a foundational reference for future research on large-scale AVI.

papers.title: UniCorrn: Unified Correspondence Transformer Across 2D and 3D
papers.abstract: Visual correspondence across image-to-image (2D-2D), image-to-point cloud (2D-3D), and point cloud-to-point cloud (3D-3D) geometric matching forms the foundation for numerous 3D vision tasks. Despite sharing a similar problem structure, current methods use task-specific designs with separate models for each modality combination. We present UniCorrn, the first correspondence model with shared weights that unifies geometric matching across all three tasks. Our key insight is that Transformer attention naturally captures cross-modal feature similarity. We propose a dual-stream decoder that maintains separate appearance and positional feature streams. This design enables end-to-end learning through stack-able layers while supporting flexible query-based correspondence estimation across heterogeneous modalities. Our architecture employs modality-specific backbones followed by shared encoder and decoder components, trained jointly on diverse data combining pseudo point clouds from depth maps with real 3D correspondence annotations. UniCorrn achieves competitive performance on 2D-2D matching and surpasses prior state-of-the-art by 8% on 7Scenes (2D-3D) and 10% on 3DLoMatch (3D-3D) in registration recall. Project website: https://neu-vi.github.io/UniCorrn

analysis.tldr: UniCorrn 是首个统一 2D-2D、2D-3D 和 3D-3D 几何匹配的共享权重对应模型，通过双流解码器实现跨模态特征对齐。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前视觉对应方法针对不同模态组合（2D-2D、2D-3D、3D-3D）使用独立模型，缺乏统一框架，导致资源浪费且难以泛化。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个共享权重的模型，同时处理图像-图像、图像-点云和点云-点云之间的几何匹配任务。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 UniCorrn，采用模态特定主干网络提取特征，然后通过共享的编码器和双流解码器（分离外观和位置特征流）进行端到端学习，支持灵活的查询式对应估计。
contributions: 首个统一 2D-2D、2D-3D 和 3D-3D 几何匹配的共享权重对应模型。
提出双流解码器设计，有效融合跨模态特征。
在 7Scenes 和 3DLoMatch 上分别提升 8% 和 10% 的配准召回率。

papers.title: Frontier Lag: A Bibliometric Audit of Capability Misrepresentation in Academic AI Evaluation
papers.abstract: Readers of applied-domain LLM capability evaluations want to know what AI systems can currently do. That literature answers a related, but consequentially different, question: what older, cheaper, less-elicited models could do months or years earlier (a 2026 paper evaluating GPT-4o-mini zero-shot, say, against a frontier of reasoning-capable, tool-using systems like GPT-5.5 Pro and Claude Opus 4.7), often reported with sparse configuration details and abstracted upward into claims about "AI" that propagate through citations, media, and policy. We measure the 'publication elicitation gap' (the gap between these answers) in a pre-registered audit of 112,303 LLM-keyword-matched candidate records (2022-01 to 2026-04; 18,574 admissible, 4,766 full-paper texts retrievable), comparing tested models to the contemporaneous frontier on the Epoch AI Capabilities Index (ECI), reproduced under Arena Elo and Artificial Analysis. The median paper evaluates a model +10.85 ECI (~1.4x the distance between Claude Sonnet 3.7 and Claude Opus 4.5) behind the contemporaneous frontier at evaluation time (H1); an exploratory rational-lag baseline (H8) decomposes this into ~25% peer-review latency, ~75% excess lag. The gap is widening at +5.53 ECI/year (H2; 95% CI [+5.03, +5.83]). Meanwhile, only 3.2% of abstracts (21.2% of full-texts) disclose reasoning-mode status on reasoning-capable models (H4) and 52.5% (95% CI [48.2, 56.9]) state conclusions at the level of "AI" rather than the evaluated model(s), rising at OR = 1.23/year. Proposed remedies include API-access subsidies and editorial enforcement of reporting frameworks mandating configuration-surface disclosure (model snapshot, reasoning mode/effort, tool access, scaffolding, prompting, etc.); VERSIO-AI is a 13-item checklist (Core 3 desk-reject) extending existing frameworks at the elicitation surface, with per-DOI analysis at frontierlag.org.

analysis.tldr: 对112,303篇LLM评估论文的审计发现，被评估模型平均落后同期前沿模型10.85 ECI，且差距以每年5.53 ECI扩大，同时多数论文未披露推理模式等关键配置，导致能力误传。
analysis.research_motivation: 应用领域LLM能力评估的读者希望了解AI系统当前的能力，但现有文献回答的是不同问题：评估的是更旧、更便宜、更少提示的模型数月或数年前的能力，且常以稀疏配置细节报告并抽象为关于“AI”的声明，通过引用、媒体和政策传播，造成能力误传。
analysis.problem: 量化并分析学术AI评估中模型能力误传的“出版提示差距”，即评估模型与同期前沿模型之间的能力差距，以及配置披露不足的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要通过审计发现：中位数论文评估的模型落后同期前沿10.85 ECI（约1.4倍Claude Sonnet 3.7与Claude Opus 4.5的差距）；差距以每年5.53 ECI扩大；仅3.2%的摘要和21.2%的全文披露推理能力模型的推理模式状态；52.5%的结论将结果抽象为“AI”而非具体模型。
analysis.method: 对112,303篇LLM关键词匹配的候选记录（2022-01至2026-04）进行预注册审计，其中18,574篇合格，4,766篇可获取全文。将测试模型与Epoch AI能力指数（ECI）上的同期前沿进行比较，并在Arena Elo和Artificial Analysis上复现。
contributions: 首次大规模量化了LLM评估中的“出版提示差距”，揭示评估模型落后前沿的程度和趋势。
分析了配置披露不足的普遍性，并提出了包括API访问补贴和编辑执行报告框架在内的补救措施。
提出了VERSIO-AI，一个13项检查清单（核心3项为桌面拒稿），扩展现有框架以覆盖提示表面。
analysis.experiments: 摘要提供了详细的审计结果：中位数差距10.85 ECI，差距扩大速率5.53 ECI/年，配置披露比例等，但未提及具体实验设置如数据集划分或消融实验。
limitations: 审计依赖于Epoch AI能力指数（ECI）作为前沿基准，可能无法完全代表所有能力维度。
仅分析了可检索全文的论文，可能存在选择偏差。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 该研究系统性地揭示了LLM评估中的关键问题，具有高影响力和新颖性，但技术深度中等，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 对112,303篇LLM评估论文的审计发现，被评估模型平均落后同期前沿模型10.85 ECI，且差距以每年5.53 ECI扩大，同时多数论文未披露推理模式等关键配置，导致能力误传。

papers.title: Large Language Models are Universal Reasoners for Visual Generation
papers.abstract: Text-to-image generation has advanced rapidly with diffusion models, progressing from CLIP and T5 conditioning to unified systems where a single LLM backbone handles both visual understanding and generation. Despite the architectural unification, these systems frequently fail to faithfully align complex prompts during synthesis, even though they remain highly accurate at verifying whether an image satisfies those same prompts. We formalize this as the \emph{understanding-generation gap} and propose UniReasoner, a framework that leverages the LLM as a universal reasoner to convert its understanding strength into direct generation guidance. Given a prompt, the LLM first produces a coarse visual draft composed of discrete vision tokens. It then performs a self-critique by evaluating the draft for prompt consistency, producing a grounded textual evaluation that pinpoints what needs to be corrected. Finally, a diffusion model is conditioned jointly on the prompt, the visual draft, and the evaluation, ensuring that generation is guided by explicit corrective signals. Each signal addresses a limitation of the other: the draft provides a concrete, scene-level anchor that reduces under-specification in text-only conditioning, while the evaluation turns verification into grounded, actionable constraints that correct omissions, hallucinations, and relational errors. Experiments show that UniReasoner improves compositional alignment and semantic faithfulness under the same diffusion backbone while maintaining image quality, demonstrating a practical way to exploit LLM reasoning to close the understanding-generation gap.

analysis.tldr: 提出UniReasoner框架，利用LLM作为通用推理器弥合文本到图像生成中的理解-生成差距。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有文本到图像生成系统虽能准确验证图像是否满足复杂提示，但在生成时却常无法忠实对齐这些提示，存在理解与生成能力的不对称。
analysis.problem: 弥合文本到图像生成中的理解-生成差距，即利用LLM的理解优势来直接指导生成过程。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，统一架构的生成系统在验证图像是否满足提示时高度准确，但在合成时却频繁失败，这种理解与生成之间的差距是核心瓶颈。
analysis.method: UniReasoner框架：LLM首先生成离散视觉token的粗略草稿，然后通过自我批评评估草稿与提示的一致性并生成文本评估，最后扩散模型联合条件于提示、视觉草稿和评估进行生成。
contributions: 形式化定义了文本到图像生成中的理解-生成差距。
提出UniReasoner框架，利用LLM作为通用推理器，通过自我批评和联合条件生成弥合该差距。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖LLM的推理质量，若LLM自我批评不准确则效果受限。
框架复杂度较高，需要多阶段生成和评估。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.reason: 方法新颖，利用LLM推理弥合理解-生成差距，与文本到图像生成方向高度相关，但摘要未提供实验细节。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出UniReasoner框架，利用LLM作为通用推理器弥合文本到图像生成中的理解-生成差距。

papers.title: Safety and accuracy follow different scaling laws in clinical large language models
papers.abstract: Clinical LLMs are often scaled by increasing model size, context length, retrieval complexity, or inference-time compute, with the implicit expectation that higher accuracy implies safer behavior. This assumption is incomplete in medicine, where a few confident, high-risk, or evidence-contradicting errors can matter more than average benchmark performance. We introduce SaFE-Scale, a framework for measuring how clinical LLM safety changes across model scale, evidence quality, retrieval strategy, context exposure, and inference-time compute. To instantiate this framework, we introduce RadSaFE-200, a Radiology Safety-Focused Evaluation benchmark of 200 multiple-choice questions with clinician-defined clean evidence, conflict evidence, and option-level labels for high-risk error, unsafe answer, and evidence contradiction. We evaluated 34 locally deployed LLMs across six deployment conditions: closed-book prompting (zero-shot), clean evidence, conflict evidence, standard RAG, agentic RAG, and max-context prompting. Clean evidence produced the strongest improvement, increasing mean accuracy from 73.5% to 94.1%, while reducing high-risk error from 12.0% to 2.6%, contradiction from 12.7% to 2.3%, and dangerous overconfidence from 8.0% to 1.6%. Standard RAG and agentic RAG did not reproduce this safety profile: agentic RAG improved accuracy over standard RAG and reduced contradiction, but high-risk error and dangerous overconfidence remained elevated. Max-context prompting increased latency without closing the safety gap, and additional inference-time compute produced only limited gains. Worst-case analysis showed that clinically consequential errors concentrated in a small subset of questions. Clinical LLM safety is therefore not a passive consequence of scaling, but a deployment property shaped by evidence quality, retrieval design, context construction, and collective failure behavior.

analysis.tldr: 临床大语言模型的安全性和准确性遵循不同的扩展规律，安全并非扩展的被动结果。
analysis.research_motivation: 临床LLM通常通过增加模型规模、上下文长度、检索复杂度或推理时计算来扩展，隐含假设是更高准确性意味着更安全的行为。然而在医学中，少数自信、高风险或与证据矛盾的错误可能比平均基准性能更重要，现有方法忽视了安全与准确性之间的非对齐关系。
analysis.problem: 临床LLM的安全性如何随模型规模、证据质量、检索策略、上下文暴露和推理时计算变化，以及安全性与准确性是否遵循相同的扩展规律。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 干净证据能显著提升准确率并降低高风险错误、矛盾及危险过度自信；标准RAG和智能体RAG无法复现这种安全轮廓；最大上下文提示增加了延迟但未缩小安全差距；额外推理时计算收益有限；临床重要错误集中在少数问题上。
analysis.method: 提出SaFE-Scale框架，用于测量临床LLM安全性随不同扩展维度的变化，并构建RadSaFE-200基准（200道多选题，含临床医生定义的干净证据、冲突证据和选项级标签），在34个本地部署LLM上评估六种部署条件。
contributions: 提出SaFE-Scale框架，系统测量临床LLM安全性随模型规模、证据质量、检索策略、上下文暴露和推理时计算的变化。
构建RadSaFE-200基准，包含200道放射学安全聚焦多选题，带有干净证据、冲突证据和高风险错误标签。
通过34个LLM的六种部署条件实验，揭示安全性与准确性遵循不同扩展规律，安全是部署属性而非扩展的被动结果。
analysis.experiments: 在34个本地部署LLM上评估六种部署条件：闭卷提示（零样本）、干净证据、冲突证据、标准RAG、智能体RAG和最大上下文提示。干净证据将平均准确率从73.5%提升至94.1%，高风险错误从12.0%降至2.6%，矛盾从12.7%降至2.3%，危险过度自信从8.0%降至1.6%。标准RAG和智能体RAG未复现此安全轮廓。
limitations: 基准仅覆盖放射学领域，可能不直接推广到其他医学专科。
仅评估了多选题形式，未涉及开放式生成或真实临床工作流。
未深入分析模型规模与安全性的具体关系曲线。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 论文揭示了临床LLM安全与准确性的非对齐扩展规律，方法系统且基准实用，对安全部署有重要指导意义。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 临床大语言模型的安全性和准确性遵循不同的扩展规律，安全并非扩展的被动结果。

papers.title: OpenSeeker-v2: Pushing the Limits of Search Agents with Informative and High-Difficulty Trajectories
papers.abstract: Deep search capabilities have become an indispensable competency for frontier Large Language Model (LLM) agents, yet their development remains dominated by industrial giants. The typical industry recipe involves a highly resource-intensive pipeline spanning pre-training, continual pre-training (CPT), supervised fine-tuning (SFT), and reinforcement learning (RL). In this report, we show that when fueled with informative and high-difficulty trajectories, a simple SFT approach could be surprisingly powerful for training frontier search agents. By introducing three simple data synthesis modifications: scaling knowledge graph size for richer exploration, expanding the tool set size for broader functionality, and strict low-step filtering, we establish a stronger baseline. Trained on merely 10.6k data points, our OpenSeeker-v2 achieves state-of-the-art performance across 4 benchmarks (30B-sized agents with ReAct paradigm): 46.0% on BrowseComp, 58.1% on BrowseComp-ZH, 34.6% on Humanity's Last Exam, and 78.0% on xbench, surpassing even Tongyi DeepResearch trained with heavy CPT+SFT+RL pipeline, which achieves 43.4%, 46.7%, 32.9%, and 75.0%, respectively. Notably, OpenSeeker-v2 represents the first state-of-the-art search agent within its model scale and paradigm to be developed by a purely academic team using only SFT. We are excited to open-source the OpenSeeker-v2 model weights and share our simple yet effective findings to make frontier search agent research more accessible to the community.

analysis.tldr: 仅用SFT和少量高质量轨迹数据，OpenSeeker-v2在搜索Agent任务上超越工业级CPT+SFT+RL管线。
analysis.research_motivation: 前沿搜索Agent的开发通常依赖工业界资源密集的预训练-微调-强化学习管线，学术界难以复现，亟需更高效的方法。
analysis.problem: 如何用简单的监督微调（SFT）方法，仅使用少量数据训练出高性能的搜索Agent。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出三种数据合成改进：扩大知识图谱规模以丰富探索、扩展工具集以增强功能、严格低步过滤；基于这些策略生成信息丰富且高难度的轨迹，仅用10.6k数据点进行SFT训练。
contributions: 发现仅用SFT和高质量轨迹即可训练出前沿搜索Agent，挑战了工业界复杂管线的必要性。
提出三种简单有效的数据合成改进策略，显著提升搜索Agent性能。
开源模型权重，推动搜索Agent研究的可复现性和可访问性。
analysis.experiments: 在4个基准（BrowseComp、BrowseComp-ZH、Humanity's Last Exam、xbench）上评估，OpenSeeker-v2（30B参数，ReAct范式）分别达到46.0%、58.1%、34.6%、78.0%，超越Tongyi DeepResearch（43.4%、46.7%、32.9%、75.0%）。
limitations: 方法仅在30B规模模型和ReAct范式上验证，泛化性未知。
数据合成策略可能依赖特定知识图谱和工具集，迁移成本未讨论。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 方法简单有效，开源且性能超越工业级管线，对Agent方向有重要参考价值。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 仅用SFT和少量高质量轨迹数据，OpenSeeker-v2在搜索Agent任务上超越工业级CPT+SFT+RL管线。

papers.title: Large-Scale High-Quality 3D Gaussian Head Reconstruction from Multi-View Captures
papers.abstract: We propose HeadsUp, a scalable feed-forward method for reconstructing high-quality 3D Gaussian heads from large-scale multi-camera setups. Our method employs an efficient encoder-decoder architecture that compresses input views into a compact latent representation. This latent representation is then decoded into a set of UV-parameterized 3D Gaussians anchored to a neutral head template. This UV representation decouples the number of 3D Gaussians from the number and resolution of input images, enabling training with many high-resolution input views. We train and evaluate our model on an internal dataset with more than 10,000 subjects, which is an order of magnitude larger than existing multi-view human head datasets. HeadsUp achieves state-of-the-art reconstruction quality and generalizes to novel identities without test-time optimization. We extensively analyze the scaling behavior of our model across identities, views, and model capacity, revealing practical insights for quality-compute trade-offs. Finally, we highlight the strength of our latent space by showcasing two downstream applications: generating novel 3D identities and animating the 3D heads with expression blendshapes.

analysis.tldr: 提出可扩展的前馈方法HeadsUp，从多视图输入高效重建高质量3D高斯头部模型。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有3D头部重建方法依赖测试时优化或小规模数据集，难以扩展到大规模多视图高分辨率输入，且重建质量与计算效率存在权衡。
analysis.problem: 如何从大规模多视图捕获中高效重建高质量、可泛化的3D高斯头部模型。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 采用编码器-解码器架构，将多视图输入压缩为紧凑潜在表示，再解码为UV参数化的3D高斯，锚定到中性头部模板，实现高斯数量与输入视图解耦。
contributions: 提出HeadsUp，一种可扩展的前馈方法，实现从多视图到3D高斯头部的高质量重建。
构建包含超过10,000个主体的内部数据集，规模比现有数据集大一个数量级。
展示模型在身份、视角和模型容量上的缩放行为，并验证下游应用（生成新身份和表情动画）。
analysis.experiments: 在内部大规模数据集上训练和评估，达到SOTA重建质量，泛化到未见身份无需测试时优化，并分析了缩放行为。
limitations: 依赖多相机设置，可能不适用于单视图或稀疏视图场景。
UV参数化可能限制对极端表情或非正面姿态的建模能力。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，数据集规模大，实验充分，与3D视觉方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出可扩展的前馈方法HeadsUp，从多视图输入高效重建高质量3D高斯头部模型。

papers.title: Redefining AI Red Teaming in the Agentic Era: From Weeks to Hours
papers.abstract: AI systems are entering critical domains like healthcare, finance, and defense, yet remain vulnerable to adversarial attacks. While AI red teaming is a primary defense, current approaches force operators into manual, library-specific workflows. Operators spend weeks hand-crafting workflows - assembling attacks, transforms, and scorers. When results fall short, workflows must be rebuilt. As a result, operators spend more time constructing workflows than probing targets for security and safety vulnerabilities. We introduce an AI red teaming agent built on the open-source Dreadnode SDK. The agent creates workflows grounded in 45+ adversarial attacks, 450+ transforms, and 130+ scorers. Operators can probe multi-agent systems, multilingual, and multimodal targets, focusing on what to probe rather than how to implement it. We make three contributions: 1. Agentic interface. Operators describe goals in natural language via the Dreadnode TUI (Terminal User Interface). The agent handles attack selection, transform composition, execution, and reporting, letting operators focus on red teaming. Weeks compress to hours. 2. Unified framework. A single framework for probing traditional ML models (adversarial examples) and generative AI systems (jailbreaks), removing the need for separate libraries. 3. Llama Scout case study. We red team Meta Llama Scout and achieve an 85% attack success rate with severity up to 1.0, using zero human-developed code

analysis.tldr: 提出一个基于Dreadnode SDK的AI红队智能体，将红队工作流从数周缩短到数小时。
analysis.research_motivation: AI系统在关键领域广泛应用，但易受对抗攻击；现有红队方法依赖手动、库特定的工作流，操作者花费大量时间构建工作流而非实际探测安全漏洞。
analysis.problem: 解决AI红队工作流构建耗时、碎片化的问题，实现高效、统一的自动化红队测试。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 操作者花费更多时间构建工作流而非探测目标安全漏洞；现有方法需要为不同攻击类型使用不同库。
analysis.method: 基于开源Dreadnode SDK构建红队智能体，集成45+对抗攻击、450+变换和130+评分器，支持自然语言描述目标，自动选择攻击、组合变换、执行并生成报告。
contributions: 提出智能体接口，操作者通过自然语言描述目标，智能体自动处理攻击选择、变换组合、执行和报告，将数周工作压缩到数小时。
统一框架，支持探测传统ML模型（对抗样本）和生成式AI系统（越狱），消除对多个独立库的需求。
在Meta Llama Scout上实现85%攻击成功率，最高严重性1.0，且无需人工编写代码。
analysis.experiments: 对Meta Llama Scout进行红队测试，攻击成功率85%，最高严重性1.0。
limitations: 可能依赖Dreadnode SDK的特定攻击和变换库，覆盖范围有限。
未提及对复杂多模态或动态环境的适应性。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 方法创新且实用，实验验证有效，与安全对齐方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一个基于Dreadnode SDK的AI红队智能体，将红队工作流从数周缩短到数小时。

papers.title: Normalization Equivariance for Arbitrary Backbones, with Application to Image Denoising
papers.abstract: Normalization Equivariance (NE), equivariance to global contrast and brightness transforms, improves robustness to distribution shift in image-to-image prediction. Existing methods enforce this prior by constraining internal layers to NE-compatible families, limiting compatibility with standard components such as attention and LayerNorm, and adding runtime cost. We characterize the full NE function class: a function is NE if and only if it admits a normalize-process-denormalize factorization. This turns exact NE enforcement, for the ideal wrapper, from an internal architectural constraint into an input-output parameterization problem, allowing a parameter-free wrapper (WNE) to enforce NE around any backbone, including transformers. In a single-noise mismatch diagnostic for blind denoising, the wrapper improves CNN and transformer robustness with no measurable GPU overhead; architectural NE baselines incur up to a 1.6x slowdown.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种与骨干网络无关的归一化等变包装器（WNE），通过输入-输出参数化实现精确的归一化等变，在图像去噪中提升鲁棒性且无额外计算开销。
analysis.research_motivation: 归一化等变（NE）能提升图像到图像预测对分布偏移的鲁棒性，但现有方法通过约束内部层实现，限制了与标准组件（如注意力、LayerNorm）的兼容性，并增加了运行时开销。
analysis.problem: 如何在不修改骨干网络内部结构的前提下，精确且高效地强制实现归一化等变。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出WNE包装器，基于归一化-处理-反归一化的分解，将NE强制从内部架构约束转化为输入-输出参数化问题，可应用于任意骨干网络（包括Transformer）。
contributions: 完整刻画了归一化等变函数类，证明函数是NE当且仅当可分解为归一化-处理-反归一化形式。
提出无参数包装器WNE，可在任意骨干网络上强制NE，无需修改内部结构，且无GPU开销。
analysis.experiments: 在单噪声失配诊断任务（盲去噪）上，WNE提升了CNN和Transformer的鲁棒性，无额外GPU开销；而架构级NE基线最多导致1.6倍减速。
limitations: 仅针对图像去噪任务验证，其他图像到图像预测任务效果未知。
可能对某些极端分布偏移的鲁棒性提升有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法简洁有效，理论刻画清晰，实验显示无开销优势，但应用场景较窄。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种与骨干网络无关的归一化等变包装器（WNE），通过输入-输出参数化实现精确的归一化等变，在图像去噪中提升鲁棒性且无额外计算开销。

papers.title: SymptomAI: Toward a Conversational AI Agent for Everyday Symptom Assessment
papers.abstract: Language models excel at diagnostic assessments on curated medical case-studies and vignettes, performing on par with, or better than, clinical professionals. However, existing studies focus on complex scenarios with rich context making it difficult to draw conclusions about how these systems perform for patients reporting symptoms in everyday life. We deployed SymptomAI, a set of conversational AI agents for end-to-end patient interviewing and differential diagnosis (DDx), via the Fitbit app in a study that randomized participants (N=13,917) to interact with five AI agents. This corpus captures diverse communication and a realistic distribution of illnesses from a real world population. A subset of 1,228 participants reported a clinician-provided diagnosis, and 517 of these were further evaluated by a panel of clinicians during over 250 hours of annotation. SymptomAI DDx were significantly more accurate (OR = 2.56, p < 0.001) than those from independent clinicians given the same dialogue in a blinded randomized comparison. Moreover, agentic strategies which conduct a dedicated symptom interview that elicit additional symptom information before providing a diagnosis, perform substantially better than baseline, user-guided conversations (p < 0.001). An auxiliary analysis on 1,509 conversations from a general US population panel validated that these results generalize beyond wearable device users. We used SymptomAI diagnoses as labels for all 13,917 participants to analyze over 500,000 days of wearable metrics across nearly 400 unique conditions. We identified strong associations between acute infections and physiological shifts (e.g., OR > 7 for influenza). While limited by self-reported ground truth, these results demonstrate the benefits of a dedicated and complete symptom interview compared to a user-guided symptom discussion, which is the default of most consumer LLMs.

analysis.tldr: SymptomAI 通过 Fitbit 部署的对话式 AI 代理在真实世界症状评估中显著优于临床医生，并揭示了专用症状访谈策略的优势。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有研究多聚焦于复杂病例，缺乏对日常症状评估中 AI 系统性能的真实世界评估。
analysis.problem: 评估对话式 AI 代理在日常症状评估中的诊断准确性，并比较不同交互策略的效果。

analysis.method: 在 Fitbit 应用中部署五个对话式 AI 代理进行患者访谈和鉴别诊断，随机分配 13,917 名参与者，收集对话和可穿戴数据。
contributions: 构建了大规模真实世界症状评估语料库（13,917 名参与者，500,000+ 天可穿戴数据）。
证明了专用症状访谈策略相比用户引导对话的显著优势。
发现急性感染与生理指标变化之间的强关联（如流感 OR>7）。
analysis.experiments: 在 13,917 名参与者中随机对照实验，1,228 名报告临床诊断，517 名经临床医生小组 250+ 小时标注验证。AI 诊断准确率显著高于独立临床医生（OR=2.56, p<0.001）。
limitations: 金标准基于自我报告，可能存在偏差。

papers.title: Enhanced 3D Brain Tumor Segmentation Using Assorted Precision Training
papers.abstract: A brain tumor is a medical disorder faced by individuals of all demographics. Medically, it is described as the spread of non-essential cells close to or throughout the brain. Symptoms of this ailment include headaches, seizures, and sensory changes. This research explores two main categories of brain tumors: benign and malignant. Benign spreads steadily, and malignant expresses growth, making it dangerous. Early identification of brain tumors is a crucial factor for the survival of patients. This research provides a state-of-the-art approach to the early identification of tumors within the brain. We implemented the SegResNet architecture, a widely adopted architecture for three-dimensional segmentation, and trained it using the automatic multi-precision method. We incorporated the dice loss function and dice metric for evaluating the model. We got a dice score of 0.84. For the tumor core, we got a dice score of 0.84; for the whole tumor, 0.90; and for the enhanced tumor, we got a score of 0.79.

analysis.tldr: 使用混合精度训练SegResNet实现3D脑肿瘤分割，Dice得分0.84。
analysis.research_motivation: 脑肿瘤早期诊断对患者生存至关重要，现有分割方法在精度和效率上仍有提升空间。
analysis.problem: 如何利用混合精度训练提升3D脑肿瘤分割的准确性和效率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 采用SegResNet架构，结合自动混合精度训练和Dice损失函数进行3D脑肿瘤分割。
contributions: 提出基于SegResNet和混合精度训练的脑肿瘤分割方法
在BraTS数据集上取得具有竞争力的Dice分数

papers.title: NeurIPS Should Require Reproducibility Standards for Frontier AI Safety Claims
papers.abstract: Frontier AI safety claims - published assertions that a highly capable general-purpose model is below a threshold of concern, adequately mitigated, or suitable for release - increasingly shape model deployment, governance, and public trust. Yet the artefacts needed to evaluate them are routinely withheld, producing an evidential inversion: the most consequential claims in AI safety are often the least reproducible. This position paper argues that NeurIPS should require reproducibility standards for papers making such claims, treating non-reproducibility not as a transparency preference but as an evaluation-methodology failure. The 2026 International AI Safety Report [Bengio et al., 2026] concludes that reliable pre-deployment safety testing has become harder to conduct and that models now distinguish test from deployment contexts; the 2025 Foundation Model Transparency Index [Wan et al., 2025] reports a sector-average transparency score of 40/100 with no major developer adequately disclosing train-test overlap; contemporaneous measurement-theory work shows that attack-success-rate comparisons across systems are often founded on low-validity measurements [Chouldechova et al., 2025]. We propose a three-tier disclosure framework, distinguishing public, controlled, and claim-restricted disclosure, paired with a mandatory claim inventory, scope statements, and a phased implementation path with graduated sanctions. The framework treats secrecy and openness as endpoints of a spectrum, with controlled review (via a federated colloquium of qualified secure-review hosts) covering claims whose artefacts cannot be released publicly, and right-scaling claims whose artefacts cannot be reviewed even confidentially. The standard the community applies to its most consequential claims should be at least as high as the standard it applies to its least.

analysis.tldr: 呼吁NeurIPS对前沿AI安全声明实施可复现性标准，提出三级披露框架。
analysis.research_motivation: 前沿AI安全声明影响模型部署和公共信任，但相关工件常被隐瞒，导致最关键的声明最不可复现，形成证据倒置。
analysis.problem: NeurIPS缺乏对前沿AI安全声明的可复现性要求，使得评估这些声明变得困难。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出：安全测试更难进行、模型能区分测试与部署环境、透明度评分低（40/100）、攻击成功率比较基于低效度测量。
analysis.method: 提出三级披露框架（公开、受控、声明限制），配套强制声明清单、范围说明、分阶段实施路径和渐进式制裁。
contributions: 论证了非可复现性应被视为评估方法论失败而非透明度偏好
提出了三级披露框架及实施机制
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果
limitations: 框架的具体实施细节和可行性未充分讨论
可能面临来自工业界的阻力
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 观点新颖且具有政策影响力，但技术深度较低，适合关注AI治理的读者。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 呼吁NeurIPS对前沿AI安全声明实施可复现性标准，提出三级披露框架。

papers.title: Physics-Grounded Multi-Agent Architecture for Traceable, Risk-Aware Human-AI Decision Support in Manufacturing
papers.abstract: High-precision CNC machining of free-form aerospace components requires bounded compensations informed by inspection, simulation, and process knowledge. Off-the-shelf large language model (LLM) assistants can generate text, but they do not reliably execute risk-constrained multi-step numerical workflows or provide auditable provenance for high-stakes decisions. We present multi-agent knowledge analysis (MAKA), a human-in-the-loop decision-support architecture that separates intent routing, tools-only quantitative analysis, knowledge graph retrieval, and critic-based verification that enforces physical plausibility, safety bounds, and provenance completeness before recommendations are surfaced for human approval. MAKA is instantiated on a Ti-6Al-4V rotor blade machining testbed by fusing virtual-machining path-tracking error fields, cutting-force and deflection simulations, and scan-based 3D inspection deviation maps from 16 blades. The analysis decomposes deviation into an evidence-linked pathing component, a drift-based wear proxy capturing systematic evolution across parts, a residual systematic compliance term, and a variability proxy for instability-aware escalation. In a three-level tool-orchestration benchmark (single-step through $\geq$3-step stateful sequences), MAKA improves successful tool execution by up to 87.5 percentage points relative to an unstructured single-model interaction pattern with identical tool access. Digital twin what-if studies show MAKA can coordinate traceable compensation candidates that reduce predicted surface deviation from order $10^{-2}$in to approximately $\pm 10^{-3}$in over most of the blade within the simulation environment, providing a pre-deployment verification signal for risk-aware human decision-making.

analysis.tldr: 提出MAKA多智能体架构，通过分离意图路由、工具分析、知识图谱和验证模块，实现可追溯、风险感知的制造决策支持。
analysis.research_motivation: 高精度数控加工需要受约束的补偿决策，但现成LLM助手无法可靠执行风险约束的多步数值工作流，也无法为高风险决策提供可审计的溯源。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个可追溯、风险感知的人机协同决策支持系统，使LLM能安全地执行多步数值分析并保证物理合理性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出MAKA（多智能体知识分析）架构，包含意图路由、纯工具定量分析、知识图谱检索和基于批评者的验证模块，强制物理合理性、安全边界和溯源完整性，最终由人类批准。
contributions: 提出MAKA多智能体架构，将LLM决策分解为路由、分析、检索和验证四个独立模块。
在钛合金叶片加工测试平台上实例化，融合虚拟加工误差场、切削力仿真和3D扫描偏差图。
在工具编排基准测试中，相比非结构化单模型交互，MAKA将成功工具执行率提升高达87.5个百分点。
数字孪生what-if研究表明MAKA可协调可追溯的补偿方案，将预测表面偏差从10^{-2}英寸降至约±10^{-3}英寸。
analysis.experiments: 在Ti-6Al-4V转子叶片加工测试平台上进行实验，使用16个叶片的虚拟加工路径跟踪误差场、切削力和变形仿真以及基于扫描的3D检测偏差图。在三级工具编排基准测试中（单步到≥3步有状态序列），MAKA相比非结构化单模型交互模式，成功工具执行率提升高达87.5个百分点。数字孪生what-if研究显示MAKA可协调可追溯的补偿候选方案，在仿真环境中将大部分叶片的预测表面偏差从10^{-2}英寸降至约±10^{-3}英寸。
limitations: 仅在单一制造测试平台上验证，泛化性未知。
依赖高质量的知识图谱和仿真模型，构建成本高。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.reason: 方法有创新性，实验显示显著提升，但应用领域较窄，适合精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出MAKA多智能体架构，通过分离意图路由、工具分析、知识图谱和验证模块，实现可追溯、风险感知的制造决策支持。

papers.title: RD-ViT: Recurrent-Depth Vision Transformer for Semantic Segmentation with Reduced Data Dependence Extending the Recurrent-Depth Transformer Architecture to Dense Prediction
papers.abstract: Vision Transformers (ViTs) achieve state-of-the-art segmentation accuracy but require large training datasets because each layer has unique parameters that must be learned independently. We present RD-ViT, a Recurrent-Depth Vision Transformer that adapts the Recurrent-Depth Transformer (RDT) architecture to dense prediction tasks, supporting both 2D and 3D inputs. RD-ViT replaces the deep stack of unique transformer blocks with a single shared block looped T times, augmented with LTI-stable state injection for guaranteed convergence, Adaptive Computation Time (ACT) for spatial compute allocation, depth-wise LoRA adaptation, and optional Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) feed-forward networks for category-specific specialization. We evaluate on the ACDC cardiac MRI segmentation benchmark in both 2D slice-level and 3D volumetric settings with exclusively real experiments executed in Google Colab. In 2D, RD-ViT outperforms standard ViT at 10% training data (Dice 0.774 vs 0.762) and at full data (0.882 vs 0.872). In 3D, RD-ViT with MoE achieves Dice 0.812 with 3.0M parameters, reaching 99.4% of standard ViT performance (0.817) at 53% of the parameter count. MoE expert utilization analysis reveals that different experts spontaneously specialize for different cardiac structures (RV, MYO, LV) without explicit routing supervision. ACT halting maps show higher compute allocation at cardiac boundaries, and the mean ponder time decreases from 2.6 to 1.4 iterations during training, demonstrating learned computational efficiency. Depth extrapolation enables inference with more loops than training without degradation. All code, notebooks, and results are publicly released.

analysis.tldr: RD-ViT通过循环深度共享Transformer块，在少量数据下提升语义分割性能，并支持2D/3D输入。
analysis.research_motivation: 标准Vision Transformer每层独立参数导致数据依赖性强，小数据集下性能受限，且参数量大。
analysis.problem: 如何减少Vision Transformer对大规模训练数据的依赖，同时保持或提升密集预测任务的性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到：标准ViT在10%数据下性能下降明显；RD-ViT在少量数据下优于标准ViT；MoE专家自发专用于不同心脏结构；ACT在边界分配更多计算；平均思考时间随训练减少；深度外推无退化。
analysis.method: 提出RD-ViT，将标准ViT的独立块替换为单个共享块循环T次，结合LTI稳定状态注入、自适应计算时间(ACT)、深度LoRA和可选MoE。
contributions: 将循环深度Transformer架构扩展到密集预测任务，支持2D和3D输入。
提出ACT、深度LoRA和MoE等组件，提升数据效率和参数效率。
在ACDC心脏MRI分割基准上验证，10%数据下Dice 0.774 vs 0.762，全数据0.882 vs 0.872，3D下以53%参数达到99.4%性能。
analysis.experiments: 在ACDC心脏MRI分割基准上进行2D切片级和3D体积级实验，所有实验在Google Colab中执行。
limitations: 仅在单一心脏MRI数据集上验证，泛化性未知。
MoE专家数量及路由机制可能需针对不同任务调整。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，在医学图像分割上数据效率提升显著，但实验规模有限，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: RD-ViT通过循环深度共享Transformer块，在少量数据下提升语义分割性能，并支持2D/3D输入。

papers.title: 3D Human Face Reconstruction with 3DMM face model from RGB image
papers.abstract: Nowadays as convolution neural networks demonstrate its powerful problem-solving ability in the area of image processing, efforts have been made to reconstruct detailed face shapes from 2D face images or videos. However, to make the full use of CNN, a large number of labeled data is required to train the network. Coarse morphable face model has been used to synthesize labeled data. However, it is hard for coarse morphable face models to generate photo-realistic data with detail such as wrinkles. In this project, we present a pipeline that reconstructs a human face 3D model from a single RGB image. The pipeline includes face detection, landmark detection, regression of 3DMM model parameters, and soft rendering. Mentor: Zhipeng Fan (Email: zf606@nyu.edu) Code Repository: https://github.com/SeVEnMY/3d-face- reconstruction Code Reference: https://github.com/sicxu/Deep3DFaceRecon pytorch

analysis.tldr: 提出从单张RGB图像重建3D人脸模型的流水线，结合3DMM参数回归与软渲染。
analysis.research_motivation: CNN在图像处理中表现优异，但需要大量标注数据；粗粒度可变形人脸模型合成的数据缺乏细节，难以生成逼真的人脸重建结果。
analysis.problem: 如何从单张RGB图像重建包含细节（如皱纹）的3D人脸模型。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 粗粒度3DMM模型难以生成具有细节的逼真数据，导致重建结果缺乏真实感。
analysis.method: 提出包含人脸检测、关键点检测、3DMM参数回归和软渲染的流水线，利用CNN回归3DMM系数，并通过软渲染生成最终3D模型。
contributions: 提出一个完整的从单张RGB图像重建3D人脸的流水线
利用3DMM参数回归和软渲染实现细节重建

limitations: 可能依赖3DMM模型的表达能力，对极端表情或遮挡效果有限
未在摘要中提及定量评估或与现有方法的比较

analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出从单张RGB图像重建3D人脸模型的流水线，结合3DMM参数回归与软渲染。

papers.title: An Agent-Oriented Pluggable Experience-RAG Skill for Experience-Driven Retrieval Strategy Orchestration
papers.abstract: Retrieval-augmented generation systems often assume that one fixed retrieval pipeline is sufficient across heterogeneous tasks, yet factoid question answering, multi-hop reasoning, and scientific verification exhibit different retrieval preferences. We present Experience-RAG Skill, an agent-oriented pluggable retrieval orchestration layer positioned between the agent and the retriever pool. The proposed skill analyzes the current scene, consults an experience memory, selects an appropriate retrieval strategy, and returns structured evidence to the agent. Under a fixed candidate pool, Experience-RAG Skill achieves an overall nDCG@10 of 0.8924 on BeIR/nq, BeIR/hotpotqa, and BeIR/scifact, outperforming fixed single-retriever baselines and remaining competitive with Adaptive-RAG-style routing. The results suggest that retrieval strategy selection can be productively encapsulated as a reusable agent skill rather than being hard-coded in the upper workflow.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种可插拔的智能体技能，通过经验记忆动态选择检索策略，提升RAG系统在异构任务上的表现。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有RAG系统通常假设单一固定检索管道适用于所有任务，但事实问答、多跳推理和科学验证等异构任务对检索策略有不同偏好，缺乏灵活适配机制。
analysis.problem: 如何将检索策略选择从硬编码的上层工作流中解耦，封装为可复用的智能体技能，以动态适应不同任务需求。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Experience-RAG Skill，作为智能体与检索器池之间的可插拔编排层，通过分析当前场景、查询经验记忆、选择合适检索策略并返回结构化证据。
contributions: 提出一种面向智能体的可插拔检索编排层，将检索策略选择封装为可复用技能。
在BeIR/nq、BeIR/hotpotqa和BeIR/scifact上达到0.8924的nDCG@10，优于固定单检索器基线，与自适应路由方法竞争力相当。
analysis.experiments: 在BeIR/nq、BeIR/hotpotqa和BeIR/scifact三个数据集上评估，以nDCG@10为指标，与固定单检索器基线和Adaptive-RAG-style路由对比。
limitations: 可能仅在固定候选池下验证，未讨论动态池或大规模场景。
经验记忆的构建和维护开销未明确分析。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 方法新颖，将检索策略选择封装为可插拔技能，实验显示有效，但摘要未提供详细消融和泛化分析。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种可插拔的智能体技能，通过经验记忆动态选择检索策略，提升RAG系统在异构任务上的表现。

papers.title: From Intent to Execution: Composing Agentic Workflows with Agent Recommendation
papers.abstract: Multi-Agent Systems (MAS) built using AI agents fulfill a variety of user intents that may be used to design and build a family of related applications. However, the creation of such MAS currently involves manual composition of the plan, manual selection of appropriate agents, and manual creation of execution graphs. This paper introduces a framework for the automated creation of multi-agent systems which replaces multiple manual steps with an automated framework. The proposed framework consists of software modules and a workflow to orchestrate the requisite task- specific application. The modules include: an LLM-derived planner, a set of tasks described in natural language, a dynamic call graph, an orchestrator for map agents to tasks, and an agent recommender that finds the most suitable agent(s) from local and global agent registries. The agent recommender uses a two-stage information retrieval (IR) system comprising a fast retriever and an LLM-based re-ranker. We implemented a series of experiments exploring the choice of embedders, re- rankers, agent description enrichment, and supervising critique agent. We benchmarked this system end-to-end, evaluating the combination of planning, agent selection, and task completion, with our proposed approach. Our experimental results show that our approach outperforms the state-of-the- art in terms of the recall rate and is more robust and scalable compared to previous approaches. The critique agent holistically reevaluates both agent and tool recommendations against the overall plan. We show that the inclusion of the critique agent further enhances the recall score, proving that the comprehensive review and revision of task-based agent selection is an essential step in building end-to-end multi-agent systems.

analysis.tldr: 提出一个自动化构建多智能体系统的框架，通过LLM规划器和两阶段检索的智能体推荐器，实现从用户意图到执行图的自动生成。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前多智能体系统的构建依赖人工组合计划、选择智能体和创建执行图，过程繁琐且效率低，亟需自动化方法。
analysis.problem: 如何自动从用户意图生成多智能体工作流，包括任务规划、智能体选择和执行图编排。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出包含LLM规划器、自然语言任务描述、动态调用图、任务-智能体映射编排器、以及两阶段检索（快速检索+LLM重排序）的智能体推荐器的自动化框架，并引入批评智能体进行整体评估。
contributions: 提出一个自动化多智能体系统构建框架，替代人工步骤。
设计两阶段检索的智能体推荐器，结合快速检索和LLM重排序。
引入批评智能体对智能体和工具推荐进行整体评估，提升召回率。
analysis.experiments: 实验探索了嵌入器、重排序器、智能体描述增强和批评智能体的选择，端到端评估了规划、智能体选择和任务完成，结果显示方法在召回率上优于现有技术，且更鲁棒和可扩展。
limitations: 依赖LLM规划器的质量，可能受限于LLM的推理能力。
两阶段检索可能引入延迟，实时性有待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 方法创新且实验充分，与Agent方向强相关，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一个自动化构建多智能体系统的框架，通过LLM规划器和两阶段检索的智能体推荐器，实现从用户意图到执行图的自动生成。

papers.title: Flow Sampling: Learning to Sample from Unnormalized Densities via Denoising Conditional Processes
papers.abstract: Sampling from unnormalized densities is analogous to the generative modeling problem, but the target distribution is defined by a known energy function instead of data samples. Because evaluating the energy function is often costly, a primary challenge is to learn an efficient sampler. We introduce Flow Sampling, a framework built on diffusion models and flow matching for the data-free setting. Our training objective is conditioned on a noise sample and regresses onto a denoising diffusion drift constructed from the energy function. In contrast, diffusion models' objective is conditioned on a data sample and regresses onto a noising diffusion drift. We utilize the interpolant process to minimize the number of energy function evaluations during training, resulting in an efficient and scalable method for sampling unnormalized densities. Furthermore, our formulation naturally extends to Riemannian manifolds, enabling diffusion-based sampling in geometries beyond Euclidean space. We derive a closed-form formula for the conditional drift on constant curvature manifolds, including hyperspheres and hyperbolic spaces. We evaluate Flow Sampling on synthetic energy benchmarks, small peptides, large-scale amortized molecular conformer generation, and distributions supported on the sphere, demonstrating strong empirical performance.

analysis.tldr: Flow Sampling 利用扩散模型和流匹配从未归一化密度中高效采样，无需数据，并扩展到黎曼流形。
analysis.research_motivation: 从已知能量函数定义的未归一化密度中采样是生成建模的关键问题，但能量函数评估成本高，现有方法效率低。
analysis.problem: 如何高效地从未归一化密度中采样，同时最小化能量函数评估次数，并支持非欧几里得几何。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 Flow Sampling 框架，基于扩散模型和流匹配，训练目标以噪声样本为条件，回归到由能量函数构建的去噪扩散漂移，并利用插值过程减少训练时的能量函数评估次数。
contributions: 提出一种无数据设置下的采样框架，通过条件去噪过程学习高效采样器。
将方法扩展到黎曼流形，并推导了常曲率流形上条件漂移的闭式公式。
analysis.experiments: 在合成能量基准、小肽、大规模摊销分子构象生成以及球面分布上评估，展示了强实证性能。
limitations: 可能依赖能量函数的平滑性。
对于复杂高维分布，训练稳定性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，结合扩散模型与流匹配解决无数据采样问题，并扩展到流形，实验充分，值得精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Flow Sampling 利用扩散模型和流匹配从未归一化密度中高效采样，无需数据，并扩展到黎曼流形。

papers.title: A Dialogue-Based Framework for Correcting Multimodal Errors in AI-Assisted STEM Education
papers.abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) are democratizing access to personalized tutoring; however, their effectiveness is hindered by challenges in processing multimodal content, which limits AI's potential to provide equitable, high-quality STEM support. This study evaluates LLM performance on multimodal physics problems, identifies specific failure modes through an empirical error taxonomy, and tests practical interventions designed to overcome multimodal processing limitations. We assessed three publicly available LLMs (Claude, Gemini, and ChatGPT) on multimodal physics problems from the OpenStax database and compared the results with text-only performance. An empirically derived error taxonomy was developed through pilot testing, followed by evaluation of a structured multimodal dialogue intervention. All three models achieved near-ceiling accuracy (96%) on text-only physics problems. Performance declined substantially on multimodal problems, consistent with what we term the Multimodal Interference Effect. Error analysis identified four failure modes: visual processing errors, context misinterpretation, mathematical computational errors, and hybrid errors, with visual processing errors being the most prevalent. The structured dialogue intervention corrected 82% of errors overall; visual processing errors were corrected at 100% across all models. Educators and students can implement these interventions immediately, requiring no model retraining, to improve AI tutoring reliability on image-rich STEM content, advancing equitable access to high-quality learning support.

analysis.tldr: 提出结构化多模态对话干预框架，纠正AI在STEM教育中的多模态错误，无需重新训练模型。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM在个性化辅导中处理多模态内容存在困难，限制了AI提供公平、高质量STEM支持的潜力。
analysis.problem: LLM在多模态物理问题中性能下降，存在特定失败模式，需要有效干预。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到多模态干扰效应：模型在纯文本问题上准确率接近天花板（96%），但在多模态问题上显著下降。错误分析识别出四种失败模式：视觉处理错误、上下文误解、数学计算错误和混合错误，其中视觉处理错误最常见。
analysis.method: 提出结构化多模态对话干预框架，通过对话引导模型逐步处理多模态信息，无需重新训练。
contributions: 实证评估了三个公开LLM在多模态物理问题上的性能，并识别了四种失败模式。
提出了结构化多模态对话干预，纠正了82%的错误，其中视觉处理错误100%被纠正。
analysis.experiments: 在OpenStax数据库的多模态物理问题上评估了Claude、Gemini和ChatGPT，并与纯文本性能对比。
limitations: 仅评估了三个公开LLM，可能不适用于其他模型。
干预效果可能依赖于问题类型和领域。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法实用但技术深度一般，实验规模有限，适合教育应用场景。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出结构化多模态对话干预框架，纠正AI在STEM教育中的多模态错误，无需重新训练模型。

papers.title: Feature-Augmented Transformers for Robust AI-Text Detection Across Domains and Generators
papers.abstract: AI-generated text is nowadays produced at scale across domains and heterogeneous generation pipelines, making robustness to distribution shift a central requirement for supervised binary detectors. We train transformer-based detectors on HC3 PLUS and calibrate a single decision threshold by maximising balanced accuracy on held-out validation; this threshold is then kept fixed for all downstream test distributions, revealing domain- and generator-dependent error asymmetries under shift. We evaluate in-domain on HC3 PLUS, under cross-dataset transfer to the multi-domain, multi-generator M4 benchmark, and on the external AI-Text-Detection-Pile. Although base models achieve near-ceiling in-domain performance (up to 99.5% balanced accuracy), performance under shift is brittle and strongly model-dependent. Feature augmentation via attention-based linguistic feature fusion improves transfer, with our best model (DeBERTa-v3-base+FeatAttn) achieving 85.9% balanced accuracy on M4. Multi-seed experiments confirm high stability. Under the same fixed-threshold protocol, our model outperforms strong zero-shot baselines by up to +7.22 points. Category-level ablations further show that readability and vocabulary features contribute most to robustness under shift. Overall, these results demonstrate that feature augmentation and a modern DeBERTa backbone significantly outperform earlier BERT/RoBERTa models, while the fixed-threshold protocol provides a more realistic and informative assessment of practical detector robustness.

analysis.tldr: 通过注意力机制融合语言特征增强Transformer检测器，提升跨领域和跨生成器的AI文本检测鲁棒性。
analysis.research_motivation: AI生成文本在多个领域和异构生成管道中大规模产生，监督二分类器对分布偏移的鲁棒性成为核心需求，但现有方法在跨域迁移时性能脆弱。
analysis.problem: 解决AI文本检测器在跨领域和跨生成器分布偏移下的鲁棒性不足问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，基础模型在域内达到接近上限的性能（平衡准确率高达99.5%），但在分布偏移下性能脆弱且高度依赖模型；特征增强可改善迁移，其中可读性和词汇特征对鲁棒性贡献最大。
analysis.method: 提出特征增强Transformer（FeatAttn），通过注意力机制融合基于语言学的特征（如可读性、词汇等）到DeBERTa-v3-base骨干网络中，并采用固定阈值协议进行训练和评估。
contributions: 提出特征增强Transformer（FeatAttn），通过注意力融合语言学特征提升跨域和跨生成器的AI文本检测鲁棒性。
在固定阈值协议下，系统评估了多种模型在HC3 PLUS、M4和AI-Text-Detection-Pile上的性能，并展示了DeBERTa-v3-base+FeatAttn在M4上达到85.9%平衡准确率，优于强零样本基线最多7.22个百分点。
analysis.experiments: 在HC3 PLUS（域内）、M4（跨数据集迁移）和AI-Text-Detection-Pile（外部）上评估，使用固定阈值协议，进行了多种子实验验证稳定性，并进行了类别级消融分析。
limitations: 固定阈值协议可能不适用于所有实际部署场景。
特征增强主要依赖手工设计的语言学特征，可能无法覆盖所有生成器特性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法增量改进，实验充分但创新有限，与NLP检测方向相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过注意力机制融合语言特征增强Transformer检测器，提升跨领域和跨生成器的AI文本检测鲁棒性。

papers.title: Label-Efficient School Detection from Aerial Imagery via Weakly Supervised Pretraining and Fine-Tuning
papers.abstract: Accurate school detection is essential for supporting education initiatives, including infrastructure planning and expanding internet connectivity to underserved areas. However, many regions around the world face challenges due to outdated, incomplete, or unavailable official records. Manual mapping efforts, while valuable, are labor-intensive and lack scalability across large geographic areas. To address this, we propose a weakly supervised framework for school detection from aerial imagery that minimizes the need for human annotations while supporting global mapping efforts. Our method is specifically designed for low-data regimes, where manual annotations are extremely scarce. We introduce an automatic labeling pipeline that leverages sparse location points and semantic segmentation to generate infrastructure masks from which we generate bounding boxes. Using these automatically labeled images, we train our detectors on a first training stage to learn a representation of what schools look like, then using a small set of manually labeled images, we fine-tune the previously trained models on this clean dataset. This two stage training pipeline enables large-scale and strong detection in low-data setting of school infrastructure with minimal supervision. Our results demonstrate strong object detection performance, particularly in the low-data regime, where the models achieve promising results using only 50 manually labeled images, significantly reducing the need for costly annotations. This framework supports education and connectivity initiatives worldwide by providing an efficient and extensible approach to mapping schools from space. All models, training code and auto-labeled data will be publicly released to foster future research and real-world impact.

analysis.tldr: 提出弱监督两阶段训练框架，利用稀疏位置点和语义分割自动生成标签，仅需50张人工标注图像即可实现高精度学校检测。
analysis.research_motivation: 学校检测对教育基础设施规划和网络覆盖扩展至关重要，但许多地区官方记录过时或不完整，人工标注成本高且难以大规模推广。
analysis.problem: 在人工标注极度稀缺的低数据场景下，如何高效、准确地从航拍图像中检测学校建筑。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 两阶段弱监督训练：第一阶段利用自动标注管道（稀疏位置点+语义分割生成掩码和边界框）训练检测器学习学校外观表征；第二阶段使用少量人工标注图像微调模型。
contributions: 提出一种自动标签生成管道，结合稀疏位置点和语义分割生成学校检测的边界框。
设计两阶段训练框架，在低数据场景下仅需50张人工标注图像即可实现强检测性能。
公开所有模型、训练代码和自动标注数据，促进后续研究和实际应用。
analysis.experiments: 在低数据场景下，使用50张人工标注图像进行微调，模型取得了有前景的检测结果。
limitations: 自动标签生成可能引入噪声，影响第一阶段表征学习质量。
方法依赖稀疏位置点数据，在位置点缺失或不准的区域可能失效。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性中等，但针对实际应用问题，实验规模有限，适合关注弱监督目标检测的读者。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出弱监督两阶段训练框架，利用稀疏位置点和语义分割自动生成标签，仅需50张人工标注图像即可实现高精度学校检测。

papers.title: Inconsistent Databases and Argumentation Frameworks with Collective Attacks
papers.abstract: The connection between subset-maximal repairs for inconsistent databases involving various integrity constraints and acceptable sets of arguments within argumentation frameworks has recently drawn growing interest. In this paper, we contribute to this domain by establishing a new connection when integrity constraints (ICs) include denial constraints and local-as-view tuple-generating dependencies. It turns out that SET-based Argumentation Frameworks (SETAFs), an extension of Dung's argumentation frameworks (AFs) allowing collective attacks, are needed. It is known that subset-maximal repairs under denial constraints correspond to the naive extensions, which also coincide with the preferred and stable extensions in the resulting SETAFs. Our main findings establish that repairs under the considered fragment of tuple-generating dependencies correspond to the preferred extensions. Moreover, for these dependencies, additional preprocessing allows computing a unique extension that is stable and naive. Allowing both types of constraints breaks this relationship, and even the pre-processing does not help as only preferred semantics captures these repairs. Finally, while it is known that functional dependencies do not require set-based attacks, we prove the same regarding inclusion dependencies. Thus, one can translate inconsistent databases under these restricted classes of ICs to plain AFs with attacks only between arguments.

analysis.tldr: 建立不一致数据库的子集最大修复与带集体攻击的论证框架之间的新联系。
analysis.research_motivation: 不一致数据库的修复与论证框架之间的关联近年来引起关注，但现有研究未覆盖包含否定约束和局部视图元组生成依赖的完整性约束场景。
analysis.problem: 如何将包含否定约束和局部视图元组生成依赖的不一致数据库的子集最大修复映射到论证框架的语义中。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 利用SETAFs（带集体攻击的论证框架）建立映射，分析不同完整性约束下修复与论证语义的对应关系，并引入预处理技术。
contributions: 建立了否定约束下子集最大修复与SETAFs中naive、preferred、stable扩展的对应关系。
证明了局部视图元组生成依赖下修复对应preferred扩展，且预处理可得到唯一稳定和naive扩展。
揭示了两种约束共存时仅preferred语义能捕获修复，并证明了函数依赖和包含依赖不需要集体攻击。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅考虑了特定类型的完整性约束，未涵盖更一般的约束。
预处理方法在约束共存时失效，可能限制了实际应用。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.reason: 主题与机器学习核心方向距离较远，偏向数据库与逻辑推理，创新性和技术深度中等但影响力有限。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 建立不一致数据库的子集最大修复与带集体攻击的论证框架之间的新联系。

papers.title: MOSAIC-Bench: Measuring Compositional Vulnerability Induction in Coding Agents
papers.abstract: Coding agents often pass per-prompt safety review yet ship exploitable code when their tasks are decomposed into routine engineering tickets. The challenge is structural: existing safety alignment evaluates overt requests in isolation, leaving models blind to malicious end-states that emerge from sequenced compliance with innocuous-looking requests. We introduce MOSAIC-Bench (Malicious Objectives Sequenced As Innocuous Compliance), a benchmark of 199 three-stage attack chains paired with deterministic exploit oracles on deployed software substrates (10 web-application substrates, 31 CWE classes, 5 programming languages) that treats both exploit ground truth and downstream reviewer protocol as first-class evaluation axes. On this benchmark, nine production coding agents from Anthropic, OpenAI, Google, Moonshot, Zhipu, and Minimax compose innocuous tickets at 53-86% end-to-end ASR with only two refusals across all staged runs. In a matched direct-prompt experiment over four frontier Claude/Codex agents, vulnerable-output rates fall to 0-20.4%: Claude primarily refuses, while Codex primarily hardens rather than emitting the vulnerable implementation - ticket staging silences both defense modes simultaneously. Downstream, code reviewer agents approve 25.8% of these confirmed-vulnerable cumulative diffs as routine PRs, and a full-context implementation protocol closes only 50% of the staged/direct gap, ruling out context fragmentation as the sole explanation. As a deployable but non-adaptive mitigation, reframing the reviewer as an adversarial pentester reduces evasion across the evaluated reviewer subset; pentester framed evasion ranges from 3.0% to 17.6%, and an open-weight Gemma-4-E4B-it reviewer under this framing detects 88.4% of attacks on the dataset with a 4.6% false-positive rate measured on 608 real-world GitHub PRs.

analysis.tldr: 提出MOSAIC-Bench基准，揭示编码智能体在分解任务时易受组合式漏洞注入攻击，现有安全对齐方法无法防御。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有安全对齐仅评估显式恶意请求，但编码智能体在分解为常规工程工单时可能组合出可利用的漏洞，缺乏对此类组合式攻击的评测基准。
analysis.problem: 编码智能体在任务分解场景下对组合式漏洞注入攻击的脆弱性，以及现有安全对齐方法的不足。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到：九个生产级编码智能体在MOSAIC-Bench上端到端攻击成功率达53-86%，仅两次拒绝；直接提示下脆弱输出率降至0-20.4%，表明工单分解同时抑制了拒绝和加固两种防御模式；代码审查智能体批准了25.8%的确认漏洞差异；全上下文实现协议仅缩小50%的差距，排除上下文碎片化作为唯一解释。
analysis.method: 构建MOSAIC-Bench基准，包含199个三阶段攻击链，配以确定性漏洞预言机，在10个Web应用、31个CWE类、5种编程语言上评估，并将漏洞真实性和下游审查协议作为一等评估轴。
contributions: 提出MOSAIC-Bench基准，系统评估编码智能体在任务分解下的组合式漏洞注入脆弱性。
揭示工单分解同时抑制拒绝和加固两种防御模式，且上下文碎片化不是唯一原因。
提出将审查者重构为对抗性渗透测试者的缓解策略，有效降低逃避率。
analysis.experiments: 在九个生产级编码智能体（来自Anthropic、OpenAI、Google等）上评估，端到端攻击成功率达53-86%；直接提示实验显示脆弱输出率降至0-20.4%；下游审查者批准25.8%的漏洞差异；渗透测试框架下逃避率降至3.0-17.6%，Gemma-4-E4B-it审查者检测率88.4%，假阳性率4.6%。
limitations: 缓解策略是非自适应的，可能无法应对自适应攻击。
基准仅覆盖199个攻击链，可能无法代表所有组合式攻击模式。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 该基准针对编码智能体安全对齐的盲点，方法创新且实验充分，对AI安全领域有重要价值。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出MOSAIC-Bench基准，揭示编码智能体在分解任务时易受组合式漏洞注入攻击，现有安全对齐方法无法防御。

papers.title: UnAC: Adaptive Visual Prompting with Abstraction and Stepwise Checking for Complex Multimodal Reasoning
papers.abstract: Although recent LMMs have become much stronger at visual perception, they remain unreliable on problems that require multi-step reasoning over visual evidence. In this paper, we present UnAC (Understanding, Abstracting, and Checking), a multimodal prompting method that strengthens reasoning for complex multimodal tasks in LMMs (e.g., GPT-4o, Gemini 1.5, and GPT-4V). To improve image understanding and capture fine details, we propose an adaptive visual prompting strategy that enables LMMs to focus on salient regions. We further design an image-abstraction prompt to effectively extract key information from images. In addition, we introduce a gradual self-checking scheme that improves reasoning by verifying each decomposed subquestion and its answer. Extensive experiments on three public benchmarks-MathVista, MM-Vet, and MMMU.

analysis.tldr: UnAC通过自适应视觉提示、图像抽象和逐步自检提升多模态推理能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LMM在视觉感知上虽强，但在需要多步推理的复杂视觉问题上仍不可靠，亟需增强其推理可靠性。
analysis.problem: 如何提升LMM在复杂多模态任务中的多步推理能力，使其能准确理解图像细节并逐步验证推理过程。

contributions: 提出自适应视觉提示策略，使LMM聚焦图像显著区域。
设计图像抽象提示和逐步自检机制，提升多步推理的准确性和可靠性。
analysis.experiments: 在MathVista、MM-Vet和MMMU三个公开基准上进行了实验，但摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖LMM的底层能力，对弱模型效果有限。

papers.title: TabSurv: Adapting Modern Tabular Neural Networks to Survival Analysis
papers.abstract: Survival analysis on tabular data is a well-studied problem. However, existing deep learning methods are often highly task-specific, which can limit the transfer of new approaches from other domains and introduce constraints that may affect performance. We propose TabSurv, an approach that adapts modern tabular architectures to survival analysis using either the Weibull distribution or non-parametric survival prediction. TabSurv optimizes SurvHL, a novel histogram loss function supporting censored data. In addition to a baseline feed-forward network, we implement deep ensembles of MLPs for survival analysis within TabSurv. In contrast to prior work, the ensemble components are trained in parallel, optimizing survival distribution parameters before averaging, which promotes diversity across ensemble component predictions. We perform a comprehensive empirical evaluation of different proposed architectures on 10 diverse real-world survival datasets. Our results show that TabSurv consistently outperforms on average established classical and deep learning baselines, such as RSF, DeepSurv, DeepHit, SurvTRACE. Notably, deep ensembles with Weibull parametrization instead of non-parametric models achieve the highest average rank by C-index. Overall, our study clarifies how modern tabular neural networks can be adapted and trained to tackle survival analysis problems, offering a strong and reliable approach. The TabSurv implementation is publicly available.

analysis.tldr: TabSurv将现代表格神经网络适配到生存分析，通过Weibull分布或非参数预测及新损失函数SurvHL，在10个数据集上平均优于现有方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 生存分析在表格数据中研究充分，但现有深度学习方法高度任务特定，限制了新方法的迁移并可能引入性能约束。
analysis.problem: 如何将现代表格神经网络架构有效适配到生存分析任务，并处理删失数据。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出TabSurv框架，适配现代表格架构（如MLP集成）用于生存分析，支持Weibull分布或非参数预测，并优化新提出的直方图损失函数SurvHL以处理删失数据；集成组件并行训练，先优化生存分布参数再平均，促进多样性。
contributions: 提出TabSurv，将现代表格神经网络适配到生存分析，支持参数化和非参数预测。
设计SurvHL损失函数，适用于删失数据的直方图损失。
实现并行训练的深度集成MLP，提升预测多样性。
在10个真实数据集上全面评估，平均优于RSF、DeepSurv、DeepHit、SurvTRACE等基线。
analysis.experiments: 在10个真实生存数据集上评估，使用C-index指标，TabSurv平均优于经典和深度学习基线，其中Weibull参数化的深度集成达到最高平均排名。
limitations: 可能对特定数据集或分布假设敏感。

papers.title: Reservoir property image slices from the Groningen gas field for image translation and segmentation
papers.abstract: Reservoir characterization workflows increasingly rely on image-based and machine-learning/deep learning or even generative AI approaches, but openly available geological image datasets suitable for reproducible benchmarking remain limited. Here we describe a high-resolution dataset of reservoir-property image slices derived from the Groningen static geological model. The dataset contains aligned two-dimensional PNG images representing facies, porosity, permeability, and water saturation, generated from three-dimensional reservoir grids and prepared for downstream visualization, segmentation, and image-to-image translation tasks. In addition to the deposited original image corpus, we provide an archived software workflow for reproducing augmentation, mask generation, paired-image construction, and example baseline experiments. The resource is designed to support benchmarking of geological image analysis methods and the study of cross-domain relationships among reservoir properties. By separating the fixed image dataset from the reproducible processing workflow, this work provides a transparent foundation for reuse in geoscience, reservoir modeling, and machine-learning applications.

analysis.tldr: 公开了格罗宁根气田储层属性图像数据集，支持图像翻译与分割的基准测试。
analysis.research_motivation: 储层表征工作流日益依赖图像和机器学习方法，但公开可用的地质图像数据集稀缺，限制了可重复基准测试。

papers.title: iWorld-Bench: A Benchmark for Interactive World Models with a Unified Action Generation Framework
papers.abstract: Achieving Artificial General Intelligence (AGI) requires agents that learn and interact adaptively, with interactive world models providing scalable environments for perception, reasoning, and action. Yet current research still lacks large-scale datasets and unified benchmarks to evaluate their physical interaction capabilities. To address this, we propose iWorld-Bench, a comprehensive benchmark for training and testing world models on interaction-related abilities such as distance perception and memory. We construct a diverse dataset with 330k video clips and select 2.1k high-quality samples covering varied perspectives, weather, and scenes. As existing world models differ in interaction modalities, we introduce an Action Generation Framework to unify evaluation and design six task types, generating 4.9k test samples. These tasks jointly assess model performance across visual generation, trajectory following, and memory. Evaluating 14 representative world models, we identify key limitations and provide insights for future research. The iWorld-Bench model leaderboard is publicly available at iWorld-Bench.com.

analysis.tldr: 提出iWorld-Bench基准，用于评估交互式世界模型的物理交互能力，并引入统一动作生成框架。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前研究缺乏大规模数据集和统一基准来评估世界模型的物理交互能力，阻碍了AGI的发展。
analysis.problem: 缺少用于训练和测试世界模型交互相关能力（如距离感知、记忆）的标准化基准和统一评估框架。

analysis.method: 构建包含33万视频片段的数据集，筛选2100个高质量样本，设计动作生成框架统一评估，并定义六种任务类型生成4900个测试样本。
contributions: 提出iWorld-Bench基准，包含大规模多样化数据集和统一评估框架。

评估14个代表性模型，揭示关键局限性并为未来研究提供见解。

papers.title: The Counterexample Game: Iterated Conceptual Analysis and Repair in Language Models
papers.abstract: Conceptual analysis -- proposing definitions and refining them through counterexamples -- is central to philosophical methodology. We study whether language models can perform this task through iterated analysis and repair chains: one model instance generates counterexamples to a proposed definition, another repairs the definition, and the process repeats. Across 20 concepts and thousands of counterexample-repair cycles, we find that, although many LM-generated counterexamples are judged invalid by both expert humans and an LM judge, the LM judge accepts roughly twice as many as humans do. Nonetheless, per-item validity judgments are moderately consistent across humans and between humans and the LM. We further find that extended iteration produces increasingly verbose definitions without improving accuracy. We also see that some concepts resist stable definitions in general. These findings suggest that while LMs can engage in philosophical reasoning, the counterexample-repair loop hits diminishing returns quickly and could be a fruitful test case for evaluating whether LMs can sustain high-level iterated philosophical reasoning.

analysis.tldr: 语言模型能进行概念分析与修复，但迭代收益递减且定义趋于冗长。
analysis.research_motivation: 概念分析是哲学方法论的核心，研究语言模型能否模拟这一过程有助于评估其高级推理能力。
analysis.problem: 语言模型能否通过迭代的“反例-修复”循环进行概念分析，以及该过程的有效性和局限性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: LM生成的反例被人类专家和LM评判者接受的比例不同（LM评判者接受率约为人类的两倍）；迭代导致定义越来越冗长但准确性未提升；某些概念难以获得稳定定义。
analysis.method: 让一个LM实例生成反例，另一个LM实例修复定义，循环迭代；使用人类和LM评判者评估反例有效性。
contributions: 首次系统研究语言模型在迭代概念分析与修复中的表现
揭示了迭代过程的收益递减现象和定义冗长化问题
analysis.experiments: 在20个概念上进行数千次反例-修复循环，使用人类和LM评判者评估。摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 仅使用单一LM架构，可能不具泛化性
反例有效性评判标准可能受评判者偏差影响

analysis.one_sentence_summary: 语言模型能进行概念分析与修复，但迭代收益递减且定义趋于冗长。

papers.title: Towards Open World Sound Event Detection
papers.abstract: Sound Event Detection (SED) plays a vital role in audio understanding, with applications in surveillance, smart cities, healthcare, and multimedia indexing. However, conventional SED systems operate under a closed-world assumption, limiting their effectiveness in real-world environments where novel acoustic events frequently emerge. Inspired by the success of open-world learning in computer vision, we introduce the Open-World Sound Event Detection (OW-SED) paradigm, where models must detect known events, identify unseen ones, and incrementally learn from them. To tackle the unique challenges of OW-SED, such as overlapping and ambiguous events, we propose a 1D Deformable architecture that leverages deformable attention to adaptively focus on salient temporal regions. Furthermore, we design a novel Open-World Deformable Sound Event Detection Transformer (WOOT) framework incorporating feature disentanglement to separate class-specific and class-agnostic representations, together with a one-to-many matching strategy and a diversity loss to enhance representation diversity. Experimental results demonstrate that our method achieves marginally superior performance compared to existing leading techniques in closed-world settings and significantly improves over existing baselines in open-world scenarios.

analysis.tldr: 提出开放世界声音事件检测范式及WOOT框架，在封闭和开放场景下均优于现有方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统声音事件检测系统基于封闭世界假设，无法处理现实环境中不断出现的新声音事件，限制了其在监控、智慧城市等领域的应用。
analysis.problem: 如何让声音事件检测模型同时检测已知事件、识别未知事件并增量学习，即开放世界声音事件检测。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出WOOT框架，包含1D可变形注意力架构、特征解耦（分离类别特定与类别无关表示）、一对多匹配策略和多样性损失。
contributions: 首次提出开放世界声音事件检测（OW-SED）范式。
设计WOOT框架，结合可变形注意力、特征解耦和多样性损失，有效处理重叠和模糊事件。
analysis.experiments: 在封闭世界设置中性能略优于现有领先技术，在开放世界场景中显著优于现有基线。
limitations: 摘要未提及计算复杂度或实时性分析。
可能对极度罕见或噪声干扰大的事件处理能力有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性较高，但实验细节有限，推荐阅读摘要。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出开放世界声音事件检测范式及WOOT框架，在封闭和开放场景下均优于现有方法。

papers.title: Magic-Informed Quantum Architecture Search
papers.abstract: Nonstabilizerness, commonly referred to as magic, is a fundamental resource underpinning quantum advantage. In this paper, we propose a magic-informed quantum architecture search (QAS) technique that enables control over a quantum resource within the general framework of circuit design. Inspired by the AlphaGo approach, we tackle the problem with a Monte Carlo Tree Search technique equipped with a Graph Neural Network (GNN) that estimates the magic of candidate quantum circuits. The GNN model induces a magic-based bias that steers the search toward either high- or low-magic regimes, depending on the target objective. We benchmark the proposed magic-informed QAS technique on both the structured ground-state energy problem and on the more general quantum state approximation problem, spanning different sizes and target magic levels. Experimental results show that the proposed technique effectively influences the magic across the search tree and notably also on the resulting final circuit, even in regimes where the GNN operates on out-of-distribution instances. Although introducing a problem-agnostic magic bias could, in principle, constrain the search dynamics, we observe consistent improvements in solution quality across all problems tested.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种受量子魔法（magic）启发的量子架构搜索方法，利用图神经网络估计魔法量并引导搜索，在基态能量和量子态近似问题上均取得改进。
analysis.research_motivation: 非稳定化资源（magic）是量子优势的基础，但现有量子架构搜索（QAS）方法缺乏对量子资源的显式控制，难以针对不同目标（如高或低magic）优化电路设计。
analysis.problem: 如何在量子电路设计中引入magic资源的控制，实现面向目标（高/低magic）的架构搜索。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 结合蒙特卡洛树搜索（MCTS）和图神经网络（GNN），GNN预测候选电路的magic值，产生magic偏置引导搜索方向（高或低magic），从而在电路设计中控制量子资源。
contributions: 首次提出magic-informed QAS技术，将量子资源控制引入电路设计框架。
利用GNN估计magic并作为搜索偏置，在基态能量和量子态近似问题上均提升解质量。
analysis.experiments: 在结构化基态能量问题和一般量子态近似问题上进行基准测试，涵盖不同规模和目标magic水平，结果显示该方法有效影响搜索树和最终电路的magic，且GNN在分布外实例上仍有效。
limitations: magic偏置可能约束搜索动态，但实验中观察到解质量一致提升。
GNN的magic估计精度可能影响搜索效果，摘要未讨论其局限性。
