analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种受量子魔法（magic）启发的量子架构搜索方法，利用图神经网络估计魔法量并引导搜索，在基态能量和量子态近似问题上均取得改进。

papers.title: PHALAR: Phasors for Learned Musical Audio Representations
papers.abstract: Stem retrieval, the task of matching missing stems to a given audio submix, is a key challenge currently limited by models that discard temporal information. We introduce PHALAR, a contrastive framework achieving a relative accuracy increase of up to $\approx 70\%$ over the state-of-the-art while requiring $<50\%$ of the parameters and a 7$\times$ training speedup. By utilizing a Learned Spectral Pooling layer and a complex-valued head, PHALAR enforces pitch-equivariant and phase-equivariant biases. PHALAR establishes new retrieval state-of-the-art across MoisesDB, Slakh, and ChocoChorales, correlating significantly higher with human coherence judgment than semantic baselines. Finally, zero-shot beat tracking and linear chord probing confirm that PHALAR captures robust musical structures beyond the retrieval task.

analysis.tldr: PHALAR 通过复数值头和谱池化层实现音高/相位等变，在音轨检索任务上以更少参数和更快训练取得显著提升。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有音轨检索模型丢弃了时间信息，导致性能受限，且缺乏对音乐结构（如音高、相位）的显式建模。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个轻量、高效的对比学习框架，在音轨检索中同时保持时间信息并引入音高/相位等变偏置。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 PHALAR 框架，包含 Learned Spectral Pooling 层和复数值头，通过对比学习强制模型学习音高等变和相位等变表征。
contributions: 提出 PHALAR 框架，在音轨检索任务上相对准确率提升约 70%，参数减少 50% 以上，训练速度提升 7 倍。
在 MoisesDB、Slakh、ChocoChorales 三个数据集上达到新的 SOTA，且与人类一致性判断的相关性显著高于语义基线。
零样本节拍跟踪和线性和弦探测实验表明 PHALAR 捕获了超越检索任务的鲁棒音乐结构。
analysis.experiments: 在 MoisesDB、Slakh、ChocoChorales 数据集上评估音轨检索性能，并进行了零样本节拍跟踪和线性和弦探测实验。
limitations: 可能仅适用于音乐音频领域，泛化到其他音频任务需验证。
复数值头可能增加实现复杂度。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性高（复数值头+谱池化），性能提升显著，但应用领域较窄，适合相关方向读者精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: PHALAR 通过复数值头和谱池化层实现音高/相位等变，在音轨检索任务上以更少参数和更快训练取得显著提升。

papers.title: StateVLM: A State-Aware Vision-Language Model for Robotic Affordance Reasoning
papers.abstract: Vision-language models (VLMs) have shown remarkable performance in various robotic tasks, as they can perceive visual information and understand natural language instructions. However, when applied to robotics, VLMs remain subject to a fundamental limitation inherent in large language models (LLMs): they struggle with numerical reasoning, particularly in object detection and object-state localization. To explore numerical reasoning as a regression task in VLMs, we propose a novel training strategy to adapt VLMs for object detection and object-state localization. This approach leverages box decoder outputs to compute an Auxiliary Regression Loss (ARL) during fine-tuning, while preserving standard sequence prediction at inference. We leverage this training strategy to develop StateVLM (State-aware Vision-Language Model), a novel model designed to perceive and learn fine-grained object representations, including precise localization of objects and their states, as well as graspable regions. Due to the lack of a benchmark for object-state affordance reasoning, we introduce an open-source benchmark, Object State Affordance Reasoning (OSAR), which contains 1,172 scenes with 7,746 individual objects and corresponding bounding boxes. Comparative experiments on adapted benchmarks (RefCOCO, RefCOCO+, and \mbox{RefCOCOg}) demonstrate that ARL improves model performance by an average of 1.6\% compared to models without ARL. Experiments on the OSAR benchmark further support this finding, showing that StateVLM with ARL achieves an average of 5.2\% higher performance than models without ARL. In particular, ARL is also important for the complex task of affordance reasoning in OSAR, where it enhances the consistency of model outputs.

analysis.tldr: 提出StateVLM，通过辅助回归损失增强VLM在机器人可操作性推理中的数值定位能力，并开源OSAR基准。
analysis.research_motivation: VLM在机器人任务中表现优异，但继承自LLM的数值推理缺陷导致物体检测和状态定位精度不足，限制了其在精细操作中的应用。
analysis.problem: VLM在物体检测和状态定位中的数值回归能力弱，缺乏针对物体状态可操作性推理的基准。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 在微调时利用框解码器输出计算辅助回归损失（ARL），推理时保持标准序列预测，训练StateVLM以感知细粒度物体表示。
contributions: 提出ARL训练策略，在不改变推理方式下提升VLM的数值回归能力。
构建OSAR基准，包含1172个场景和7746个物体，用于物体状态可操作性推理。
实验证明ARL在RefCOCO系列和OSAR上分别提升1.6%和5.2%的性能。
analysis.experiments: 在RefCOCO、RefCOCO+、RefCOCOg和OSAR基准上对比有无ARL的模型，ARL平均提升1.6%和5.2%。
limitations: ARL依赖框解码器输出，可能不适用于无框解码器的VLM架构。
OSAR基准规模较小（1172场景），泛化性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.reason: 方法创新性中等，实验验证有效，但基准规模有限，推荐阅读摘要。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出StateVLM，通过辅助回归损失增强VLM在机器人可操作性推理中的数值定位能力，并开源OSAR基准。

papers.title: Robustness and Transferability of Pix2Geomodel for Bidirectional Facies Property Translation in a Complex Reservoir
papers.abstract: Reservoir geomodeling is central to subsurface characterization, but it remains challenging because conditioning data are sparse, geological heterogeneity is strong, and conventional geostatistical workflows often struggle to capture nonlinear relationships between facies and petrophysical properties. This study evaluates the robustness and transferability of Pix2Geomodel on a different and more complex reservoir dataset with reduced vertical support. The new case includes a heterogeneous reservoir-quality classification and only 54 retained layers, providing a stricter test of whether Pix2Pix-based image-to-image translation can preserve facies-property relationships under constrained data conditions. Facies, porosity, permeability, and clay volume (VCL) were extracted from a reference reservoir model, exported as aligned two-dimensional slices, augmented using consistent geometric transformations, and assembled into paired image datasets. Six bidirectional tasks were evaluated: facies to porosity, facies to permeability, facies to VCL, porosity to facies, permeability to facies, and VCL to facies. The Pix2Pix model, consisting of a U-Net generator and PatchGAN discriminator, was evaluated using image-based metrics, visual comparison, and variogram-based spatial-continuity validation. Results show that the model preserves the dominant geological architecture and main spatial-continuity trends. Facies to porosity achieved the highest pixel accuracy and frequency-weighted intersection over union of 0.9326 and 0.8807, while VCL to facies achieved the highest mean pixel accuracy and mean intersection over union of 0.8506 and 0.7049. These findings show that Pix2Geomodel can transfer beyond its original case study as a practical framework for rapid bidirectional facies-property translation in complex reservoir modeling.

analysis.tldr: Pix2Geomodel在复杂油藏中实现了双向岩相-属性翻译，并验证了其鲁棒性和可迁移性。
analysis.research_motivation: 油藏地质建模中，条件数据稀疏、地质异质性强，传统地质统计方法难以捕捉岩相与岩石物理属性之间的非线性关系，亟需高效且可迁移的建模方法。
analysis.problem: 评估基于Pix2Pix的图像到图像翻译模型Pix2Geomodel在更复杂、数据受限的油藏数据集上的鲁棒性和可迁移性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 使用Pix2Pix模型（U-Net生成器+PatchGAN判别器），将岩相、孔隙度、渗透率、粘土体积等属性提取为对齐的二维切片，通过几何变换增强数据，构建配对图像数据集，执行六种双向翻译任务。
contributions: 验证了Pix2Geomodel在更复杂油藏数据集上的鲁棒性和可迁移性。
展示了双向岩相-属性翻译的可行性，并提供了定量评估指标。
analysis.experiments: 在复杂油藏数据集上评估了六种双向翻译任务，使用像素精度、频率加权IoU、平均像素精度和平均IoU等指标，并进行了视觉比较和变差函数空间连续性验证。
limitations: 仅针对特定油藏数据集，泛化性需进一步验证。
未讨论模型在极端稀疏数据或不同地质环境下的表现。

papers.title: Atomic Fact-Checking Increases Clinician Trust in Large Language Model Recommendations for Oncology Decision Support: A Randomized Controlled Trial
papers.abstract: Question: Does atomic fact-checking, which decomposes AI treatment recommendations into individually verifiable claims linked to source guideline documents, increase clinician trust compared to traditional explainability approaches? Findings: In this randomized trial of 356 clinicians generating 7,476 trust ratings, atomic fact-checking produced a large effect on trust (Cohen's d = 0.94), increasing the proportion of clinicians expressing trust from 26.9% to 66.5%. Traditional transparency mechanisms showed a dose-response gradient of improvement over baseline (d = 0.25 to 0.50). Meaning: Decomposing AI recommendations into individually verifiable claims linked to source guidelines produces substantially higher clinician trust than traditional explainability approaches in high-stakes clinical decisions.

analysis.tldr: 原子事实核查通过将AI建议分解为可验证声明，显著提升临床医生对肿瘤治疗推荐的信任度。
analysis.research_motivation: 在肿瘤决策支持等高风险场景中，临床医生对大型语言模型（LLM）推荐的信任不足，传统可解释性方法效果有限，亟需更有效的信任增强机制。
analysis.problem: 如何通过原子事实核查方法提升临床医生对LLM治疗推荐的信任度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 传统透明度机制（如基线解释）对信任的提升效果有限（Cohen's d = 0.25-0.50），而原子事实核查产生大效应（d = 0.94），信任比例从26.9%升至66.5%。
analysis.method: 将AI治疗推荐分解为原子声明，每个声明链接到源指南文档，供临床医生逐条验证。
contributions: 提出原子事实核查方法，通过分解推荐为可验证声明并链接源文档来增强可解释性。
通过随机对照试验（356名临床医生，7476次信任评级）证明该方法显著提升信任度，效应量较大。
analysis.experiments: 随机对照试验，356名临床医生生成7476次信任评级，比较原子事实核查与传统透明度机制（基线、剂量反应梯度）对信任的影响。
limitations: 摘要未提及方法在不同疾病或非肿瘤场景的泛化性。
未讨论原子事实核查的计算成本或实现复杂度。

papers.title: Task-Aware Scanning Parameter Configuration for Robotic Inspection Using Vision Language Embeddings and Hyperdimensional Computing
papers.abstract: Robotic laser profiling is widely used for dimensional verification and surface inspection, yet measurement fidelity is often dominated by sensor configuration rather than robot motion. Industrial profilers expose multiple coupled parameters, including sampling frequency, measurement range, exposure time, receiver dynamic range, and illumination, that are still tuned by trial-and-error; mismatches can cause saturation, clipping, or missing returns that cannot be recovered downstream. We formulate instruction-conditioned sensing parameter recommendation; given a pre-scan RGB observation and a natural-language inspection instruction, infer a discrete configuration over key parameters of a robot-mounted profiler. To benchmark this problem, we develop Instruct-Obs2Param, a real-world multimodal dataset linking inspection intents and multi-view pose and illumination variation across 16 objects to canonical parameter regimes. We then propose ScanHD, a hyperdimensional computing framework that binds instruction and observation into a task-aware code and performs parameter-wise associative reasoning with compact memories, matching discrete scanner regimes while yielding stable, interpretable, low-latency decisions. On Instruct-Obs2Param, ScanHD achieves 92.7% average exact accuracy and 98.1% average Win@1 accuracy across the five parameters, with strong cross-split generalization and low-latency inference suitable for deployment, outperforming rule-based heuristics, conventional multimodal models, and multimodal large language models. This work enables autonomous, instruction-conditioned sensing configuration from task intent and scene context, eliminating manual tuning and elevating sensor configuration from a static setting to an adaptive decision variable.

analysis.tldr: 提出ScanHD框架，利用超维计算和视觉-语言嵌入实现机器人检测中传感器参数的自动配置，在Instruct-Obs2Param数据集上达到92.7%精确匹配准确率。
analysis.research_motivation: 工业激光轮廓仪的传感器参数（如采样频率、曝光时间等）通常依赖人工试错调整，参数不匹配会导致数据饱和、截断或缺失，影响测量精度，且无法在下游恢复。
analysis.problem: 如何根据预扫描RGB图像和自然语言检测指令，自动推断机器人轮廓仪的关键参数配置，避免人工调参。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出ScanHD框架，使用超维计算将指令和观测绑定为任务感知编码，并通过紧凑记忆进行参数关联推理，实现离散参数配置的稳定、可解释、低延迟决策。
contributions: 构建了Instruct-Obs2Param数据集，包含16个物体、多视角姿态和光照变化，关联检测意图与参数配置。
提出ScanHD方法，在参数配置任务上达到92.7%精确匹配准确率和98.1% Win@1准确率，优于规则基线、传统多模态模型和多模态大语言模型。
analysis.experiments: 在Instruct-Obs2Param数据集上评估，ScanHD在五个参数上平均精确匹配准确率92.7%，Win@1准确率98.1%，并展示了跨分割泛化能力和低延迟推理。
limitations: 数据集规模有限（16个物体），可能限制泛化性。
方法仅针对离散参数配置，连续参数场景未涉及。

papers.title: Steer Like the LLM: Activation Steering that Mimics Prompting
papers.abstract: Large language models can be steered at inference time through prompting or activation interventions, but activation steering methods often underperform compared to prompt-based approaches. We propose a framework that formulates prompt steering as a form of activation steering and investigates whether distilling successful prompt steering behavior into simpler, interpretable models can close this gap. Our analysis reveals that popular activation steering methods are not faithful to the mechanics of prompt steering, which applies strong interventions on some tokens while barely affecting others. Based on these insights, we introduce Prompt Steering Replacement (PSR) models that estimate token-specific steering coefficients from the activations themselves and are trained to imitate prompt-based interventions. Experiments on three steering benchmarks across multiple language models show that PSR models outperform existing activation steering methods, especially when controlling for high-coherence completions, and also compare favorably to prompting on AxBench and persona steering.

analysis.tldr: 提出Prompt Steering Replacement (PSR)模型，通过模仿提示干预来弥合激活引导与提示引导之间的性能差距。
analysis.research_motivation: 激活引导方法在推理时通常不如基于提示的引导方法有效，但提示引导需要额外输入且可能不灵活，因此需要更高效且可解释的替代方案。
analysis.problem: 现有激活引导方法未能忠实模拟提示引导的机制（即对某些token施加强干预而对其他token影响很小），导致性能差距。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 分析发现流行激活引导方法不忠实于提示引导的机制：提示引导对某些token施加强干预，而对其他token几乎无影响。
analysis.method: 提出Prompt Steering Replacement (PSR)模型，从激活本身估计token特定的引导系数，并训练以模仿基于提示的干预。
contributions: 揭示了现有激活引导方法与提示引导机制之间的不忠实性。
提出了PSR模型，通过模仿提示干预来提升激活引导性能。
analysis.experiments: 在三个引导基准测试（包括AxBench和persona steering）上，PSR模型优于现有激活引导方法，尤其在控制高连贯性生成时，且与提示引导相比具有竞争力。
limitations: 可能依赖特定模型架构，泛化性需进一步验证。
训练过程需要提示引导数据，可能增加计算成本。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations

analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Prompt Steering Replacement (PSR)模型，通过模仿提示干预来弥合激活引导与提示引导之间的性能差距。

papers.title: Contextual Multi-Objective Optimization: Rethinking Objectives in Frontier AI Systems
papers.abstract: Frontier AI systems perform best in settings with clear, stable, and verifiable objectives, such as code generation, mathematical reasoning, games, and unit-test-driven tasks. They remain less reliable in open-ended settings, including scientific assistance, long-horizon agents, high-stakes advice, personalization, and tool use, where the relevant objective is ambiguous, context-dependent, delayed, or only partially observable. We argue that many such failures are not merely failures of scale or capability, but failures of objective selection: the system optimizes a locally visible signal while missing which objectives should govern the interaction. We formulate this problem as \emph{contextual multi-objective optimization}. In this setting, systems must consider multiple, context-dependent objectives, such as helpfulness, truthfulness, safety, privacy, calibration, non-manipulation, user preference, reversibility, and stakeholder impact, while determining which objectives are active, which are soft preferences, and which must function as hard or quasi-hard constraints. These examples are not intended as an exhaustive taxonomy: different domains and deployment settings may activate different objective dimensions and different conflict-resolution procedures. Our framework models AI behavior as a context-dependent choice rule over candidate actions, objective estimates, active constraints, stakeholders, uncertainty, and conflict-resolution procedures. We outline an implementation pathway based on decomposed objective representations, context-to-objective routing, hierarchical constraints, deliberative policy reasoning, controlled personalization, tool-use control, diagnostic evaluation, auditing, and post-deployment revision.

analysis.tldr: 提出上下文多目标优化框架，将前沿AI系统在开放场景中的失败归因于目标选择错误而非能力不足。
analysis.research_motivation: 前沿AI系统在目标明确的任务（如代码生成）中表现优异，但在开放场景（如科学助手、长期智能体）中可靠性不足，现有方法多归因于规模或能力限制，忽视了目标选择这一根本问题。
analysis.problem: 如何形式化并解决AI系统在上下文依赖、部分可观测、延迟反馈的开放场景中，需要同时考虑多个冲突目标（如帮助性、安全性、隐私等）并动态确定其优先级与约束类型的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，AI系统在开放场景中的失败模式并非能力不足，而是优化了局部可见信号而忽略了真正应指导交互的目标，即目标选择失败。
analysis.method: 提出上下文多目标优化框架，将AI行为建模为上下文相关的选择规则，涵盖候选动作、目标估计、活跃约束、利益相关者、不确定性和冲突解决程序；实现路径包括分解式目标表示、上下文到目标路由、分层约束、审慎策略推理、受控个性化、工具使用控制、诊断评估、审计和部署后修订。
contributions: 提出上下文多目标优化问题，将AI系统在开放场景中的失败重新定义为目标选择失败。
给出一个形式化框架和实现路径，用于设计能动态权衡多个上下文相关目标的AI系统。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 框架目前是概念性的，缺乏实证验证。
目标维度和冲突解决程序可能因领域而异，需要进一步具体化。

analysis.reason: 概念新颖，重新定义问题，但缺乏实验验证，适合关注AI安全对齐的研究者阅读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出上下文多目标优化框架，将前沿AI系统在开放场景中的失败归因于目标选择错误而非能力不足。

papers.title: Awaking Spatial Intelligence in Unified Multimodal Understanding and Generation
papers.abstract: We present JoyAI-Image, a unified multimodal foundation model for visual understanding, text-to-image generation, and instruction-guided image editing. JoyAI-Image couples a spatially enhanced Multimodal Large Language Model (MLLM) with a Multimodal Diffusion Transformer (MMDiT), allowing perception and generation to interact through a shared multimodal interface. Around this architecture, we build a scalable training recipe that combines unified instruction tuning, long-text rendering supervision, spatially grounded data, and both general and spatial editing signals. This design gives the model broad multimodal capability while strengthening geometry-aware reasoning and controllable visual synthesis. Experiments across understanding, generation, long-text rendering, and editing benchmarks show that JoyAI-Image achieves state-of-the-art or highly competitive performance. More importantly, the bidirectional loop between enhanced understanding, controllable spatial editing, and novel-view-assisted reasoning enables the model to move beyond general visual competence toward stronger spatial intelligence. These results suggest a promising path for unified visual models in downstream applications such as vision-language-action systems and world models.

analysis.tldr: JoyAI-Image 通过耦合空间增强 MLLM 与 MMDiT，在统一多模态理解与生成中实现空间智能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有统一视觉模型在空间感知和可控生成方面存在不足，难以支持需要几何推理的下游应用。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个既能理解视觉内容又能生成和编辑图像，同时具备空间智能的统一多模态模型。

analysis.method: 耦合空间增强的多模态大语言模型（MLLM）与多模态扩散Transformer（MMDiT），通过共享多模态接口实现感知与生成交互，并采用统一指令微调、长文本渲染监督、空间接地数据和编辑信号的可扩展训练方案。
contributions: 提出 JoyAI-Image，一个统一的多模态基础模型，支持视觉理解、文本到图像生成和指令引导图像编辑。
设计空间增强的 MLLM 与 MMDiT 耦合架构，实现感知与生成的双向交互。
构建可扩展的训练方案，融合多种数据信号，提升空间感知和可控生成能力。
analysis.experiments: 在理解、生成、长文本渲染和编辑基准上达到 SOTA 或极具竞争力的性能。
limitations: 摘要未提及模型在极端复杂场景下的泛化能力。

analysis.one_sentence_summary: JoyAI-Image 通过耦合空间增强 MLLM 与 MMDiT，在统一多模态理解与生成中实现空间智能。

papers.title: A Robust Out-of-Distribution Detection Framework via Synergistic Smoothing
papers.abstract: Reliable out-of-distribution (OOD) detection is a critical requirement for the safe deployment of machine learning systems. Despite recent progress, state-of-the-art OOD detectors are highly susceptible to adversarial attacks, which undermines their trustworthiness in automated systems. To address this vulnerability, we apply median smoothing to baseline OOD detection scores, balancing clean and adversarial accuracies. Our key insight is that the noisy samples generated for median smoothing can be repurposed to quantify the local instability of the base score. We observe that OOD samples exhibit higher instability under perturbation. Based on this, we propose ROSS, a novel and robust post-hoc OOD detector that leverages the instability of baseline scores to further distinguish between in-distribution (ID) and OOD samples. ROSS achieves symmetric robustness, performing strongly against both score-minimising and score-maximising attacks, unlike prior work. This symmetric defence leads to state-of-the-art robustness, outperforming prior methods by up to 40 AUROC points. We demonstrate ROSS's effectiveness on extensive experiments across CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100, and ImageNet. Code is available at: https://github.com/Abdu-Hekal/ROSS.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种基于中值平滑和局部不稳定性量化的鲁棒OOD检测方法，在对抗攻击下性能显著提升。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有OOD检测器在对抗攻击下脆弱，威胁系统安全性，需要鲁棒的检测方法。
analysis.problem: 如何设计对对抗攻击（包括分数最小化和最大化攻击）具有对称鲁棒性的OOD检测方法。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: OOD样本在扰动下表现出更高的局部不稳定性，可用于区分ID和OOD。
analysis.method: 对基线OOD检测分数应用中值平滑，并利用平滑过程中生成的噪声样本量化局部不稳定性，提出ROSS检测器。
contributions: 提出一种基于中值平滑和局部不稳定性量化的鲁棒OOD检测框架ROSS
实现对称鲁棒性，同时抵御分数最小化和最大化攻击，在多个基准上达到SOTA
analysis.experiments: 在CIFAR-10、CIFAR-100和ImageNet上进行实验，ROSS在对抗鲁棒性上优于先前方法最多40 AUROC点。
limitations: 可能依赖基线检测器的质量
中值平滑的计算开销可能较大

papers.title: Raising the Ceiling: Better Empirical Fixation Densities for Saliency Benchmarking
papers.abstract: Empirical fixation densities, spatial distributions estimated from human eye-tracking data, are foundational to saliency benchmarking. They directly shape benchmark conclusions, leaderboard rankings, failure case analyses, and scientific claims about human visual behavior. Yet the standard estimation method, fixed-bandwidth isotropic Gaussian KDE, has gone essentially unchanged for decades. This matters now more than ever: as the field shifts toward sample-level evaluation (failure case analysis, inverse benchmarking, per-image model comparison), reliable per-image density estimates become critical. We propose a principled mixture model that combines an adaptive-bandwidth KDE based on Abramson's method, center bias and uniform components, and a state-of-the-art saliency model, to capture different spatial and semantic types of interobserver consistency, and optimize all parameters per image via leave-one-subject-out cross-validation. Our method yields substantially higher interobserver consistency estimates across multiple benchmarks, with median per-image gains of 5-15% in log-likelihood and up to 2 percentage points in AUC. For the most affected images -- precisely those most relevant to failure case analysis -- improvements exceed 25%. We leverage these improved estimates to identify and analyze remaining failure cases of state-of-the-art saliency models, demonstrating that significant headroom for model improvement remains. More broadly, our findings highlight that empirical fixation densities should not be treated as fixed ground truths but as evolving estimates that improve with better methodology.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种自适应带宽混合核密度估计方法，显著提升显著性基准测试中注视密度估计的准确性和可靠性。
analysis.research_motivation: 注视密度估计是显著性基准测试的基础，但标准方法（固定带宽各向同性高斯KDE）数十年来未变，在样本级评估（如失败案例分析）中可靠性不足。
analysis.problem: 现有注视密度估计方法精度有限，影响基准测试结论和模型比较的可靠性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 标准KDE方法在估计注视密度时存在偏差，尤其对失败案例分析相关的图像影响更大；改进后的估计能揭示现有模型仍有显著改进空间。
analysis.method: 提出一种混合模型，结合基于Abramson方法的自适应带宽KDE、中心偏置、均匀分量和先进显著性模型，并通过留一受试者交叉验证逐图像优化参数。
contributions: 提出一种新的注视密度估计混合模型，显著提高估计的准确性。
在多个基准上验证了改进，并利用改进的估计分析了现有模型的失败案例。
analysis.experiments: 在多个基准上，中位每图像对数似然提升5-15%，AUC提升最多2个百分点；受影响最大的图像改进超过25%。
limitations: 方法依赖留一受试者交叉验证，计算成本较高。
改进效果可能受数据集和显著性模型选择影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新且实验充分，对显著性基准测试有重要改进，但属于特定领域方法。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种自适应带宽混合核密度估计方法，显著提升显著性基准测试中注视密度估计的准确性和可靠性。

papers.title: QKVShare: Quantized KV-Cache Handoff for Multi-Agent On-Device LLMs
papers.abstract: Multi-agent LLM systems on edge devices need to hand off latent context efficiently, but the practical choices today are expensive re-prefill or full-precision KV transfer. We study QKVShare, a framework for quantized KV-cache handoff between agents that combines token-level mixed-precision allocation, a self-contained CacheCard representation, and a HuggingFace-compatible cache injection path. Our current results support a narrower but clearer story than the original draft: on 150 GSM8K problems with Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct, adaptive quantization remains competitive under repeated handoff and shows its clearest gains against uniform quantization in deeper-hop, higher budget settings; for handoff latency, the QKVShare path reduces TTFT relative to full re prefill at every tested context, from 130.7 ms vs. 150.2 ms at nominal 1K context to 397.1 ms vs. 1029.7 ms at nominal 8K context;. Stage timing shows that post-injection generation, not card creation, dominates the current QKVShare latency path. These results position quantized KV handoff as a promising on-device systems direction while also highlighting the need for stronger controller ablations and apples-to-apples runtime comparisons.

analysis.tldr: 提出QKVShare框架，通过量化KV缓存传递实现多智能体端侧LLM高效上下文切换，在GSM8K任务上验证了延迟优势。
analysis.research_motivation: 多智能体LLM系统在边缘设备上需要高效传递潜在上下文，但现有方法要么重新预填充（昂贵），要么全精度KV传输（带宽高），缺乏轻量级解决方案。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种量化KV缓存传递机制，在端侧多智能体LLM间实现低延迟、低带宽的上下文切换。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 自适应量化在深层跳数和高预算设置下优势明显；后注入生成阶段主导延迟，而非缓存卡创建；量化KV传递在延迟上优于全重新预填充。
analysis.method: 提出QKVShare框架，包含token级混合精度分配、自包含CacheCard表示和兼容HuggingFace的缓存注入路径。
contributions: 提出量化KV缓存传递框架QKVShare，支持token级混合精度分配和自包含CacheCard表示。
在GSM8K任务上验证了自适应量化在重复传递下的竞争力，并展示了延迟优势（TTFT降低）。
analysis.experiments: 在150个GSM8K问题上使用Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct模型，比较自适应量化与均匀量化在不同跳数和预算下的性能，并测量TTFT延迟。
limitations: 实验规模较小（仅150个问题），可能不足以泛化。
缺乏更强的控制器消融实验和公平的运行时比较。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 针对端侧多智能体LLM的量化KV传递问题，方法有创新但实验规模有限，适合关注效率与压缩的读者。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出QKVShare框架，通过量化KV缓存传递实现多智能体端侧LLM高效上下文切换，在GSM8K任务上验证了延迟优势。

papers.title: Deco: Extending Personal Physical Objects into Pervasive AI Companion through a Dual-Embodiment Framework
papers.abstract: Individuals frequently form deep attachments to physical objects (e.g., plush toys) that usually cannot sense or respond to their emotions. While AI companions offer responsiveness and personalization, they exist independently of these physical objects and lack an ongoing connection to them. To bridge this gap, we conducted a formative study (N=9) to explore how digital agents could inherit and extend the emotional bond, deriving four design principles (Faithful Identity, Calibrated Agency, Ambient Presence, and Reciprocal Memory). We then present the Dual-Embodiment Companion Framework, instantiated as Deco, a mobile system integrating multimodal Large Language Models (LLMs) and Augmented Reality to create synchronized digital embodiments of users' physical companions. A within-subjects study (N=25) showed Deco significantly outperformed a personalized LLM-empowered digital companion baseline on perceived companionship, emotional bond, and design-principle scales (all p<0.01). A seven-day field deployment (N=17) showed sustained engagement, subjective well-being improvement (p=.040), and three key relational patterns: digital activities retroactively vitalized physical objects, bond deepening was driven by emotional engagement depth rather than interaction frequency, and users sustained bonds while actively navigating digital companions' AI nature. This work highlights a promising alternative for designing digital companions: moving from creating new relationships to dual embodiment, where digital agents seamlessly extend the emotional history of physical objects.

analysis.tldr: 提出双具身框架Deco，将个人物理对象扩展为AI伴侣，通过多模态LLM和AR实现数字与物理同步，显著提升陪伴感和情感联结。
analysis.research_motivation: 人们常对物理对象（如毛绒玩具）产生深厚情感，但这些对象无法感知或回应情绪；现有AI伴侣虽具响应性和个性化，却独立于物理对象，缺乏持续情感连接。
analysis.problem: 如何让数字代理继承并扩展用户与物理对象之间的情感纽带，实现无缝的双具身陪伴。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析，但通过用户研究揭示了三种关系模式：数字活动反向激活物理对象、情感投入深度（而非互动频率）驱动纽带加深、用户主动管理数字伴侣的AI本质。
analysis.method: 提出双具身伴侣框架Deco，集成多模态大语言模型（LLMs）和增强现实（AR），创建用户物理伴侣的同步数字具身。
contributions: 通过形成性研究（N=9）提炼出四个设计原则：忠实身份、校准代理、环境存在、互惠记忆。
实现Deco系统，在受试者内研究（N=25）中显著优于个性化LLM数字伴侣基线。
七天实地部署（N=17）显示持续参与、主观幸福感提升，并揭示三种关键关系模式。
analysis.experiments: 进行了三项实验：形成性研究（N=9）提炼设计原则；受试者内研究（N=25）对比基线，在陪伴感、情感纽带和设计原则量表上均显著优于（p<0.01）；七天实地部署（N=17）显示幸福感提升（p=.040）及关系模式。
limitations: 样本量较小（N=9, 25, 17），可能限制泛化性。
长期效果和不同文化背景下的适用性未探讨。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新（双具身框架）且实验充分，与VLM/MLLM应用相关，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出双具身框架Deco，将个人物理对象扩展为AI伴侣，通过多模态LLM和AR实现数字与物理同步，显著提升陪伴感和情感联结。

papers.title: DMGD: Train-Free Dataset Distillation with Semantic-Distribution Matching in Diffusion Models
papers.abstract: Dataset distillation enables efficient training by distilling the information of large-scale datasets into significantly smaller synthetic datasets. Diffusion based paradigms have emerged in recent years, offering novel perspectives for dataset distillation. However, they typically necessitate additional fine-tuning stages, and effective guidance mechanisms remain underexplored. To address these limitations, we rethink diffusion based dataset distillation and propose a Dual Matching Guided Diffusion (DMGD) framework, centered on efficient training-free guidance. We first establish Semantic Matching via conditional likelihood optimization, eliminating the need for auxiliary classifiers. Furthermore, we propose a dynamic guidance mechanism that enhances the diversity of synthetic data while maintaining semantic alignment. Simultaneously, we introduce an optimal transport (OT) based Distribution Matching approach to further align with the target distribution structure. To ensure efficiency, we develop two enhanced strategies for diffusion based framework: Distribution Approximate Matching and Greedy Progressive Matching. These strategies enable effective distribution matching guidance with minimal computational overhead. Experimental results on ImageNet-Woof, ImageNet-Nette, and ImageNet-1K demonstrate that our training-free approach achieves significant improvements, outperforming state-of-the-art (SOTA) methods requiring additional fine-tuning by average accuracy gains of 2.1%, 5.4%, and 2.4%, respectively.

analysis.tldr: 提出无需额外微调的双匹配引导扩散框架，通过语义匹配和最优传输分布匹配实现高效数据集蒸馏。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基于扩散的数据集蒸馏方法通常需要额外的微调阶段，且缺乏有效的引导机制，导致效率低下。
analysis.problem: 如何在不进行额外微调的情况下，利用扩散模型生成高质量的小型合成数据集，同时保持语义一致性和分布结构。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出双匹配引导扩散（DMGD）框架，包括基于条件似然优化的语义匹配（无需辅助分类器）、动态引导机制增强多样性、基于最优传输的分布匹配，以及两种高效策略（分布近似匹配和贪婪渐进匹配）。
contributions: 提出无需训练的双匹配引导扩散框架，实现高效数据集蒸馏。
引入语义匹配和最优传输分布匹配，提升合成数据质量。
设计两种增强策略（分布近似匹配和贪婪渐进匹配）降低计算开销。
analysis.experiments: 在ImageNet-Woof、ImageNet-Nette和ImageNet-1K上，无需微调的方法分别比需要额外微调的SOTA方法平均准确率提升2.1%、5.4%和2.4%。
limitations: 可能仅适用于图像数据集，未验证其他模态。
动态引导机制的计算开销可能随数据集规模增大而增加。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.reason: 方法创新且实验效果显著，与扩散模型和数据集蒸馏方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出无需额外微调的双匹配引导扩散框架，通过语义匹配和最优传输分布匹配实现高效数据集蒸馏。

papers.title: Spatiotemporal Convolutions on EEG signal -- A Representation Learning Perspective on Efficient and Explainable EEG Classification with Convolutional Neural Nets
papers.abstract: Classification of EEG signals using shallow Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) is a prevalent and successful approach across a variety of fields. Most of these models use independent one-dimensional (1D) convolutional layers along the spatial and temporal dimensions, which are concatenated without a non-linear activation layer between. In this paper, we investigate an alternative encoding that operates a bi-dimensional (2D) spatiotemporal convolution. While 2D convolutions are numerically identical to two concatenated 1D convolutions along the two dimensions, the impact on learning is still uncertain. We test 1D and 2D CNNs and a CNN+transformer hybrid model in a low-dimensional (3-channel) and a high-dimensional (22-channel) BCI motor imagery classification task. We observe that 2D convolutions significantly reduce training time in high-dimensional tasks while maintaining performance. We investigate the root of this improvement and find no difference in spectral feature importance. However, a clear pattern emerges in representational similarity across models: 1D and 2D models yield vastly different representational geometries. Overall, we suggest an improved model with a 2D convolutional layer for faster training and inference. We also highlight the importance of architecturally-driven encoding when processing complex multivariate signals, as reflected in internal representations rather than purely in performance metrics.

analysis.tldr: 将EEG信号中的时空卷积从1D改为2D可显著加速高维任务训练，且保持性能，但内部表征几何完全不同。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有EEG分类常用浅层CNN，大多采用独立1D卷积沿空间和时间维度串联，缺乏非线性激活层，这种架构对学习的影响尚不明确，且高维任务训练效率有待提升。
analysis.problem: 探究EEG分类中2D时空卷积与1D串联卷积在学习效率、性能和内部表征上的差异。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 2D卷积在高维任务中显著减少训练时间且性能不变；1D和2D模型在谱特征重要性上无差异，但表征相似性分析显示两者内部表征几何完全不同。
analysis.method: 对比1D CNN、2D CNN和CNN+Transformer混合模型，在低维（3通道）和高维（22通道）BCI运动想象分类任务上进行实验，并通过表征相似性分析探究内部表征差异。
contributions: 发现2D时空卷积在高维EEG任务中能显著加速训练和推理，同时保持分类性能。
揭示1D和2D卷积模型在内部表征几何上存在本质差异，强调架构驱动的编码对复杂多变量信号处理的重要性。
analysis.experiments: 在低维（3通道）和高维（22通道）BCI运动想象分类任务上测试1D CNN、2D CNN和CNN+Transformer混合模型，评估训练时间、分类性能，并进行谱特征重要性和表征相似性分析。
limitations: 仅针对运动想象分类任务，其他EEG任务或模态的泛化性未知。
未深入探讨2D卷积加速的理论原因，仅从表征角度分析。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新中等，实验较充分，但仅针对EEG特定任务，影响范围有限。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 将EEG信号中的时空卷积从1D改为2D可显著加速高维任务训练，且保持性能，但内部表征几何完全不同。

papers.title: EvoLM: Self-Evolving Language Models through Co-Evolved Discriminative Rubrics
papers.abstract: Language models encode substantial evaluative knowledge from pretraining, yet current post-training methods rely on external supervision (human annotations, proprietary models, or scalar reward models) to produce reward signals. Each imposes a ceiling. Human judgment cannot supervise capabilities beyond its own, proprietary APIs create dependencies, and verifiable rewards cover only domains with ground-truth answers. Self-improvement from a model's own evaluative capacity is a reward source that scales with the model itself, yet remains largely untapped by current methods. We introduce EVOLM, a post-training method that structures this capacity into explicit discriminative rubrics and uses them as training signal. EVOLM trains two capabilities within a single language model in alternation: (1) a rubric generator producing instance-specific evaluation criteria optimized for discriminative utility, which maximizes a small frozen judge's ability to distinguish preferred from dispreferred responses; and (2) a policy trained using those rubric-conditioned scores as reward. All preference signals are constructed from the policy's own outputs via temporal contrast with earlier checkpoints, requiring no human annotation or external supervision. EVOLM trains a Qwen3-8B model to generate rubrics that outperform GPT-4.1 on RewardBench-2 by 25.7%. The co-trained policy achieves 69.3% average on the OLMo3-Adapt suite, outperforming policies trained with GPT-4.1 prompted rubrics by 3.9% and with the state-of-the-art 8B reward model SkyWork-RM by 16%. Overall, EVOLM demonstrates that structuring a model's evaluative capacity into co-evolving discriminative rubrics enables self-improvement without external supervision.

analysis.tldr: 提出EVOLM方法，通过自演化判别性评分标准实现语言模型的无外部监督自我提升。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有后训练方法依赖外部监督（人类标注、专有模型或标量奖励模型），这些方法存在天花板效应，如人类无法监督超出自身能力范围的任务、专有API产生依赖、可验证奖励仅覆盖有标准答案的领域。利用模型自身的评估能力进行自我改进是一种可随模型规模扩展的奖励来源，但当前方法尚未充分利用。
analysis.problem: 如何让语言模型利用自身评估能力进行自我改进，而不依赖任何外部监督信号。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体的现象分析或失败模式。
analysis.method: EVOLM在单个语言模型内交替训练两种能力：1）评分标准生成器，生成实例特定的评估标准，优化判别效用以最大化小型冻结评判模型区分偏好与非偏好响应的能力；2）策略模型，使用基于评分标准的分数作为奖励进行训练。所有偏好信号通过时间对比（与早期检查点对比）从策略自身输出构建，无需人类标注或外部监督。
contributions: 提出EVOLM方法，将语言模型的评估能力结构化为可演化的判别性评分标准，实现无外部监督的自我改进。
在RewardBench-2上，Qwen3-8B生成的评分标准超越GPT-4.1达25.7%；在OLMo3-Adapt套件上，联合训练的策略平均得分69.3%，优于使用GPT-4.1提示评分标准训练的策略3.9%，优于最先进的8B奖励模型SkyWork-RM 16%。
analysis.experiments: 在RewardBench-2和OLMo3-Adapt套件上进行实验，评估评分标准质量和策略性能。
limitations: 方法依赖于时间对比构建偏好信号，可能受检查点选择影响。
仅验证了8B模型规模，更大规模模型上的效果未知。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 方法新颖，实验效果显著，与LLM后训练和对齐方向高度相关，值得精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出EVOLM方法，通过自演化判别性评分标准实现语言模型的无外部监督自我提升。

papers.title: Quantifying the human visual exposome with vision language models
papers.abstract: The visual environment is a fundamental yet unquantified determinant of mental health. While the concept of the environmental exposome is well established, current methods rely on coarse geospatial proxies or biased self reports, failing to capture the first person visual context of daily life. We addressed this gap by coupling ecological momentary assessment with vision language models (VLMs) to quantify the semantic richness of human visual experience. Across 2674 participant generated photographs, VLM derived estimates of greenness robustly predicted momentary affect and chronic stress, consistent with established benchmarks. We then developed a semi autonomous large language model (LLM) based pipeline that mined over seven million scientific publications to extract nearly 1000 environmental features empirically linked to mental health. When applied to real world imagery, up to 33 percent of VLM extracted context ratings significantly correlated with affect and stress. These findings establish a scalable objective paradigm for visual exposomics, enabling high throughput decoding of how the visible world is associated with mental health.

analysis.tldr: 利用视觉语言模型量化人类视觉暴露组，揭示视觉环境与心理健康的关联。
analysis.research_motivation: 视觉环境是心理健康的重要决定因素，但现有方法依赖粗粒度地理代理或自我报告，无法捕捉日常生活的第一人称视觉背景。
analysis.problem: 如何客观、可扩展地量化人类日常视觉体验的语义丰富度，并验证其与心理健康的关联。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 结合生态瞬时评估与视觉语言模型（VLM）量化视觉体验，并开发基于LLM的半自动管道从科学文献中提取环境特征。
contributions: 提出视觉暴露组学范式，利用VLM量化人类视觉体验的语义丰富度。
构建基于LLM的管道从超过700万篇科学出版物中提取近1000个与环境心理健康相关的特征。
analysis.experiments: 在2674张参与者拍摄的照片上验证，VLM估计的绿色度可预测瞬时情绪和慢性压力；33%的VLM提取上下文评分与情绪和压力显著相关。
limitations: 样本量有限（2674张照片），可能影响泛化性。
VLM提取的上下文评分与心理健康的因果关系未明确。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法新颖，结合VLM与心理健康，实验验证有效，但技术深度中等。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用视觉语言模型量化人类视觉暴露组，揭示视觉环境与心理健康的关联。

papers.title: Correct Is Not Enough: Training Reasoning Planners with Executor-Grounded Rewards
papers.abstract: Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards has become a common way to improve explicit reasoning in large language models, but final-answer correctness alone does not reveal whether the reasoning trace is faithful, reliable, or useful to the model that consumes it. This outcome-only signal can reinforce traces that are right for the wrong reasons, overstate reasoning gains by rewarding shortcuts, and propagate flawed intermediate states in multi-step systems. To this end, we propose TraceLift, a planner-executor training framework that treats reasoning as a consumable intermediate artifact. During planner training, the planner emits tagged reasoning. A frozen executor turns this reasoning into the final artifact for verifier feedback, while an executor-grounded reward shapes the intermediate trace. This reward multiplies a rubric-based Reasoning Reward Model (RM) score by measured uplift on the same frozen executor, crediting traces that are both high-quality and useful. To make reasoning quality directly learnable, we introduce TRACELIFT-GROUPS, a rubric-annotated reason-only dataset built from math and code seed problems. Each example is a same-problem group containing a high-quality reference trace and multiple plausible flawed traces with localized perturbations that reduce reasoning quality or solution support while preserving task relevance. Extensive experiments on code and math benchmarks show that this executor-grounded reasoning reward improves the two-stage planner-executor system over execution-only training, suggesting that reasoning supervision should evaluate not only whether a trace looks good, but also whether it helps the model that consumes it. Our code is available at: https://github.com/MasaiahHan/TraceLift

analysis.tldr: 提出 TraceLift 框架，通过执行器接地奖励训练推理规划器，使推理轨迹既高质量又有用。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有强化学习仅依赖最终答案正确性作为奖励，无法保证推理轨迹的忠实性和可靠性，可能强化错误推理或鼓励捷径。
analysis.problem: 如何训练语言模型生成既正确又对下游执行器有用的推理轨迹。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 仅使用最终答案正确性作为奖励信号会导致推理轨迹不可靠，可能包含错误推理或捷径，且在多步系统中传播错误中间状态。
analysis.method: 提出 TraceLift 框架，包含规划器和执行器。规划器生成带标签的推理轨迹，冻结的执行器将其转化为最终结果，执行器接地奖励结合基于规则的推理奖励模型分数和同一执行器上的性能提升，以鼓励高质量且有用的推理。同时构建 TRACELIFT-GROUPS 数据集，包含高质量参考轨迹和多种有缺陷轨迹。
contributions: 提出执行器接地奖励，将推理质量与下游执行器性能提升结合，训练更可靠的推理规划器。
构建 TRACELIFT-GROUPS 数据集，包含带标注的推理轨迹组，用于学习推理质量。
在代码和数学基准上验证了执行器接地奖励优于仅执行器训练。
analysis.experiments: 在代码和数学基准上进行实验，显示执行器接地推理奖励优于仅执行器训练。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 依赖冻结的执行器，可能限制泛化性。
TRACELIFT-GROUPS 数据集规模有限，可能覆盖不足。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，针对推理轨迹质量这一重要问题，实验验证有效，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出 TraceLift 框架，通过执行器接地奖励训练推理规划器，使推理轨迹既高质量又有用。

papers.title: MCJudgeBench: A Benchmark for Constraint-Level Judge Evaluation in Multi-Constraint Instruction Following
papers.abstract: Multi-constraint instruction following requires verifying whether a response satisfies multiple individual requirements, yet LLM judges are often assessed only through overall-response judgments. We introduce MCJudgeBench, a benchmark for constraint-level judge evaluation in multi-constraint instruction following. Each instance includes an instruction, a candidate response, an explicit constraint list, per-constraint gold labels in {yes, partial, no}, and controlled response-side perturbations. The evaluation protocol further includes evaluation prompt variants to test judge stability. We evaluate proprietary and open-source LLM judges using both correctness and inconsistency metrics, distinguishing intrinsic inconsistency under stochastic decoding from procedural inconsistency under prompt and response perturbations. Our results show that judge reliability has multiple dimensions: strong overall performance does not guarantee equally reliable detection across label categories, especially for rarer partial and no cases. Judges with higher correctness do not always have lower inconsistency. Evaluation with reasoning improves correctness but does not uniformly improve stability. These findings motivate evaluating LLM judges at the constraint level to study these failure modes.

analysis.tldr: 提出MCJudgeBench基准，用于多约束指令跟随中约束级别的评判评估，揭示LLM评判员在细粒度约束检测上的可靠性问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM评判员评估通常只关注整体响应判断，忽略了多约束指令跟随中每个约束是否被满足的细粒度评估，导致评判可靠性被高估。
analysis.problem: 如何系统评估LLM评判员在多约束指令跟随任务中逐约束的检测能力及其稳定性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 强整体性能不保证各标签类别（尤其是稀有标签）的可靠检测；高正确率的评判员不一定具有低不一致性；推理提升正确性但不均匀提升稳定性。
analysis.method: 构建MCJudgeBench基准，包含多约束指令、候选响应、显式约束列表、逐约束标签及受控扰动，并设计评估提示变体测试稳定性，使用正确性和不一致性指标区分内在不一致与程序不一致。
contributions: 提出首个约束级别的多约束指令跟随评判基准MCJudgeBench
揭示LLM评判员在细粒度约束检测中的多维可靠性问题
analysis.experiments: 评估了多个开源和闭源LLM评判员，使用正确性和不一致性指标，并区分了随机解码下的内在不一致与提示/响应扰动下的程序不一致。
limitations: 基准可能未覆盖所有类型的多约束指令
未深入探讨如何缓解发现的失败模式
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.reason: 提出新颖的约束级评判基准，实验揭示重要现象，对LLM评估领域有较高价值。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出MCJudgeBench基准，用于多约束指令跟随中约束级别的评判评估，揭示LLM评判员在细粒度约束检测上的可靠性问题。

papers.title: A Deeper Dive into the Irreversibility of PolyProtect: Making Protected Face Templates Harder to Invert
papers.abstract: This work presents a deeper analysis of the "irreversibility" property of PolyProtect, a biometric template protection method initially proposed for securing face embeddings. PolyProtect transforms embeddings into protected templates via multivariate polynomials, whose coefficients and exponents are distinct for each subject enrolled in the face recognition system. A polynomial is applied to consecutive sets of elements from a given embedding, where the amount of overlap between the sets is a tunable parameter. We begin our irreversibility analysis by demonstrating that PolyProtected templates are easier to invert using a numerical solver based on cosine distance, as opposed to Euclidean distance (used in the earlier PolyProtect work). To make this inversion more difficult, we then propose a "key selection algorithm", which tries to choose "keys" (coefficients and exponents of the PolyProtect polynomial) that enhance the irreversibility of PolyProtected templates, compared to when the keys are purely random. Our experiments show that this algorithm is effective at generating PolyProtected templates that are significantly more difficult to invert, and that it approximately equalises the irreversibility of PolyProtected templates generated using different "overlap" parameters. This allows for better control of the irreversibility versus accuracy trade-off, known to exist across different overlaps. We also show that accuracy in the PolyProtected domain can be affected by the range in which the embedding elements lie, but that this can be improved by normalizing the embeddings prior to applying PolyProtect. This work is reproducible using our open-source code.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种密钥选择算法，使PolyProtect生物特征模板更难被逆向恢复。
analysis.research_motivation: 生物特征模板保护方法需要具备不可逆性，但已有方法PolyProtect的不可逆性分析不足，且存在被数值求解器逆向的风险。
analysis.problem: 如何增强PolyProtect保护模板的不可逆性，防止攻击者从保护模板恢复原始人脸嵌入。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 使用余弦距离的数值求解器比欧氏距离更容易逆向PolyProtect模板；不同重叠参数下不可逆性存在差异；嵌入元素的范围影响识别精度。
analysis.method: 提出密钥选择算法，通过优化多项式系数和指数（密钥）来最大化逆向难度，并采用嵌入归一化来改善精度。
contributions: 首次使用余弦距离数值求解器分析PolyProtect的不可逆性，发现其比欧氏距离更易逆向。
提出密钥选择算法，能生成显著更难逆向的保护模板，并均衡不同重叠参数下的不可逆性。
analysis.experiments: 实验表明密钥选择算法有效增加逆向难度，并均衡不同重叠参数下的不可逆性；归一化嵌入可改善精度。摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 仅针对PolyProtect方法，未推广到其他模板保护方案。
未讨论密钥选择算法的计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 方法有针对性改进，但仅针对单一方案，实验细节有限。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种密钥选择算法，使PolyProtect生物特征模板更难被逆向恢复。

papers.title: Stream-R1: Reliability-Perplexity Aware Reward Distillation for Streaming Video Generation
papers.abstract: Distillation-based acceleration has become foundational for making autoregressive streaming video diffusion models practical, with distribution matching distillation (DMD) as the de facto choice. Existing methods, however, train the student to match the teacher's output indiscriminately, treating every rollout, frame, and pixel as equally reliable supervision. We argue that this caps distilled quality, since it overlooks two complementary axes of variance in DMD supervision: Inter-Reliability across student rollouts whose supervision varies in reliability, and Intra-Perplexity across spatial regions and temporal frames that contribute unequally to where quality can still be improved. The objective thus conflates two questions under a uniform weight: whether to learn from each rollout, and where to concentrate optimization within it. To address this, we propose Stream-R1, a Reliability-Perplexity Aware Reward Distillation framework that adaptively reweights the distillation objective at both rollout and spatiotemporal-element levels through a single shared reward-guided mechanism. At the Inter-Reliability level, Stream-R1 rescales each rollout's loss by an exponential of a pretrained video reward score, so that rollouts with reliable supervision dominate optimization. At the Intra-Perplexity level, it back-propagates the same reward model to extract per-pixel gradient saliency, which is factored into spatial and temporal weights that concentrate optimization pressure on regions and frames where refinement yields the largest expected gain. An adaptive balancing mechanism prevents any single quality axis from dominating across visual quality, motion quality, and text alignment. Stream-R1 attains consistent improvements on all three dimensions over distillation baselines on standard streaming video generation benchmarks, without architectural modification or additional inference cost.

analysis.tldr: 提出Stream-R1，通过奖励引导的可靠性-困惑度感知蒸馏，自适应加权蒸馏目标，提升流式视频生成质量。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有蒸馏方法（如DMD）对教师模型的输出不加区分地学习，忽略了不同学生rollout的可靠性差异以及空间和时间区域对质量改进贡献的不均衡，导致蒸馏质量受限。
analysis.problem: 如何自适应地加权蒸馏目标，在rollout级别和时空元素级别区分可靠监督和需要重点优化的区域，以提升流式视频生成模型的蒸馏质量。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出DMD监督存在两个互补的方差轴：跨rollout的可靠性差异（Inter-Reliability）和跨空间区域及时序帧的困惑度差异（Intra-Perplexity），均匀权重会混淆“是否学习每个rollout”和“在何处集中优化”两个问题。
analysis.method: Stream-R1框架，通过共享的奖励引导机制，在Inter-Reliability层用指数化的视频奖励分数重缩放每个rollout的损失，在Intra-Perplexity层反向传播奖励模型提取逐像素梯度显著性，分解为空间和时间权重，并加入自适应平衡机制防止单一质量轴主导。
contributions: 提出Stream-R1，首个在流式视频生成蒸馏中同时考虑rollout可靠性和时空区域困惑度的自适应加权框架。
通过共享奖励模型实现双层次加权，无需架构修改或额外推理成本，在视觉质量、运动质量和文本对齐三个维度上均优于蒸馏基线。
analysis.experiments: 在标准流式视频生成基准上，Stream-R1在视觉质量、运动质量和文本对齐三个维度上均优于蒸馏基线，且无需架构修改或额外推理成本。
limitations: 依赖预训练视频奖励模型的质量，奖励模型偏差可能影响加权效果。
自适应平衡机制可能引入额外超参数调优需求。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，针对流式视频生成蒸馏中的关键问题提出自适应加权方案，实验验证有效，与视频生成方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Stream-R1，通过奖励引导的可靠性-困惑度感知蒸馏，自适应加权蒸馏目标，提升流式视频生成质量。

papers.title: Parameter-Efficient Multi-View Proficiency Estimation: From Discriminative Classification to Generative Feedback
papers.abstract: Estimating how well a person performs an action, rather than which action is performed, is central to coaching, rehabilitation, and talent identification. This task is challenging because proficiency is encoded in subtle differences in timing, balance, body mechanics, and execution, often distributed across multiple views and short temporal events. We discuss three recent contributions to multi-view proficiency estimation on Ego-Exo4D. SkillFormer introduces a parameter-efficient discriminative architecture for selective multi-view fusion; PATS improves temporal sampling by preserving locally dense excerpts of fundamental movements; and ProfVLM reformulates proficiency estimation as conditional language generation, producing both a proficiency label and expert-style feedback through a gated cross-view projector and a compact language backbone. Together, these methods achieve state-of-the-art accuracy on Ego-Exo4D with up to 20x fewer trainable parameters and up to 3x fewer training epochs than video-transformer baselines, while moving from closed-set classification toward interpretable feedback generation. These results highlight a shift toward efficient, multi-view systems that combine selective fusion, proficiency-aware sampling, and actionable generative feedback.

analysis.tldr: 提出三种参数高效的多视角熟练度估计方法，从判别分类转向生成式反馈，在Ego-Exo4D上以更少参数和训练轮次达到SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 熟练度估计在教练、康复和人才识别中至关重要，但熟练度编码在时序、平衡、身体力学和执行中的细微差异中，且常分布在多视角和短时事件中，现有方法效率低且缺乏可解释反馈。
analysis.problem: 如何高效地从多视角视频中估计动作熟练度，并生成可解释的反馈。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出三种方法：SkillFormer（参数高效判别架构，选择性多视角融合）、PATS（保留基本运动局部密集片段的时间采样）、ProfVLM（将熟练度估计重构为条件语言生成，通过门控跨视角投影器和紧凑语言骨干输出标签和专家式反馈）。
contributions: 提出参数高效的多视角熟练度估计方法，相比视频Transformer基线减少20倍可训练参数和3倍训练轮次。
将熟练度估计从封闭集分类转向可解释的生成式反馈。
analysis.experiments: 在Ego-Exo4D数据集上达到SOTA准确率，参数和训练效率显著提升。
limitations: 可能依赖特定数据集Ego-Exo4D，泛化性未验证。
生成反馈的质量和实用性需进一步评估。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新且效率提升显著，但实验仅在一个数据集上，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出三种参数高效的多视角熟练度估计方法，从判别分类转向生成式反馈，在Ego-Exo4D上以更少参数和训练轮次达到SOTA。

papers.title: Mechanical Conscience: A Mathematical Framework for Dependability of Machine Intelligenc
papers.abstract: Distributed collaborative intelligence (DCI), encompassing edge-to-edge architectures, federated learning, transfer learning, and swarm systems, creates environments in which emergent risk is structurally unavoidable: locally correct decisions by individual agents compose into globally unacceptable behavioral trajectories under uncertainty. Existing approaches such as constrained optimization, safe reinforcement learning, and runtime assurance evaluate acceptability at the level of individual actions rather than across behavioral trajectories, and none addresses the multi-participant, uncertainty-laden nature of DCI deployments. This paper introduces mechanical conscience (MC), a novel concept and simplified mathematical framework that operationalizes trajectory-level normative regulation for both single-agent and distributed intelligent systems. Mechanical conscience is defined as a supervisory filter that minimally corrects a baseline policy's actions to reduce cumulative deviation from a normatively admissible region, while accounting for epistemic uncertainty. We introduce associated constructs, conscience score, mechanical guilt, and resonant dependability, that provide an interpretable vocabulary and computable governance signals for this emerging field. Core theoretical properties are established: admissibility equivalence, existence of optimal regulation, and monotonic deviation reduction. Illustrative results demonstrate that MC-regulated agents maintain trajectory-level normative acceptability where conventional controllers drift outside admissible bounds, and that the framework naturally extends to suppress interaction-induced emergent risk in multi-agent DCI settings.

analysis.tldr: 提出机械良心（MC）框架，通过轨迹级规范调节确保分布式智能系统的可靠性。
analysis.research_motivation: 分布式协作智能（DCI）系统中，局部正确决策可能组合成全局不可接受的行为轨迹，现有方法（如约束优化、安全强化学习）仅评估单步动作，无法处理多参与者、不确定性环境下的涌现风险。
analysis.problem: 如何对单智能体和分布式智能系统进行轨迹级的规范性调节，以抑制不确定性下的累积偏差和涌现风险。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，在DCI中，局部正确决策在不确定性下会组合成全局不可接受的行为轨迹，现有方法无法处理这种多参与者、不确定性场景。
analysis.method: 提出机械良心（MC）框架，定义为一个监督滤波器，最小化修正基线策略的动作以减少与规范性可接受区域的累积偏差，并考虑认知不确定性；引入良心分数、机械内疚和共振可靠性等概念。
contributions: 提出机械良心（MC）概念和简化数学框架，实现轨迹级规范性调节。
建立核心理论性质：可接受性等价、最优调节存在性和单调偏差减少。
通过示例展示MC在单智能体和多智能体DCI中抑制涌现风险的有效性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 框架目前为简化数学形式，实际部署中计算复杂度可能较高。
未在真实大规模DCI系统上验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 提出新颖的轨迹级安全对齐框架，但摘要缺乏实验细节，理论贡献为主。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出机械良心（MC）框架，通过轨迹级规范调节确保分布式智能系统的可靠性。

papers.title: Decision-aware User Simulation Agent for Evaluating Conversational Recommender Systems
papers.abstract: Conversational recommender systems (CRS) increasingly rely on user simulators for automated evaluation of sales agents. A key requirement for such simulators is the ability to model human decision-making. However, most existing simulation frameworks do not explicitly model the internal decision process, and LLM-based simulators often exhibit unrealistically strong information-processing capabilities, rarely exhibit the hesitation or decision deferral commonly observed in real consumer behavior, resulting in overly high acceptance probabilities. To address this limitation, we propose Hesitator, a theory-grounded user simulation framework that explicitly models human decision-making under choice overload. The framework introduces a modular Decision Module that separates utility-based item selection from overload-aware commitment decisions. Experiments across multiple user simulation frameworks, domains, sales modes, and LLM backbones show that integrating our module consistently mitigates unrealistic behaviors under increasing overload conditions. Furthermore, Hesitator reproduces established behavioral patterns from psychological economics, demonstrating its ability to model human decision behavior.

analysis.tldr: 提出Hesitator框架，通过显式建模选择过载下的决策过程，提升对话推荐系统用户模拟器的真实性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有用户模拟器未显式建模人类决策过程，LLM模拟器信息处理能力过强，缺乏犹豫和决策延迟，导致接受概率过高，无法真实评估对话推荐系统。
analysis.problem: 如何构建能真实模拟人类在信息过载下决策行为的用户模拟器，以用于对话推荐系统的自动评估。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: LLM基模拟器表现出不切实际的高接受概率，缺乏真实消费者常见的犹豫和决策延迟行为。
analysis.method: 提出Hesitator框架，包含模块化决策模块，将基于效用的物品选择与过载感知的承诺决策分离。
contributions: 提出理论驱动的用户模拟框架Hesitator，显式建模选择过载下的决策过程。
实验证明该模块能在多种设置下缓解过载条件下的不真实行为，并复现心理学经济学的行为模式。
analysis.experiments: 在多个用户模拟框架、领域、销售模式和LLM骨干上进行了实验，验证了模块的有效性。
limitations: 可能仅适用于选择过载场景，其他决策偏差未考虑。
依赖LLM骨干，计算成本可能较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法有理论依据且实验充分，但属于特定应用场景，推荐阅读摘要。

papers.title: SOAR: Real-Time Joint Optimization of Order Allocation and Robot Scheduling in Robotic Mobile Fulfillment Systems
papers.abstract: Robotic Mobile Fulfillment Systems (RMFS) rely on mobile robots for automated inventory transportation, coordinating order allocation and robot scheduling to enhance warehousing efficiency. However, optimizing RMFS is challenging due to strict real-time constraints and the strong coupling of multi-phase decisions. Existing methods either decompose the problem into isolated sub-tasks to guarantee responsiveness at the cost of global optimality, or rely on computationally expensive global optimization models that are unsuitable for dynamic industrial environments. To bridge this gap, we propose SOAR, a unified Deep Reinforcement Learning framework for real-time joint optimization. SOAR transforms order allocation and robot scheduling into a unified process by utilizing soft order allocations as observations. We formulate this as an Event-Driven Markov Decision Process, enabling the agent to perform simultaneous scheduling in response to asynchronous system events. Technically, we employ a Heterogeneous Graph Transformer to encode the warehouse state and integrate phased domain knowledge. Additionally, we incorporate a reward shaping strategy to address sparse feedback in long-horizon tasks. Extensive experiments on synthetic and real-world industrial datasets, in collaboration with Geekplus, demonstrate that SOAR reduces global makespan by 7.5\% and average order completion time by 15.4\% with sub-100ms latency. Furthermore, sim-to-real deployment confirms its practical viability and significant performance gains in production environments. The code is available at https://github.com/200815147/SOAR.

analysis.tldr: 提出SOAR，一个统一深度强化学习框架，用于仓储机器人系统中订单分配与机器人调度的实时联合优化。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有方法要么牺牲全局最优性以保实时性，要么计算昂贵不适合动态工业环境，亟需兼顾实时性与全局最优的联合优化方案。
analysis.problem: 在严格实时约束下，解决订单分配与机器人调度多阶段决策强耦合导致的全局优化难题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将订单分配与机器人调度统一为事件驱动马尔可夫决策过程，利用软订单分配作为观测，采用异构图Transformer编码仓库状态，并引入奖励塑形应对稀疏反馈。
contributions: 提出首个统一深度强化学习框架SOAR，实现订单分配与机器人调度的实时联合优化。
设计事件驱动MDP和异构图Transformer，有效处理异步事件和复杂仓库状态。
在真实工业数据集上验证，降低全局完工时间7.5%和平均订单完成时间15.4%，延迟低于100ms。
analysis.experiments: 在合成和真实工业数据集（与Geekplus合作）上实验，SOAR降低全局完工时间7.5%，平均订单完成时间15.4%，延迟低于100ms，并完成sim-to-real部署验证。
limitations: 可能依赖特定仓库布局和机器人类型，泛化性需进一步验证。
奖励塑形策略可能引入人工偏差。

papers.title: TRACE: A Metrologically-Grounded Engineering Framework for Trustworthy Agentic AI Systems in Operationally Critical Domains
papers.abstract: We introduce TRACE, a cross-domain engineering framework for trustworthy agentic AI in operationally critical domains. TRACE combines a four-layer reference architecture with an explicit classical-ML vs. LLM-validator split (L2a/L2b), a stateful orchestration-and-escalation policy (L3), and bounded human supervision (L4); a metrologically grounded trust-metric suite mapped to GUM/VIM/ISO 17025; and a Model-Parsimony principle quantified by the Computational Parsimony Ratio (CPR). Three instantiations--clinical decision support, industrial multi-domain operations, and a judicial AI assistant--transfer the samearchitecture and metrics across principally different governance contexts. The L2a/L2b separation makes the use of large language models a deliberate design decision rather than an architectural default, with parsimony quantified through CPR. TRACE introduces CPR as a first-class design principle in trustworthy-AI engineering.

analysis.tldr: TRACE 提出一个基于计量学的工程框架，用于在关键操作领域构建可信赖的智能体 AI 系统。
analysis.research_motivation: 在临床决策、工业多域操作和司法辅助等关键领域，智能体 AI 系统的可信赖性至关重要，但现有方法缺乏统一的工程框架和可量化的信任度量标准。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个跨领域的工程框架，确保智能体 AI 系统在操作关键领域中的可信赖性，并引入可量化的信任度量。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: TRACE 框架包含四层参考架构（L2a/L2b 明确区分经典 ML 与 LLM 验证器）、状态化编排与升级策略（L3）、有界人类监督（L4），以及基于 GUM/VIM/ISO 17025 的计量学信任度量套件，并引入计算简约比（CPR）作为模型简约性量化原则。
contributions: 提出 TRACE 框架，结合四层架构、信任度量和模型简约原则。
通过三个不同领域的实例化（临床决策支持、工业多域操作、司法辅助）验证框架的跨领域适用性。

limitations: 框架的实证验证可能有限，摘要未提及定量结果。

papers.title: Conditions for well-posed color recovery in scattering media
papers.abstract: Recovering scene color from images captured in scattering media is a fundamental inverse problem in optical imaging. Yet the problem is intrinsically ill-posed as multiple solutions can explain the same observation, and prediction error cannot be controlled without understanding the space of candidate solutions. Here, we present sufficient conditions under which color recovery in a scattering medium becomes well-posed. Observing that ill-posedness stems from (i) projection of spectral signals onto pixel intensities, and (ii) unknown medium parameters, we demonstrate that sensor improvements alone cannot resolve medium-induced distortions without additional constraints. We identify recovery patterns, cross-pixel relationships that naturally occur in images, and prove, for an ideal hyperspectral camera, that they restrict the solution to a unique candidate. This opens the door to a new class of vision algorithms grounded in first principles, enabling quantitative analysis of images in scattering environments.

analysis.tldr: 提出散射介质中颜色恢复适定性的充分条件，利用跨像素恢复模式实现唯一解。
analysis.research_motivation: 散射介质中的颜色恢复是光学成像的基本逆问题，但本质上是病态的，因为多个解可解释同一观测，且无法控制预测误差。现有方法缺乏对解空间的理解，传感器改进不足以解决介质引起的畸变。
analysis.problem: 解决散射介质中颜色恢复的病态性问题，即如何从单幅图像中唯一确定场景颜色。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出病态性源于光谱信号到像素强度的投影和未知介质参数，并观察到图像中自然存在的跨像素恢复模式可约束解空间。
analysis.method: 通过分析跨像素恢复模式，证明在理想高光谱相机下这些模式将解限制为唯一候选，从而给出颜色恢复适定性的充分条件。
contributions: 揭示了散射介质中颜色恢复病态性的两个根源：光谱投影和未知介质参数。
证明了跨像素恢复模式可唯一确定解，为基于第一性原理的视觉算法奠定基础。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 理论基于理想高光谱相机假设，实际传感器可能不满足条件。
未讨论噪声或非理想散射环境下的鲁棒性。

papers.title: Identity-Consistent Multi-Pose Generation of Contactless Fingerprints
papers.abstract: Contactless fingerprint recognition has gained increasing attention due to its advantages in hygiene and acquisition flexibility. However, the absence of physical contact constraints introduces severe nonlinear geometric distortions caused by free finger poses in 3D space, resulting in a substantial cross-modal domain gap between contactless and conventional contact-based fingerprints. Existing solutions largely rely on explicit geometric correction or image enhancement, which are fragile under extreme pose variations. In this paper, we propose Identity-Consistent Multi-Pose Generation of Contactless Fingerprints (IMPOSE), a physics-inspired framework that synthesizes identity-preserving, multi-pose contactless fingerprint samples to empower recognition models. IMPOSE consists of three stages: (1) rolled fingerprint identity generation via latent diffusion with discrete codebook representations, (2) cross-modal translation from rolled to contactless modality guided by Sauvola-based local adaptive binarization as an identity anchor, and (3) physics-based multi-pose simulation through 3D finger model texture mapping and projection. The generated samples maintain strict identity consistency at the ridge topology level and spatial alignment with standard fingerprint coordinate space. Extensive experiments on the UWA and PolyU CL2CB databases demonstrate that fine-tuning fixed-length dense descriptors (FDD) with IMPOSE-synthesized data achieves state-of-the-art cross-modal matching, reducing EER to 8.74% on UWA and 2.26% on PolyU CL2CB. Synthetic data also yields consistent gains across mainstream representations including DeepPrint and AFRNet, and the hybrid strategy combining synthetic and real data achieves the best overall results. The code and generated samples are available at https://github.com/Yu-Yy/IMPOSE.

analysis.tldr: 提出IMPOSE框架，通过物理启发的多姿态生成合成接触式指纹数据，提升非接触式指纹识别跨模态匹配性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 非接触式指纹识别因卫生和采集灵活性受关注，但自由手指姿态导致严重非线性几何畸变，造成与接触式指纹的跨模态域差距，现有几何校正或图像增强方法在极端姿态下脆弱。
analysis.problem: 如何生成身份一致、多姿态的非接触式指纹样本，以弥合非接触式与接触式指纹之间的跨模态域差距。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 非接触式指纹因无物理接触约束，自由3D姿态引入非线性几何畸变，导致跨模态域差距；现有方法依赖显式几何校正或增强，在极端姿态下效果不佳。
analysis.method: 三阶段框架：1) 基于潜扩散和离散码本生成卷式指纹身份；2) 通过Sauvola局部自适应二值化作为身份锚点，将卷式指纹跨模态翻译为非接触式；3) 基于物理的3D手指模型纹理映射和投影模拟多姿态。
contributions: 提出IMPOSE，首个物理启发的身份一致多姿态非接触式指纹生成框架。
在UWA和PolyU CL2CB数据库上，使用合成数据微调FDD达到SOTA跨模态匹配，EER分别降至8.74%和2.26%。
合成数据在DeepPrint、AFRNet等主流表示上均有一致增益，混合真实数据策略取得最佳结果。
analysis.experiments: 在UWA和PolyU CL2CB数据库上评估，使用合成数据微调FDD实现SOTA跨模态匹配，EER分别为8.74%和2.26%；合成数据在DeepPrint、AFRNet上也有增益。
limitations: 可能依赖特定指纹数据库的3D模型先验。
多姿态模拟的物理模型可能无法覆盖所有真实场景变形。

papers.title: RoboAlign-R1: Distilled Multimodal Reward Alignment for Robot Video World Models
papers.abstract: Existing robot video world models are typically trained with low-level objectives such as reconstruction and perceptual similarity, which are poorly aligned with the capabilities that matter most for robot decision making, including instruction following, manipulation success, and physical plausibility. They also suffer from error accumulation in long-horizon autoregressive prediction. We present RoboAlign-R1, a framework that combines reward-aligned post-training with stabilized long-horizon inference for robot video world models. We construct RobotWorldBench, a benchmark of 10,000 annotated video-instruction pairs collected from four robot data sources, and train a multimodal teacher judge, RoboAlign-Judge, to provide fine-grained six-dimensional evaluation of generated videos. We then distill the teacher into a lightweight student reward model for efficient reinforcement-learning-based post-training. To reduce long-horizon rollout drift, we further introduce Sliding Window Re-encoding (SWR), a training-free inference strategy that periodically refreshes the generation context. Under our in-domain evaluation protocol, RoboAlign-R1 improves the aggregate six-dimension score by 10.1% over the strongest baseline, including gains of 7.5% on Manipulation Accuracy and 4.6% on Instruction Following; these ranking improvements are further supported by an external VLM-based cross-check and a blinded human study. Meanwhile, SWR improves long-horizon prediction quality with only about 1% additional latency, yielding a 2.8% gain in SSIM and a 9.8% reduction in LPIPS. Together, these results show that reward-aligned post-training and stabilized long-horizon decoding improve task consistency, physical realism, and long-horizon prediction quality in robot video world models.

analysis.tldr: 通过蒸馏多模态奖励模型进行后训练，并引入滑动窗口重编码策略，显著提升机器人视频世界模型的指令跟随、操作准确性和长程预测质量。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有机器人视频世界模型使用重建和感知相似性等低级目标训练，与机器人决策所需的高级能力（如指令跟随、操作成功、物理合理性）对齐不足，且在长程自回归预测中存在误差累积问题。
analysis.problem: 如何使机器人视频世界模型的训练目标与机器人决策的关键能力对齐，并缓解长程预测中的误差累积。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建 RobotWorldBench 基准和 RoboAlign-Judge 多模态教师评判器，蒸馏出轻量学生奖励模型用于强化学习后训练；提出滑动窗口重编码（SWR）无训练推理策略，周期性刷新生成上下文以减少长程漂移。
contributions: 提出 RoboAlign-R1 框架，结合奖励对齐后训练与稳定长程推理，提升机器人视频世界模型的任务一致性和物理真实性。
构建 RobotWorldBench 基准（10,000 标注视频-指令对）和 RoboAlign-Judge 多模态教师评判器，实现六维细粒度评估。
引入滑动窗口重编码（SWR）策略，在不增加显著延迟的情况下改善长程预测质量。
analysis.experiments: 在域内评估协议下，RoboAlign-R1 在六维聚合分数上比最强基线提升 10.1%，其中操作准确率提升 7.5%，指令跟随提升 4.6%；外部 VLM 交叉检查和盲人研究支持排名改进。SWR 在仅增加约 1% 延迟的情况下，SSIM 提升 2.8%，LPIPS 降低 9.8%。
limitations: 可能依赖 RobotWorldBench 基准的标注质量，泛化到其他机器人数据源需验证。
SWR 策略的窗口大小和刷新频率可能需针对不同任务调整。

papers.title: Multimodal Learning on Low-Quality Data with Conformal Predictive Self-Calibration
papers.abstract: Multimodal learning often grapples with the challenge of low-quality data, which predominantly manifests as two facets: modality imbalance and noisy corruption. While these issues are often studied in isolation, we argue that they share a common root in the predictive uncertainty towards the reliability of individual modalities and instances during learning. In this paper, we propose a unified framework, termed Conformal Predictive Self-Calibration (CPSC), which leverages conformal prediction to equip the model with the ability to perform self-guided calibration on-the-fly. The core of our proposed CPSC lies in a novel self-calibrating training loop that seamlessly integrates two key modules: (1) Representation Self-Calibration, which decomposes unimodal features into components, and selectively fuses the most robust ones identified by a conformal predictor to enhance feature resilience. (2) Gradient Self-Calibration, which recalibrates the gradient flow during backpropagation based on instance-wise reliability scores, steering the optimization towards more trustworthy directions. Furthermore, we also devise a self-update strategy for the conformal predictor to ensure the entire system co-evolves consistently throughout the training process. Extensive experiments on six benchmark datasets under both imbalanced and noisy settings demonstrate that our CPSC framework consistently outperforms existing state-of-the-art methods. Our code is available at https://github.com/XunCHN/CPSC.

analysis.tldr: 提出统一框架CPSC，用共形预测实现多模态低质量数据上的自校准，在六项基准上超越SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 多模态学习中低质量数据（模态不平衡与噪声损坏）普遍存在，但现有方法常孤立处理这两个问题，缺乏统一视角。
analysis.problem: 如何同时应对多模态数据中的模态不平衡和噪声损坏，提升模型在低质量数据上的鲁棒性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出模态不平衡和噪声损坏的共同根源是预测不确定性，即模型对单个模态和实例可靠性的不确定。
analysis.method: 提出共形预测自校准（CPSC）框架，包含表示自校准（基于共形预测选择鲁棒特征分量融合）和梯度自校准（根据实例可靠性调整梯度流），并设计共形预测器的自更新策略。
contributions: 首次将共形预测引入多模态低质量数据学习，统一处理模态不平衡和噪声损坏。
提出表示自校准和梯度自校准两个模块，实现模型在训练过程中的在线自校准。
在六个基准数据集上验证了方法在失衡和噪声设置下的有效性，并开源代码。
analysis.experiments: 在六个基准数据集上，针对模态不平衡和噪声损坏两种设置进行实验，CPSC一致优于现有最先进方法。
limitations: 共形预测器的自更新策略可能增加训练复杂度。
方法在极端噪声或完全缺失模态情况下的表现未在摘要中明确。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法新颖，统一框架解决多模态低质量数据问题，实验充分，但应用范围较广，非当前最核心方向。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出统一框架CPSC，用共形预测实现多模态低质量数据上的自校准，在六项基准上超越SOTA。

papers.title: Agentic-imodels: Evolving agentic interpretability tools via autoresearch
papers.abstract: Agentic data science (ADS) systems are rapidly improving their capability to autonomously analyze, fit, and interpret data, potentially moving towards a future where agents conduct the vast majority of data-science work. However, current ADS systems use statistical tools designed to be interpretable by humans, rather than interpretable by agents. To address this, we introduce Agentic-imodels, an agentic autoresearch loop that evolves data-science tools designed to be interpretable by agents. Specifically, it develops a library of scikit-learn-compatible regressors for tabular data that are optimized for both predictive performance and a novel LLM-based interpretability metric. The metric measures a suite of LLM-graded tests that probe whether a fitted model's string representation is "simulatable" by an LLM, i.e. whether the LLM can answer questions about the model's behavior by reading its string output alone. We find that the evolved models jointly improve predictive performance and agent-facing interpretability, generalizing to new datasets and new interpretability tests. Furthermore, these evolved models improve downstream end-to-end ADS, increasing performance for Copilot CLI, Claude Code, and Codex on the BLADE benchmark by up to 73%

analysis.tldr: 提出一种自动研究循环，演化出对智能体可解释的表格数据回归模型，提升预测性能与LLM可模拟性。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前自主数据科学系统使用面向人类可解释的统计工具，而非面向智能体可解释，限制了智能体对模型行为的理解与利用。
analysis.problem: 如何设计并演化出既保持预测性能又对LLM智能体可解释（即可模拟）的回归模型。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Agentic-imodels，一种智能体自动研究循环，演化scikit-learn兼容回归器，优化预测性能与基于LLM的可解释性指标（LLM可模拟性测试）。
contributions: 提出面向智能体可解释性的概念与度量方法（LLM可模拟性测试）。
开发自动研究循环，演化出同时提升预测性能与智能体可解释性的模型。
实验证明演化模型能泛化到新数据集与新测试，并提升下游ADS系统性能。
analysis.experiments: 在BLADE基准上测试Copilot CLI、Claude Code和Codex，性能提升高达73%。
limitations: 仅针对表格数据的回归任务，未涉及分类或其他数据类型。
可解释性度量依赖特定LLM，可能受LLM能力差异影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 方法新颖，面向智能体可解释性有应用价值，但仅限表格回归且实验细节有限。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种自动研究循环，演化出对智能体可解释的表格数据回归模型，提升预测性能与LLM可模拟性。

papers.title: ScrapMem: A Bio-inspired Framework for On-device Personalized Agent Memory via Optical Forgetting
papers.abstract: Long-term personalized memory for LLM agents is challenging on resource-limited edge devices due to high storage costs and multimodal complexity. To address this, we propose ScrapMem, a framework that integrates multimodal data into "Scrapbook Page." ScrapMem introduces Optical Forgetting, an optical compression mechanism that progressively reduces the resolution of older memories, lowering storage cost while suppressing low-value details. To maintain semantic consistency, we construct an Episodic Memory Graph (EM-Graph) that organizes key events into a causal-temporal structure. Extensive experiments on the multimodal ATM-Bench showcase that ScrapMem provides three main benefits: (1) strong performance, achieving a new state-of-the-art with a 51.0% Joint@10 score; (2) high storage efficiency, reducing memory usage by up to 93% via optical forgetting; and (3) improved recall, increasing Recall@10 to 70.3% through structured aggregation. ScrapMem offers an effective and storage-efficient solution for on-device long-term memory in multimodal LLM agents.

analysis.tldr: ScrapMem通过光学遗忘机制和情节记忆图，在边缘设备上实现高效的多模态长期记忆管理。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM代理在资源受限的边缘设备上实现长期个性化记忆面临高存储成本和多模态复杂性的挑战。
analysis.problem: 如何在边缘设备上高效存储和检索多模态长期记忆，同时降低存储开销并保持语义一致性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出ScrapMem框架，包含光学遗忘机制（渐进降低旧记忆分辨率）和情节记忆图（因果-时间结构组织关键事件）。
contributions: 提出光学遗忘机制，通过降低旧记忆分辨率减少存储成本并抑制低价值细节。
构建情节记忆图（EM-Graph），以因果-时间结构组织关键事件，保持语义一致性。
在ATM-Bench上实现SOTA性能（Joint@10=51.0%），存储效率提升93%，Recall@10达70.3%。
analysis.experiments: 在ATM-Bench上进行多模态评估，展示了性能、存储效率和召回率的提升。
limitations: 光学遗忘可能丢失部分细节信息，影响特定场景下的回忆准确性。
EM-Graph的构建和更新可能引入额外计算开销。

analysis.one_sentence_summary: ScrapMem通过光学遗忘机制和情节记忆图，在边缘设备上实现高效的多模态长期记忆管理。

papers.title: AI Advocate: Educational Path to Transform Squads to the Future
papers.abstract: This paper analyzes the strategic education process aimed at transitioning traditional software development squads into hybrid structures centered on collaborative work between humans and Artificial Intelligence (AI). In a context where human-AI collaboration can significantly increase productivity, this study explores how the upskilling of XPTO professionals, referred to as AI Advocates, acts as a catalyst for cultural and technical transformation. The objective is to present an experience report on the education and enablement process of AI Advocates within a private Brazilian technology company, highlighting key lessons learned and identified challenges.

analysis.tldr: 本文报告了在巴西科技公司中培养AI倡导者以推动人机协作团队转型的经验。

papers.title: Enhancing Visual Question Answering with Multimodal LLMs via Chain-of-Question Guided Retrieval-Augmented Generation
papers.abstract: With advances in multimodal research and deep learning, Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have emerged as a powerful paradigm for a wide range of multimodal tasks. As a core problem in vision-language research, Visual Question Answering (VQA) has increasingly employed MLLMs to improve performance, particularly in open-domain settings where external knowledge is essential. In this work, we aim to further enhance retrieval-based VQA by more effectively integrating MLLMs with structured reasoning and knowledge acquisition. We introduce a logical prompting strategy that fuses Chain-of-Thought (CoT) reasoning with Visual Question Decomposition (VQD), termed CoVQD, to guide retrieval toward more accurate and relevant knowledge for MLLM inference. Building on this idea, we propose a new framework, CoVQD-guided RAG (CgRAG), which enables MLLMs to access more comprehensive and coherent external knowledge while benefiting from structured visual-text reasoning guidance, thereby improving generalization and reliability in complex cross-domain VQA scenarios. Extensive experiments on E-VQA, InfoSeek, and OKVQA benchmarks demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method.

analysis.tldr: 提出CoVQD逻辑提示策略融合思维链与视觉问题分解，引导检索增强生成提升多模态大模型在开放域VQA上的性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 开放域VQA需要外部知识，现有MLLM在检索相关知识和结构化推理方面仍有不足，导致泛化性和可靠性受限。
analysis.problem: 如何更有效地将MLLM与结构化推理和知识获取结合，以提升检索增强VQA的性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出CoVQD逻辑提示策略，融合思维链与视觉问题分解来引导检索，并构建CgRAG框架使MLLM获取更全面连贯的外部知识。
contributions: 提出CoVQD策略，将CoT推理与视觉问题分解结合以引导检索。
构建CgRAG框架，增强MLLM在复杂跨域VQA场景中的泛化性和可靠性。

papers.title: Say the Mission, Execute the Swarm: Agent-Enhanced LLM Reasoning in the Web-of-Drones
papers.abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly explored as high-level reasoning engines for cyber-physical systems, yet their application to real-time UAV swarm management remains challenging due to heterogeneous interfaces, limited grounding, and the need for long-running closed-loop execution. This paper presents a mission-agnostic, agent-enhanced LLM framework for UAV swarm control, where users express mission objectives in natural language and the system autonomously executes them through grounded, real-time interactions. The proposed architecture combines an LLM-based Agent Core with a Model Context Protocol (MCP) gateway and a Web-of-Drones abstraction based on W3C Web of Things (WoT) standards. By exposing drones, sensors, and services as standardized WoT Things, the framework enables structured tool-based interaction, continuous state observation, and safe actuation without relying on code generation. We evaluate the framework using ArduPilot-based simulation across four swarm missions and six state-of-the-art LLMs. Results show that, despite strong reasoning abilities, current general-purpose LLMs still struggle to achieve reliable execution - even for simple swarm tasks - when operating without explicit grounding and execution support. Task-specific planning tools and runtime guardrails substantially improve robustness, while token consumption alone is not indicative of execution quality or reliability.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种基于LLM的智能体框架，通过Web-of-Drones抽象和MCP网关实现自然语言驱动的无人机集群自主控制。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM在无人机集群管理中的应用面临异构接口、缺乏环境基础以及需要长时间闭环执行等挑战，现有方法难以实现可靠的实际部署。
analysis.problem: 如何让LLM在实时无人机集群控制中实现自然语言指令到可靠自主执行的转换，同时解决异构接口、环境基础缺失和长时间闭环执行的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 当前通用LLM即使具备强推理能力，在缺乏显式基础和执行支持时，即使对于简单集群任务也难以实现可靠执行；任务特定规划工具和运行时护栏能显著提升鲁棒性，而token消耗本身不能指示执行质量或可靠性。
analysis.method: 提出一个与任务无关的、基于LLM的智能体框架，包含LLM Agent Core、模型上下文协议（MCP）网关和基于W3C Web of Things标准的Web-of-Drones抽象层，将无人机、传感器和服务暴露为标准化的WoT Thing，实现结构化工具交互、连续状态观测和安全执行。
contributions: 提出一个任务无关的、基于LLM的智能体框架，用于自然语言驱动的无人机集群控制。
引入Web-of-Drones抽象和MCP网关，实现标准化工具交互和闭环执行。
通过ArduPilot仿真在四种集群任务和六种LLM上评估，揭示了当前LLM在缺乏基础时的执行局限性。
analysis.experiments: 使用ArduPilot仿真，在四种集群任务和六种最先进的LLM上评估。摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 仅在仿真环境中评估，未涉及真实无人机部署。
