analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种多模态潜在扩散模型，通过交叉注意力在共享潜在空间中联合合成MRI和表格数据。

papers.title: Real-Time Evaluation of Autonomous Systems under Adversarial Attacks
papers.abstract: Most evaluations of autonomous driving policies under adversarial conditions are conducted in simulation, due to cost efficiency and the absence of physical risk. However, purely virtual testing fails to capture structural inconsistencies, supervision constraints, and state-representation effects that arise in real-world data and fundamentally shape policy robustness. This work presents an offline trajectory-learning and adversarial robustness evaluation framework grounded in real-world intersection driving data. Within a controlled data contract, we train and compare three trajectory-learning paradigms: Multi-Layer Perceptron (MLP)-based Behavior Cloning (BC), Transformer-based object-tokenized BC, and inverse reinforcement learning (IRL) formulated within a Generative Adversarial Imitation Learning (GAIL) framework. Models are evaluated using Average Displacement Error (ADE) and Final Displacement Error (FDE). Inference-time robustness is assessed by subjecting trained policies to gradient-based adversarial perturbations across multiple intersection scenarios, yielding a structured robustness evaluation matrix. Results show that state-structure design and architectural inductive biases critically influence adversarial stability, leading to markedly different robustness profiles despite comparable nominal prediction accuracy (ADE < 0.08). Inference-time Projected Gradient Descent (PGD) attacks induce final displacement errors of up to approximately 8 meters. The proposed framework establishes a scalable benchmark for studying offline trajectory learning and adversarial robustness in real-world autonomous driving settings.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于真实世界数据的自动驾驶离线轨迹学习与对抗鲁棒性评估框架，发现状态结构和架构归纳偏置显著影响对抗稳定性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有自动驾驶策略的对抗评估多在仿真中进行，无法捕捉真实世界数据中的结构不一致性、监督约束和状态表示效应，而这些因素从根本上影响策略鲁棒性。
analysis.problem: 如何在真实世界数据中系统评估自动驾驶策略的对抗鲁棒性，并揭示状态结构和模型架构对鲁棒性的影响。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 状态结构设计和架构归纳偏置对对抗稳定性有决定性影响，即使模型在名义预测精度上相近（ADE < 0.08），其鲁棒性特征也可能截然不同；推理时PGD攻击可导致最终位移误差高达约8米。
analysis.method: 基于真实世界交叉路口驾驶数据，构建离线轨迹学习与对抗鲁棒性评估框架，训练并比较MLP行为克隆、Transformer行为克隆和GAIL框架下的逆强化学习三种范式，使用梯度对抗扰动进行推理时鲁棒性评估。
contributions: 提出了一个基于真实世界数据的离线轨迹学习与对抗鲁棒性评估框架，弥补了纯仿真评估的不足。
系统比较了三种轨迹学习范式在对抗攻击下的鲁棒性，揭示了状态结构和架构归纳偏置的关键影响。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但提及使用ADE和FDE指标，并展示了PGD攻击下FDE可达约8米。
limitations: 仅基于单一交叉路口数据集，泛化性有待验证。
仅考虑梯度攻击，未覆盖其他类型对抗攻击。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性中等，实验信息有限，但针对真实世界数据评估对抗鲁棒性有实际意义。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于真实世界数据的自动驾驶离线轨迹学习与对抗鲁棒性评估框架，发现状态结构和架构归纳偏置显著影响对抗稳定性。

papers.title: Orientation-Aware Unsupervised Domain Adaptation for Brain Tumor Classification Across Multi-Modal MRI
papers.abstract: The clinical integration of deep learning models for brain tumor diagnosis in neuro-oncology is severely constrained by limited expert-annotated MRI data and substantial inter-institutional domain shift arising from variations in scanners, imaging protocols, and contrast settings. These challenges significantly impair model generalization in real-world settings. To address this, we propose a novel orientation-aware unsupervised domain-adaptive framework for automated brain tumor classification using mixed 2D MRI slices. Initially, a CNN with large receptive field first categorizes input slices into axial, sagittal, and coronal views. For each orientation, a CNN architecture with ResNet50 backbone augmented with four fully connected layers is trained to extract discriminative features for tumor classification. To mitigate annotation scarcity and domain discrepancies, we introduce a slice-wise unsupervised domain adaptation strategy that transfers knowledge from the multi-modal such as T1, T2, and FLAIR source domain to the post-contrast T1 target domain. Feature-level alignment is enforced using maximum mean discrepancy loss, complemented by pseudo-label guided adaptation to preserve class discriminability. Extensive experiments demonstrate improved target-domain performance over prior approaches, highlighting the benefits of orientation-specific learning, multi-modal knowledge transfer, pseudo-label-guided adaptation, and unsupervised domain adaptation.

analysis.tldr: 提出面向方向的域自适应框架，利用多模态MRI切片进行无监督脑肿瘤分类。
analysis.research_motivation: 深度学习在脑肿瘤诊断中受限于标注数据稀缺和跨机构域偏移（扫描仪、协议、对比度差异），导致模型泛化能力差。
analysis.problem: 解决无标注目标域（T1增强）上脑肿瘤分类的域偏移问题，同时利用多模态源域（T1、T2、FLAIR）知识。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 先使用大感受野CNN将2D切片分为轴向、矢状、冠状视图；对每个方向，用ResNet50加四个全连接层提取特征；通过最大均值差异（MMD）进行特征级对齐，并结合伪标签引导的适应保持类别可分性。
contributions: 提出面向方向的域自适应框架，利用切片方向信息提升分类性能。
结合多模态知识迁移和伪标签引导的无监督域自适应策略。
analysis.experiments: 在脑肿瘤多模态MRI数据集上实验，目标域性能优于先前方法。
limitations: 可能依赖切片方向分类的准确性。
伪标签质量可能影响适应效果。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法有创新但实验细节有限，与医学图像方向相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出面向方向的域自适应框架，利用多模态MRI切片进行无监督脑肿瘤分类。

papers.title: Echo-LoRA: Parameter-Efficient Fine-Tuning via Cross-Layer Representation Injection
papers.abstract: Parameter-efficient fine-tuning (PEFT) has become a practical route for adapting large language models to downstream tasks, with LoRA-style methods being particularly attractive because they are inexpensive to train and easy to deploy. Most LoRA variants, however, revise the update rule within the weight space of each layer and leave the intermediate representations formed by deeper layers largely unused. We propose Echo-LoRA, a cross-layer representation injection method for parameter-efficient fine-tuning. During training, Echo-LoRA collects boundary hidden states from deeper source layers, aggregates them into a sample-level echo representation, and uses lightweight projection and gating networks to inject the resulting signal into shallow LoRA or DoRA modules. Answer-only masking, masked distillation, and stochastic routing are used to keep this auxiliary path stable and to reduce the gap between training and inference. On eight commonsense reasoning benchmarks, Echo-LoRA exceeds the reported LoRA baselines by 5.7 percentage points on average across LLaMA-7B, LLaMA2-7B, and LLaMA3-8B. Under reproduced LoRA baselines in our unified implementation, the average gain is 3.0 points; when combined with DoRA, the gain is 2.7 points. The Echo path is discarded after training, so the deployed model keeps the original low-rank LoRA/DoRA form and adds neither inference-time parameters nor inference computation.

analysis.tldr: Echo-LoRA通过跨层表示注入提升LoRA微调效果，训练后无额外推理开销。
analysis.research_motivation: LoRA等参数高效微调方法虽成本低，但仅在各层权重空间内更新，未利用深层中间表示，限制了微调性能。
analysis.problem: 如何利用深层表示增强浅层LoRA模块，同时保持推理时零额外参数和计算。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 收集深层隐藏状态，聚合为样本级回声表示，通过轻量投影和门控网络注入浅层LoRA/DoRA模块，并采用仅答案掩码、掩码蒸馏和随机路由稳定训练。
contributions: 提出Echo-LoRA，一种跨层表示注入的PEFT方法，利用深层表示提升浅层LoRA性能。
在8个常识推理基准上，LLaMA-7B/2-7B/3-8B平均超越LoRA基线5.7个百分点，且推理时无额外开销。
analysis.experiments: 在LLaMA-7B、LLaMA2-7B、LLaMA3-8B上评估8个常识推理基准，与LoRA和DoRA对比，平均提升3.0和2.7个百分点。
limitations: 仅验证了常识推理任务，其他任务泛化性未知。
需要选择源层和目标层，可能依赖经验。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 方法新颖且实验充分，对PEFT领域有实用价值，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Echo-LoRA通过跨层表示注入提升LoRA微调效果，训练后无额外推理开销。

papers.title: MHPR: Multidimensional Human Perception and Reasoning Benchmark for Large Vision-Languate Models
papers.abstract: Multidimensional human understanding is essential for real-world applications such as film analysis and virtual digital humans, yet current LVLM benchmarks largely focus on single-task settings and lack fine-grained, human-centric evaluation. In this work, we introduce MHPR, a comprehensive benchmark for joint perception-reasoning over human-centric scenes spanning individual, multi-person, and human-object interaction dimensions. MHPR comprises a multi-level data design-Captioned Raw Data (C-RD), Supervised Fine-Tuning Data (SFT-D), Reinforcement Learning Data (RL-D), and Test Data (T-D)-together with an automated caption/VQA generation pipeline (ACVG) that performs category-wise attribute decomposition, attribute-specific rewriting, and multi-model voting to ensure high-quality, scalable annotations. We evaluate state-of-the-art vision-language models on fine-grained attributes (appearance, clothing, pose, parts) and high-level semantics (social relations, action semantics, spatial relations, intent and functionality). Our findings show that: 1) format-aligned SFT data substantially improves instruction following and stability; 2) challenge-focused RL data derived from bad-case analysis further enhances perception and reasoning on difficult instances; and 3) training Qwen2.5-VL-7B with MHPR yields significant gains, achieving near-parity with considerably larger models. We release ACVG and MHPR to facilitate reproducible, extensible research on human-centric perception and reasoning.

analysis.tldr: 提出多维人类感知与推理基准MHPR，通过多级数据设计和自动化标注流程，显著提升LVLM在细粒度属性和高层语义上的表现。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LVLM基准多聚焦于单任务设置，缺乏细粒度、以人为中心的评估，难以满足电影分析、虚拟数字人等实际应用需求。
analysis.problem: 缺乏一个全面、细粒度、以人为中心的联合感知-推理基准，以评估LVLM在多维人类场景（个体、多人、人-物交互）上的能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 格式对齐的SFT数据显著提升指令遵循和稳定性；基于困难案例分析得到的挑战性RL数据进一步增强困难实例的感知和推理能力。
analysis.method: 构建MHPR基准，包含多级数据（C-RD、SFT-D、RL-D、T-D）和自动化标注流程ACVG，通过类别属性分解、属性特定改写和多模型投票生成高质量标注。
contributions: 提出MHPR，一个全面、细粒度、以人为中心的联合感知-推理基准，覆盖个体、多人、人-物交互维度。
设计ACVG自动化标注流程，实现可扩展的高质量标注。
通过实验证明格式对齐的SFT数据和挑战性RL数据能有效提升LVLM性能，且训练Qwen2.5-VL-7B达到与更大模型相当的水平。
analysis.experiments: 在MHPR上评估了多个SOTA视觉-语言模型，涵盖细粒度属性（外观、服装、姿态、部位）和高层语义（社会关系、动作语义、空间关系、意图与功能）。训练Qwen2.5-VL-7B后取得显著提升，接近更大模型性能。
limitations: 基准可能未覆盖所有人类感知维度，如情感或文化背景。
自动化标注流程ACVG可能存在噪声，需进一步验证其质量。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.reason: 该基准针对LVLM在人本感知与推理上的评估空白，方法系统且实验充分，对领域有较大贡献。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出多维人类感知与推理基准MHPR，通过多级数据设计和自动化标注流程，显著提升LVLM在细粒度属性和高层语义上的表现。

papers.title: MEMSAD: Gradient-Coupled Anomaly Detection for Memory Poisoning in Retrieval-Augmented Agents
papers.abstract: Persistent external memory enables LLM agents to maintain context across sessions, yet its security properties remain formally uncharacterized. We formalize memory poisoning attacks on retrieval-augmented agents as a Stackelberg game with a unified evaluation framework spanning three attack classes with escalating access assumptions. Correcting an evaluation protocol inconsistency in the triggered-query specification of Chen et al. (2024), we show faithful evaluation increases measured attack success by $4\times$ (ASR-R: $0.25 \to 1.00$). Our primary contribution is MEMSAD (Semantic Anomaly Detection), a calibration-based defense grounded in a gradient coupling theorem: under encoder regularity, the anomaly score gradient and the retrieval objective gradient are provably identical, so any continuous perturbation that reduces detection risk necessarily degrades retrieval rank. This coupling yields a certified detection radius guaranteeing correct classification regardless of adversary strategy. We prove minimax optimality via Le Cam's method, showing any threshold detector requires $Ω(1/ρ^2)$ calibration samples and MEMSAD achieves this up to $\log(1/δ)$ factors. We further derive online regret bounds for rolling calibration at rate $O(σ^{2/3}Δ^{1/3})$, and formally characterize a discrete synonym-invariance loophole that marks the boundary of what continuous-space defenses can guarantee. Experiments on a $3 \times 5$ attack-defense matrix with bootstrap confidence intervals, Bonferroni-corrected hypothesis tests, and Clopper-Pearson validation ($n=1{,}000$) confirm: composite defenses achieve TPR $= 1.00$, FPR $= 0.00$ across all attacks, while synonym substitution evades detection at $Δ$ ASR-R $\approx 0$, exposing a gap existing embedding-based defenses cannot close.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于梯度耦合定理的语义异常检测方法MEMSAD，用于防御检索增强型LLM Agent的记忆投毒攻击，并形式化证明了其最优性和检测半径。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM Agent依赖持久化外部记忆维持跨会话上下文，但记忆投毒攻击的安全性质缺乏形式化刻画，现有评估协议存在不一致性，且缺乏可证明的防御方法。
analysis.problem: 如何形式化定义并有效防御针对检索增强型Agent的记忆投毒攻击，同时保证检测的鲁棒性和最优性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出MEMSAD，一种基于校准的语义异常检测方法，核心是梯度耦合定理：在编码器正则性下，异常分数梯度与检索目标梯度相同，因此任何降低检测风险的连续扰动必然降低检索排名，从而得到可证明的检测半径。
contributions: 形式化记忆投毒攻击为Stackelberg博弈，并建立统一评估框架，涵盖三类攻击假设。
纠正Chen et al. (2024)评估协议的不一致性，发现忠实评估使攻击成功率提升4倍。
提出MEMSAD防御方法，基于梯度耦合定理提供可证明的检测半径和最小最大最优性。
推导在线校准的遗憾界，并形式化离散同义词替换漏洞的边界。
analysis.experiments: 在3×5攻击-防御矩阵上进行实验，使用bootstrap置信区间、Bonferroni校正假设检验和Clopper-Pearson验证（n=1000），结果表明组合防御在所有攻击下TPR=1.00、FPR=0.00，而同义词替换攻击的ASR-R增量≈0，暴露了现有嵌入防御的漏洞。
limitations: 防御依赖于编码器正则性假设，可能不适用于所有编码器。
离散同义词替换漏洞无法被连续空间防御覆盖，需要额外处理。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 理论贡献扎实，形式化框架新颖，实验验证充分，对LLM Agent安全有重要价值。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于梯度耦合定理的语义异常检测方法MEMSAD，用于防御检索增强型LLM Agent的记忆投毒攻击，并形式化证明了其最优性和检测半径。

papers.title: CuraView: A Multi-Agent Framework for Medical Hallucination Detection with GraphRAG-Enhanced Knowledge Verification
papers.abstract: Discharge summaries require extracting critical information from lengthy electronic health records (EHRs), a process that is labor-intensive when performed manually. Large language models (LLMs) can improve generation efficiency; however, they are prone to producing faithfulness hallucinations, statements that contradict source records, posing direct risks to patient safety. To address this, we present CuraView, a multi-agent framework for sentence-level detection and evidence-grounded explanation of faithfulness hallucinations in discharge summaries. CuraView constructs a GraphRAG-based knowledge graph from patient-level EHRs and implements a closed-loop generation-detection pipeline with sentence-level evidence retrieval and classification spanning four evidence grades from strong support to direct contradiction (E1-E4), yielding structured and interpretable evidence chains. We evaluate CuraView on a subset of 250 patients from the Discharge-Me benchmark, with 50 patients held out for testing. Our fine-tuned Qwen3-14B detection model achieves an F1 of 0.831 on the safety-critical E4 metric (90.9% recall, 76.5% precision) and an F1 of 0.823 on E3+E4, representing a 50.0% relative improvement over the base model and outperforming RAGTruth-style and QAGS-style baselines. These results demonstrate that evidence-chain-based graph retrieval verification substantially improves the factual reliability of clinical documentation, while simultaneously producing reusable annotated datasets for downstream model training and distillation.

analysis.tldr: CuraView 是一个多智能体框架，利用 GraphRAG 增强的知识验证来检测出院小结中的忠实性幻觉，在安全关键指标上 F1 达 0.831。
analysis.research_motivation: 出院小结需要从冗长的电子健康记录中提取关键信息，手动操作劳动密集；LLM 虽能提高生成效率，但易产生忠实性幻觉（与源记录矛盾的陈述），直接威胁患者安全。
analysis.problem: 解决 LLM 生成出院小结时的忠实性幻觉检测问题，要求句子级检测并提供基于证据的可解释说明。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: LLM 在生成临床文档时容易出现忠实性幻觉，即生成内容与源电子健康记录矛盾，现有方法缺乏细粒度证据链验证。
analysis.method: 构建基于 GraphRAG 的患者级知识图谱，实现闭环生成-检测流水线，包含句子级证据检索和四级证据等级（E1-E4）分类，生成结构化可解释证据链。
contributions: 提出 CuraView 多智能体框架，结合 GraphRAG 知识图谱实现句子级忠实性幻觉检测与证据解释。
在 Discharge-Me 基准上，微调 Qwen3-14B 模型在安全关键 E4 指标上 F1 达 0.831，相对提升 50.0%。
analysis.experiments: 在 Discharge-Me 基准的 250 名患者子集上评估，其中 50 名患者用于测试。微调 Qwen3-14B 检测模型在 E4 指标上 F1=0.831（召回率 90.9%，精确率 76.5%），E3+E4 上 F1=0.823，优于 RAGTruth 和 QAGS 基线。
limitations: 仅在 250 名患者子集上评估，规模有限。
依赖 GraphRAG 知识图谱构建质量，可能受 EHR 数据噪声影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新（GraphRAG+多智能体）且实验效果显著，但评估规模有限，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: CuraView 是一个多智能体框架，利用 GraphRAG 增强的知识验证来检测出院小结中的忠实性幻觉，在安全关键指标上 F1 达 0.831。

papers.title: WorldJen: An End-to-End Multi-Dimensional Benchmark for Generative Video Models
papers.abstract: Evaluating generative video models remains an open problem. Reference-based metrics such as Structural Similarity Index Measure (SSIM) and Peak Signal to Noise Ratio (PSNR) reward pixel fidelity over semantic correctness, while Frechet Video Distance (FVD) favors distributional textures over physical plausibility. Binary Visual Question Answering (VQA) based benchmarks like VBench~2.0 are prone to yes-bias and rely on low-resolution auditors that miss temporal failures. Moreover, their prompts target a single dimension at a time, multiplying the number of videos required while still not guaranteeing reliable results. WorldJen addresses these limitations directly. Binary VQA is replaced with Likert-scale questionnaires graded by a VLM that receives frames at native video resolution. Video generation costs are addressed by using adversarially curated prompts that are designed to exercise up to 16 quality dimensions simultaneously. The framework is built around two interlocking contributions. First, A blind human preference study is conducted, accumulating (2,696 pairwise annotations from 7 annotators with 100% pair coverage over 50 of the curated prompts $\times$ 6 state-of-the-art video models. A mean inter-annotator agreement of 66.9% is achieved and the study establishes a human ground-truth Bradley-Terry (BT) rating with a three-tier structure. Second, A VLM-as-a-judge evaluation engine using prompt-specific, dimension-specific Likert questionnaires (10 questions per dimension, 47,160 scored responses) judges the videos and reproduces the human-established three-tier BT rating structure independently. The VLM achieves a Spearman $\hatρ=1.000,~p=0.0014$ that is interpreted as tier agreement with the human results. Six focused ablation studies validate the robustness of the VLM evaluation framework. Project page: https://moonmath.ai/worldjen/

analysis.tldr: WorldJen 提出一种多维度视频生成模型评测框架，用 VLM 替代传统指标，通过 Likert 问卷和对抗性提示实现高效、可靠的人类对齐评估。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有视频生成评估指标（如 SSIM、PSNR、FVD）存在像素级忠实度与语义正确性、物理合理性之间的偏差，而基于二元 VQA 的基准（如 VBench 2.0）存在 yes-bias 且依赖低分辨率审计器，无法捕捉时序失败，同时单维度提示导致评估成本高昂。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个端到端、多维度、与人类偏好高度一致的视频生成模型评估基准，克服现有指标和基准的局限性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析，但指出传统指标和二元 VQA 基准的失败模式：像素级指标忽略语义，FVD 偏向纹理，二元 VQA 有 yes-bias 且低分辨率审计器遗漏时序错误。
analysis.method: WorldJen 框架包含两个核心贡献：1）盲人偏好研究，收集 7 名标注者 2696 对标注，建立人类真实 Bradley-Terry 评分三级结构；2）VLM-as-a-judge 评估引擎，使用提示特定、维度特定的 Likert 问卷（每维度 10 题，共 47160 个评分响应），独立复现人类三级 BT 评分结构。
contributions: 提出一种多维度视频生成模型评估框架，使用对抗性提示同时覆盖 16 个质量维度，降低视频生成成本。
通过盲人偏好研究建立人类真实三级 BT 评分结构，并验证 VLM 评估引擎与人类结果的高度一致性（Spearman ρ=1.000, p=0.0014）。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但提及进行了 6 项消融研究验证 VLM 评估框架的鲁棒性。
limitations: VLM 评估可能仍存在与人类偏好不完全对齐的偏差，尽管 Spearman 相关性很高。
对抗性提示的通用性和覆盖所有视频生成场景的能力有待进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.reason: 该工作针对视频生成评估这一关键问题提出了创新框架，方法系统且与人类对齐度高，对领域有重要参考价值。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: WorldJen 提出一种多维度视频生成模型评测框架，用 VLM 替代传统指标，通过 Likert 问卷和对抗性提示实现高效、可靠的人类对齐评估。

papers.title: Detecting Stealth Sycophancy in Mental-Health Dialogue with Dynamic Emotional Signature Graphs
papers.abstract: As conversational AI therapists are increasingly used in psychological support settings, reliable offline evaluation of therapeutic response quality remains an open problem. This paper studies multi-domain support-dialogue evaluation without relying on large language models as final judges. We use a direct LLM judge as a baseline that reads raw dialogue text and predicts whether the target response is harmful, productive, or neutral. We find that direct LLM judges and symmetric text-similarity metrics are poorly aligned with therapeutic quality because the target label depends on clinical direction: whether the response moves the user state toward regulation or reframing, leaves it broadly unchanged, or reinforces deterioration through higher risk affect or cognitive-distortion mass. To address this issue, we propose Dynamic Emotional Signature Graphs (DESG), a model-agnostic evaluator that represents dialogue windows with decoupled clinical states and scores them using asymmetric clinical geometry. We evaluate DESG on a constructed diagnostic stress-test benchmark of 3{,}000 dialogue windows from EmpatheticDialogues, ESConv, and CRADLE-Dialogue, covering peer support, counseling dialogue, and crisis-oriented interaction. On the 600-window held-out test aggregate, DESG-Ensemble achieves 0.9353 macro-F1, exceeding ConcatANN by 1.51 percentage points, BERTScore by 19.63 points, and TRACT by 33.81 points. Feature ablations, artifact controls, a 100-window blinded adjudicator audit, and qualitative disagreement cases indicate that the clinical state manifold is the main discriminative substrate, while graph-based trajectory components provide asymmetric scoring and interpretable diagnostics rather than serving as the sole source of performance.

analysis.tldr: 提出动态情感签名图（DESG）评估心理健康对话中的隐性谄媚，无需LLM作为最终裁判。
analysis.research_motivation: 对话式AI治疗师在心理支持场景中应用日益广泛，但可靠的无监督评估方法仍是一个开放问题，现有直接LLM裁判和对称文本相似度指标与治疗质量对齐不佳。
analysis.problem: 解决多领域支持对话评估中，直接LLM裁判和对称文本相似度指标无法准确反映治疗质量（如是否促进情绪调节或恶化）的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 直接LLM裁判和对称文本相似度指标与治疗质量对齐差，因为目标标签依赖于临床方向：响应是否将用户状态转向调节或重构、保持不变，或通过高风险情感或认知扭曲质量加剧恶化。
analysis.method: 提出动态情感签名图（DESG），一种模型无关的评估器，用解耦的临床状态表示对话窗口，并使用非对称临床几何进行评分。
contributions: 提出DESG评估器，利用动态情感签名图和非对称临床几何进行心理健康对话评估。
构建包含3000个对话窗口的诊断性压力测试基准，覆盖同伴支持、咨询对话和危机导向交互。
在600窗口测试集上，DESG集成达到0.9353 macro-F1，超过ConcatANN、BERTScore和TRACT。
analysis.experiments: 在来自EmpatheticDialogues、ESConv和CRADLE-Dialogue的3000个对话窗口上评估，600窗口测试集上DESG-Ensemble达到0.9353 macro-F1，超过基线。还进行了特征消融、伪影控制、100窗口盲审员审计和定性分歧案例分析。
limitations: 可能依赖特定临床状态定义，泛化到其他领域需调整。
计算复杂度可能高于简单基线方法。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法新颖且实验充分，但应用领域较窄，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出动态情感签名图（DESG）评估心理健康对话中的隐性谄媚，无需LLM作为最终裁判。

papers.title: FINER-SQL: Boosting Small Language Models for Text-to-SQL
papers.abstract: Large language models have driven major advances in Text-to-SQL generation. However, they suffer from high computational cost, long latency, and data privacy concerns, which make them impractical for many real-world applications. A natural alternative is to use small language models (SLMs), which enable efficient and private on-premise deployment. Yet, SLMs often struggle with weak reasoning and poor instruction following. Conventional reinforcement learning methods based on sparse binary rewards (0/1) provide little learning signal when the generated SQLs are incorrect, leading to unstable or collapsed training. To overcome these issues, we propose FINER-SQL, a scalable and reusable reinforcement learning framework that enhances SLMs through fine-grained execution feedback. Built on group relative policy optimization, FINER-SQL replaces sparse supervision with dense and interpretable rewards that offer continuous feedback even for incorrect SQLs. It introduces two key reward functions: a memory reward, which aligns reasoning with verified traces for semantic stability, and an atomic reward, which measures operation-level overlap to grant partial credit for structurally correct but incomplete SQLs. This approach transforms discrete correctness into continuous learning, enabling stable, critic-free optimization. Experiments on the BIRD and Spider benchmarks show that FINER-SQL achieves up to 67.73\% and 85\% execution accuracy with a 3B model -- matching much larger LLMs while reducing inference latency to 5.57~s/sample. These results highlight a cost-efficient and privacy-preserving path toward high-performance Text-to-SQL generation. Our code is available at https://github.com/thanhdath/finer-sql.

analysis.tldr: FINER-SQL通过细粒度执行反馈强化学习，让小模型在Text-to-SQL任务上达到大模型性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 大模型在Text-to-SQL中计算成本高、延迟长且存在隐私问题，而小模型推理弱、指令遵循差，传统强化学习基于稀疏二元奖励信号不足。
analysis.problem: 如何利用细粒度执行反馈提升小语言模型在Text-to-SQL任务中的推理和指令遵循能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于组相对策略优化（GRPO），引入记忆奖励（对齐推理与已验证轨迹）和原子奖励（衡量操作级重叠，对部分正确SQL给予部分奖励），将离散正确性转化为连续学习信号。
contributions: 提出FINER-SQL框架，通过细粒度执行反馈增强小模型Text-to-SQL能力。
设计记忆奖励和原子奖励两种密集可解释奖励函数，替代稀疏二元奖励。
在BIRD和Spider基准上，3B模型达到67.73%和85%执行准确率，匹配大模型且推理延迟仅5.57秒/样本。
analysis.experiments: 在BIRD和Spider基准上评估，3B模型分别达到67.73%和85%执行准确率，推理延迟5.57秒/样本。
limitations: 可能仅适用于Text-to-SQL任务，泛化性未知。
奖励函数设计依赖执行反馈，可能不适用于无执行环境的场景。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，实验充分且结果显著，与LLM推理方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: FINER-SQL通过细粒度执行反馈强化学习，让小模型在Text-to-SQL任务上达到大模型性能。

papers.title: First Shape, Then Meaning: Efficient Geometry and Semantics Learning for Indoor Reconstruction
papers.abstract: Neural Surface Reconstruction has become a standard methodology for indoor 3D reconstruction, with Signed Distance Functions (SDFs) proving particularly effective for representing scene geometry. A variety of applications require a detailed understanding of the scene context, driving the need for object-level semantic signals. While recent methods successfully integrate semantic labels, they often inherit the slow training time and limited scalability of multi-SDF learning. In this paper, we introduce FSTM, a unified approach for learning geometry and semantics through a two-step process: a geometry warm-up using RGB inputs and geometric cues, followed by semantic field estimation. By first optimising geometry without semantic supervision, we observe substantial improvements compared to the standard joint optimisation. Rather than relying on specialised modules or complex multi-SDF designs, FSTM shows that a streamlined formulation is sufficient to achieve strong geometric and semantic reconstructions. Experiments on both synthetic and real-world indoor datasets show that our method outperforms multi-SDF approaches. It trains 2.3x faster on Replica, improves robustness to real-world imperfections on ScanNet++, and achieves higher recall by recovering the surfaces of more objects in the scene. The code will be made available at https://remichierchia.github.io/FSTM.

analysis.tldr: FSTM通过先几何后语义的两阶段训练，在室内重建中实现更快、更鲁棒的几何与语义联合学习。
analysis.research_motivation: 室内3D重建需要同时恢复几何和语义信息，但现有方法（如多SDF学习）训练慢、可扩展性差，难以高效处理大规模场景。
analysis.problem: 如何在不依赖复杂多SDF设计的前提下，高效且鲁棒地联合学习室内场景的几何与语义。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到：先优化几何（无语义监督）再估计语义，相比标准联合优化能显著提升性能。
analysis.method: 提出FSTM，采用两阶段流程：第一阶段利用RGB输入和几何线索进行几何热身训练，第二阶段进行语义场估计。
contributions: 提出一种简洁的两阶段训练策略，先几何后语义，避免复杂多SDF设计。
在合成和真实数据集上实现更快的训练速度（Replica上2.3倍）和更强的鲁棒性（ScanNet++），并提高物体表面召回率。
analysis.experiments: 在Replica（合成）和ScanNet++（真实）数据集上评估，FSTM训练速度提升2.3倍，对真实世界不完美性更鲁棒，且能恢复更多物体表面。
limitations: 可能对极端几何或语义模糊场景敏感。
两阶段训练可能引入误差累积。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法简洁有效，实验充分，但创新点主要为训练策略改进，技术深度中等。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: FSTM通过先几何后语义的两阶段训练，在室内重建中实现更快、更鲁棒的几何与语义联合学习。

papers.title: Learning Generalizable Action Representations via Pre-training AEMG
papers.abstract: A fundamental role in decoding human motor intent and enabling intuitive human-computer interaction is played by electromyography (EMG). However, its generalization capability across subjects, devices, and tasks remains substantially limited by data heterogeneity, label scarcity, and the lack of a unified representational framework. To bridge this gap, we propose Any Electromyography (AEMG), the first large-scale, self-supervised representation learning framework for EMG. AEMG reconceptualizes neuromuscular dynamics linguistically, utilizing a novel Neuromuscular Contraction Tokenizer (NCT) to translate discrete muscle contractions into structural words and temporal activation patterns into coherent sentences. Furthermore, we compile the largest cross-device EMG signal vocabulary to date, enabling seamless transfer across arbitrary channel topologies and sampling rates. Experiments demonstrate that AEMG improves the zero-shot leave-one-subject-out (LOSO) accuracy by 5.79-9.25% compared to six state-of-the-art baselines, and achieves more than 90% few-shot adaptation performance with only 5% of target user data. Our work has proposed the concept of EMG signals as a cross-device physiological language, learned their grammar from massive amounts of data, and laid the groundwork for a single-training, universally applicable EMG foundation model.

analysis.tldr: 提出首个大规模自监督EMG表征学习框架AEMG，将肌电信号建模为跨设备生理语言，显著提升跨主体泛化能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 肌电信号在解码运动意图中至关重要，但数据异质性、标签稀缺和缺乏统一表征框架严重限制了其跨主体、跨设备、跨任务的泛化能力。
analysis.problem: 如何学习可跨主体、跨设备、跨任务泛化的通用肌电信号表征。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出AEMG框架，包含Neuromuscular Contraction Tokenizer (NCT)将离散肌肉收缩转化为结构词、时序激活模式转化为连贯句子，并构建最大跨设备EMG信号词汇表，实现任意通道拓扑和采样率的无缝迁移。
contributions: 首次提出将EMG信号视为跨设备生理语言的概念，并构建大规模自监督表征学习框架AEMG。
设计NCT将神经肌肉动力学语言化，并构建最大跨设备EMG词汇表，支持任意通道拓扑和采样率。
在零样本和少样本跨主体泛化任务上显著超越六种基线方法。
analysis.experiments: 在零样本留一主体实验上，AEMG相比六种基线方法准确率提升5.79%-9.25%；仅用5%目标用户数据即可达到超过90%的少样本适应性能。
limitations: 可能仅针对前臂或特定肢体肌群，未验证全身其他部位EMG的泛化性。
跨设备词汇表的构建依赖特定数据集，可能对极端异质设备泛化有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强（首次将EMG语言化），实验效果显著，但属于肌电信号领域，与核心关注方向中等相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出首个大规模自监督EMG表征学习框架AEMG，将肌电信号建模为跨设备生理语言，显著提升跨主体泛化能力。

papers.title: FinSTaR: Towards Financial Reasoning with Time Series Reasoning Models
papers.abstract: Time series (TS) reasoning models (TSRMs) have shown promising capabilities in general domains, yet they consistently fail on financial domain, which exhibit unique characteristics. We propose a general 2x2 capability taxonomy for TSRMs by crossing 1) single-entity vs. multi-entity analysis with 2) assessment of the current state vs. prediction of future behavior. We instantiate this taxonomy in the financial domain -- where the distinction between deterministic assessment and stochastic prediction is particularly critical -- as ten financial reasoning tasks, forming the FinTSR-Bench benchmark based on S&P stocks. To this end, we propose FinSTaR (Financial Time Series Thinking and Reasoning), trained on FinTSR-Bench with distinct chain-of-thought (CoT) strategies tailored to each category. For assessment, which is deterministic (i.e., computable from observable data), we employ Compute-in-CoT, a programmatic CoT that enables models to derive answers directly from raw prices. For prediction, which is inherently stochastic (i.e., subject to unobservable factors), we adopt Scenario-Aware CoT, which generates diverse scenarios before making a judgment, mirroring how financial analysts reason under uncertainty. The proposed method achieves 78.9% average accuracy on FinTSR-Bench, substantially outperforming LLM and TSRM baselines. Furthermore, we show that the four capability categories are complementary and mutually reinforcing through joint training, and that Scenario-Aware CoT consistently improves prediction accuracy over standard CoT. Code is publicly available at: https://github.com/seunghan96/FinSTaR.

analysis.tldr: 提出金融时间序列推理模型FinSTaR，通过分类感知的思维链策略在金融推理基准上显著超越基线。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有时间序列推理模型在通用领域表现良好，但在具有独特特征的金融领域持续失败，亟需针对金融特性的推理方法。
analysis.problem: 金融时间序列推理中，确定性评估与随机性预测的区分未被现有模型有效处理，导致性能不佳。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出通用TSRM在金融领域持续失败，且金融中确定性评估（可计算）与随机性预测（受不可观测因素影响）的区分至关重要。
analysis.method: 提出FinSTaR，基于2x2能力分类法（单实体/多实体 × 当前状态评估/未来行为预测）构建十项金融推理任务基准FinTSR-Bench，并针对不同类别采用不同思维链策略：评估任务用Compute-in-CoT（程序化推导），预测任务用Scenario-Aware CoT（生成多样化场景后判断）。
contributions: 提出金融时间序列推理的2x2能力分类法，并实例化为FinTSR-Bench基准。
提出FinSTaR模型，采用分类感知的思维链策略（Compute-in-CoT和Scenario-Aware CoT），在金融推理任务上达到78.9%平均准确率，显著优于基线。
验证了四个能力类别通过联合训练互补增强，且Scenario-Aware CoT持续优于标准CoT。
analysis.experiments: 在FinTSR-Bench基准上评估，基于S&P股票数据，FinSTaR达到78.9%平均准确率，显著优于LLM和TSRM基线。
limitations: 仅基于S&P股票数据，可能不适用于其他市场或资产类别。
Scenario-Aware CoT的生成场景质量未深入分析，可能引入额外偏差。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强（分类感知CoT），实验充分且开源，与金融推理方向高度相关，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出金融时间序列推理模型FinSTaR，通过分类感知的思维链策略在金融推理基准上显著超越基线。

papers.title: VL-SAM-v3: Memory-Guided Visual Priors for Open-World Object Detection
papers.abstract: Open-world object detection aims to localize and recognize objects beyond a fixed closed-set label space. It is commonly divided into two categories, i.e., open-vocabulary detection, which assumes a predefined category list at test time, and open-ended detection, which requires generating candidate categories during the inference. Existing methods rely primarily on coarse textual semantics and parametric knowledge, which often provide insufficient visual evidence for fine-grained appearance variation, rare categories, and cluttered scenes. In this paper, we propose VL-SAM-v3, a unified framework that augments open-world detection with retrieval-grounded external visual memory. Specifically, once candidate categories are available, VL-SAM-v3 retrieves relevant visual prototypes from a non-parametric memory bank and transforms them into two complementary visual priors, i.e., sparse priors for instance-level spatial anchoring and dense priors for class-aware local context. These priors are integrated with the original detection prompts via Memory-Guided Prompt Refinement, enabling a shared retrieval-and-refinement mechanism that supports open-vocabulary and open-ended inference. Extensive zero-shot experiments on LVIS show that VL-SAM-v3 consistently improves detection performance under both open-vocabulary and open-ended inference, with particularly strong gains on rare categories. Moreover, experiments with a stronger open-vocabulary detector (i.e., SAM3) validate the generality of the proposed retrieval-and-refinement mechanism.

analysis.tldr: VL-SAM-v3 通过检索外部视觉记忆库生成稀疏和稠密先验，增强开放世界目标检测的细粒度识别能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有开放世界目标检测方法依赖粗粒度文本语义和参数化知识，难以处理细粒度外观变化、稀有类别和杂乱场景。
analysis.problem: 如何利用外部视觉记忆为开放世界检测提供细粒度视觉先验，同时支持开放词汇和开放端推理。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出VL-SAM-v3框架，从非参数记忆库检索视觉原型，转化为稀疏先验（实例级空间锚定）和稠密先验（类别感知局部上下文），并通过记忆引导提示精炼与原始检测提示融合。
contributions: 提出检索-精炼共享机制，统一支持开放词汇和开放端推理。
设计稀疏和稠密两种互补视觉先验，提升细粒度识别。
在LVIS零样本实验上显著提升开放世界检测性能，尤其稀有类别。
analysis.experiments: 在LVIS数据集上进行零样本实验，开放词汇和开放端推理均取得一致提升，稀有类别增益明显；在更强检测器SAM3上验证了机制的通用性。
limitations: 依赖外部记忆库的质量和规模。
可能增加推理时的检索开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，实验充分，对开放世界检测有显著提升，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: VL-SAM-v3 通过检索外部视觉记忆库生成稀疏和稠密先验，增强开放世界目标检测的细粒度识别能力。

papers.title: Learning reveals invisible structure in low-rank RNNs
papers.abstract: Learning in neural systems arises from synaptic changes that reshape the representations underlying behavior. While low-rank recurrent neural networks (RNNs) have emerged as a powerful framework for linking connectivity to function, a theoretical understanding of their learning process remains elusive. Here, we extend the low-rank framework from activity to learning by deriving gradient-descent dynamics directly in a reduced overlap space. We formulate a closed-form, low-dimensional system of ODEs that governs learning in this space, exact for linear RNNs and asymptotically exact for nonlinear RNNs in the large-$N$ Gaussian limit. Central to our analysis is a distinction between two classes of overlaps: loss-visible overlaps, which fully determine network activity, output, and loss, and loss-invisible overlaps, which do not affect function but are required to describe learning. We illustrate the consequences of this decomposition through two phenomena. First, we show that learning can serve as a perturbation that exposes differences in connectivity between functionally equivalent networks. Second, we show that loss-invisible overlaps can act as memory variables that encode training history, and characterize the conditions under which this occurs. Finally, we present several testable predictions for biological learning experiments derived from our theory.

analysis.tldr: 通过将低秩RNN的学习动力学投影到重叠空间，揭示了损失不可见重叠在学习和记忆中的作用。
analysis.research_motivation: 低秩RNN是连接连接性与功能的强大框架，但其学习过程的理论理解仍然缺乏，尤其是如何从活动空间扩展到学习空间。
analysis.problem: 推导低秩RNN在梯度下降下的学习动力学，并区分损失可见与损失不可见重叠对学习的影响。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但理论分析表明损失不可见重叠可作为记忆变量编码训练历史，且学习可揭示功能等价网络间的连接性差异。
analysis.method: 将低秩RNN的学习动力学投影到低维重叠空间，推导出闭合形式的ODE系统（线性RNN精确，非线性RNN在大N高斯极限下渐近精确），并区分损失可见与损失不可见重叠。
contributions: 建立了低秩RNN在重叠空间中的学习动力学理论，得到闭合形式ODE。
揭示了损失不可见重叠作为记忆变量编码训练历史的条件。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 理论主要针对低秩RNN，可能不直接适用于全秩网络。
非线性情况仅在大N高斯极限下渐近精确，实际有限N网络可能有偏差。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to neuroscience & cognitive science
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 神经/认知科学
analysis.reason: 理论贡献扎实，但缺乏实验验证，且与当前重点方向（VLM/视频生成等）弱相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过将低秩RNN的学习动力学投影到重叠空间，揭示了损失不可见重叠在学习和记忆中的作用。

papers.title: Exposing LLM Safety Gaps Through Mathematical Encoding:New Attacks and Systematic Analysis
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) employ safety mechanisms to prevent harmful outputs, yet these defenses primarily rely on semantic pattern matching. We show that encoding harmful prompts as coherent mathematical problems -- using formalisms such as set theory, formal logic, and quantum mechanics -- bypasses these filters at high rates, achieving 46%--56% average attack success across eight target models and two established benchmarks. Crucially, the effectiveness depends not on mathematical notation itself, but on whether a helper LLM deeply reformulates the harmful content into a genuine mathematical problem: rule-based encodings that apply mathematical formatting without such reformulation perform no better than unencoded baselines. We introduce a novel Formal Logic encoding that achieves attack success comparable to Set Theory, demonstrating that this vulnerability generalizes across mathematical formalisms. Additional experiments with repeat post-processing confirm that these attacks are robust to simple prompt augmentation. Notably, newer models (GPT-5, GPT-5-Mini) show substantially greater robustness than older models, though they remain vulnerable. Our findings highlight fundamental gaps in current safety frameworks and motivate defenses that reason about mathematical structure rather than surface-level semantics.

analysis.tldr: 通过数学编码（如集合论、形式逻辑）将有害提示转化为数学问题，可高成功率绕过LLM安全过滤，揭示当前安全机制依赖语义匹配的漏洞。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM安全机制主要依赖语义模式匹配，无法识别以数学形式编码的有害内容，存在严重安全漏洞。
analysis.problem: 如何利用数学编码绕过LLM的安全过滤，并系统分析其有效性及影响因素。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 数学编码的有效性取决于是否将有害内容深度重构为真正的数学问题，而非仅使用数学符号；规则化编码效果与未编码基线无异。
analysis.method: 提出基于形式逻辑的数学编码方法，将有害提示转化为集合论、形式逻辑或量子力学等数学问题，并测试多种LLM的防御效果。
contributions: 揭示数学编码可高成功率绕过LLM安全过滤，平均攻击成功率46%-56%。
发现攻击有效性依赖于对有害内容的深度数学重构，而非表面数学符号。
提出形式逻辑编码方法，证明漏洞跨数学形式主义泛化。
验证攻击对重复后处理具有鲁棒性，并发现新模型（GPT-5系列）鲁棒性更强但仍存在漏洞。
analysis.experiments: 在8个目标模型和两个基准上测试，平均攻击成功率46%-56%；对比规则化编码与深度重构编码；测试重复后处理鲁棒性；比较新旧模型鲁棒性。
limitations: 未测试更多类型的数学形式主义（如概率论、图论）。
未提出具体防御方法，仅指出漏洞。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 方法新颖，揭示重要安全漏洞，实验充分，与LLM安全对齐方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过数学编码（如集合论、形式逻辑）将有害提示转化为数学问题，可高成功率绕过LLM安全过滤，揭示当前安全机制依赖语义匹配的漏洞。

papers.title: Mantis: Mamba-native Tuning is Efficient for 3D Point Cloud Foundation Models
papers.abstract: Pre-trained 3D point cloud foundation models (PFMs) have demonstrated strong transferability across diverse downstream tasks. However, full fine-tuning these models is computationally expensive and storage-intensive. Parameter-efficient fine-tuning (PEFT) offers a promising alternative, but existing PEFT approaches are primarily designed for Transformer-based backbones and rely on token-level prompting or feature transformation. Mamba-based backbones introduce a granularity mismatch between token-level adaptation and state-level sequence dynamics. Consequently, straightforward transfer of existing PEFT approaches to frozen Mamba backbones leads to substantial accuracy degradation and unstable optimization. To address this issue, we propose Mantis, the first Mamba-native PEFT framework for 3D PFMs. Specifically, a State-Aware Adapter (SAA) is introduced to inject lightweight task-conditioned control signals into selective state-space updates, enabling state-level adaptation while keeping the pre-trained backbone frozen. Moreover, different valid point cloud serializations are regularized by Dual-Serialization Consistency Distillation (DSCD), thereby reducing serialization-induced instability. Extensive experiments across multiple benchmarks demonstrate that our Mantis achieves competitive performance with only about 5% trainable parameters. Our code is available at https://github.com/gzhhhhhhh/Mantis.

analysis.tldr: 提出首个面向Mamba架构3D点云基础模型的参数高效微调框架Mantis，通过状态感知适配器和双序列化一致性蒸馏实现高效微调。
analysis.research_motivation: 预训练3D点云基础模型全量微调计算和存储成本高，现有参数高效微调方法主要针对Transformer设计，无法直接适配Mamba架构的序列状态动态，导致精度下降和优化不稳定。
analysis.problem: 如何为Mamba架构的3D点云基础模型设计有效的参数高效微调方法，解决token级适配与状态级序列动态之间的粒度不匹配问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 直接将现有PEFT方法迁移到冻结的Mamba骨干会导致显著的精度下降和优化不稳定，原因是Mamba的序列状态动态与token级适配存在粒度不匹配。
analysis.method: 提出Mantis框架，包含状态感知适配器（SAA）注入轻量任务条件控制信号到选择性状态空间更新中，实现状态级适配；以及双序列化一致性蒸馏（DSCD）正则化不同点云序列化方式，减少序列化引起的不稳定性。
contributions: 首个面向Mamba架构3D点云基础模型的参数高效微调框架Mantis。
提出状态感知适配器（SAA）实现状态级适配，仅需约5%可训练参数。
提出双序列化一致性蒸馏（DSCD）提升序列化稳定性。
analysis.experiments: 在多个基准上进行广泛实验，Mantis仅用约5%可训练参数即达到竞争性能。
limitations: 仅针对3D点云Mamba模型，未验证在其他模态Mamba模型上的有效性。
DSCD依赖多种序列化方式，可能增加训练复杂度。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 针对Mamba架构的PEFT方法具有创新性，实验显示高效性，但应用范围限于3D点云，影响有限。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出首个面向Mamba架构3D点云基础模型的参数高效微调框架Mantis，通过状态感知适配器和双序列化一致性蒸馏实现高效微调。

papers.title: Learning Discriminative Signed Distance Functions from Multi-scale Level-of-detail Features for 3D Anomaly Detection
papers.abstract: Detecting anomalies from 3D point clouds has received increasing attention in the field of computer vision, with some group-based or point-based methods achieving impressive results in recent years. However, learning accurate point-wise representations for 3D anomaly detection faces great challenges due to the large scale and sparsity of point clouds. In this study, a surface-based method is proposed for 3D anomaly detection, which learns a discriminative signed distance function using multi-scale level-of-detail features. We first present a Noisy Points Generation (NPG) module to generate different types of noise, thereby facilitating the learning of discriminative features by exposing abnormal points. Then, we introduce a Multi-scale Level-of-detail Feature (MLF) module to capture multi-scale information from a point cloud, which provides both fine-grained local and coarse-grained global feature information. Finally, we design an Implicit Surface Discrimination (ISD) module that leverages the extracted multi-scale features to learn an implicit surface representation of point clouds, which effectively trains a signed distance function to distinguish between abnormal and normal points. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed method achieves an average object-level AUROC of 92.1\% and 85.9\% on the Anomaly-ShapeNet and Real3D-AD datasets, outperforming the current best approach by 2.1\% and 3.6\%, respectively. Codes are available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/DLF-3AD-DA61.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于多尺度细节特征的判别性符号距离函数用于3D点云异常检测，在Anomaly-ShapeNet和Real3D-AD上分别提升2.1%和3.6% AUROC。
analysis.research_motivation: 3D点云异常检测面临点云规模大且稀疏的挑战，现有方法难以学习精确的点级表示。
analysis.problem: 如何从3D点云中学习判别性点级特征以准确检测异常点。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出表面级方法，包含噪声点生成模块（NPG）生成多种噪声暴露异常点、多尺度细节特征模块（MLF）捕获局部和全局信息、隐式表面判别模块（ISD）学习符号距离函数区分正常与异常点。
contributions: 提出NPG模块生成多种噪声以辅助判别性特征学习。
设计MLF模块捕获多尺度细节特征。
提出ISD模块利用多尺度特征学习隐式表面表示，训练判别性符号距离函数。
analysis.experiments: 在Anomaly-ShapeNet和Real3D-AD数据集上评估，平均对象级AUROC分别达92.1%和85.9%，超越当前最优方法2.1%和3.6%。
limitations: 可能对噪声类型和尺度参数敏感。
未在更多样化的真实场景数据集上验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法有明确创新且实验提升显著，但属于特定任务改进，适合相关方向读者精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于多尺度细节特征的判别性符号距离函数用于3D点云异常检测，在Anomaly-ShapeNet和Real3D-AD上分别提升2.1%和3.6% AUROC。

papers.title: MK-ResRecon: Multi-Kernel Residual Framework for Texture-Aware 3D MRI Refinement from Sparse 2D Slices
papers.abstract: Magnetic Resonance Imaging (MRI) acquisition remains a time-intensive and patient-straining process, as prolonged scan dura- tions increase the likelihood of motion artifacts, which degrade image quality and frequently require repeated scans. To address these chal- lenges, we propose a novel framework with two models MK-ResRecon and IdentityRefineNet3D to reconstruct high-fidelity 3D MRI volumes from sparsely sampled 2D slices-requiring only 12.5% of the axial slices for full resolution 3D reconstruction. MK-ResRecon predicts missing in- termediate 2D slices using a multi-kernel texture-aware loss, preserving fine anatomical details. IdentityRefineNet3D refines the predicted slices and the original sparse slices as a single 3D volume to obtain a smooth anatomical structure. We train the models on a large T1-sequence POST- contrast brain MRI dataset and evaluate on a large heterogeneous brain MRI cohort. The work provides accurate, hallucination-free, generaliz- able and clinically validated framework for 3D MRI reconstruction from highly sparse inputs and enables a clinically viable path towards faster and more patient-friendly MRI imaging.

analysis.tldr: 提出多核残差框架MK-ResRecon和IdentityRefineNet3D，从稀疏2D切片重建高保真3D MRI体积，仅需12.5%轴向切片。
analysis.research_motivation: MRI采集耗时且易产生运动伪影，导致图像质量下降和重复扫描，需要更快速、患者友好的成像方法。
analysis.problem: 从高度稀疏的2D切片（仅12.5%轴向切片）重建高保真、无幻觉的3D MRI体积。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出双模型框架：MK-ResRecon使用多核纹理感知损失预测缺失的中间2D切片，保留精细解剖细节；IdentityRefineNet3D将预测切片与原始稀疏切片作为3D体积进行细化，获得平滑解剖结构。
contributions: 提出MK-ResRecon和IdentityRefineNet3D框架，实现从12.5%稀疏切片重建高保真3D MRI。
引入多核纹理感知损失，保留精细解剖细节并避免幻觉。
在大规模脑MRI数据集上训练和验证，证明框架的准确性、泛化性和临床可行性。
analysis.experiments: 在T1序列对比增强脑MRI数据集上训练，并在大型异质脑MRI队列上评估，结果准确、无幻觉、可泛化且经临床验证。
limitations: 仅针对T1序列对比增强脑MRI，可能不适用于其他序列或身体部位。
依赖特定稀疏采样模式（12.5%轴向切片），其他采样模式未验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新（多核纹理感知损失、双模型框架）且临床验证，但仅针对脑MRI，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出多核残差框架MK-ResRecon和IdentityRefineNet3D，从稀疏2D切片重建高保真3D MRI体积，仅需12.5%轴向切片。

papers.title: DynaTab: Dynamic Feature Ordering as Neural Rewiring for High-Dimensional Tabular Data
papers.abstract: High-dimensional tabular data lacks a natural feature order, limiting the applicability of permutation-sensitive deep learning models. We propose DynaTab, a dynamic feature ordering-enabled architecture inspired by neural rewiring. We introduce a lightweight criterion that predicts when feature permutation will benefit a dataset by quantifying its intrinsic complexity. DynaTab dynamically reorders features via a neural rewiring algorithm and processes them through a compact, dynamic order-aware combination of separate learned positional embedding, importance-based gating, and masked attention layers, compatible with any sequence-sensitive backbone. Trained end-to-end with bespoke dynamic feature ordering (DFO) and dispersion losses, DynaTab achieves statistically significant gains, particularly on high-dimensional datasets, where it is benchmarked against 45 state-of-the-art baselines across 36 different real-world tabular datasets. Our results position DynaTab as a compelling new paradigm for high-dimensional tabular deep learning.

analysis.tldr: DynaTab通过动态特征排序和神经重连机制，显著提升了高维表格数据的深度学习性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 高维表格数据缺乏天然的特征顺序，限制了置换敏感型深度学习模型的应用，现有方法难以有效处理这种无序性。
analysis.problem: 如何为高维表格数据动态确定最优特征顺序，以提升深度学习模型的性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出DynaTab架构，包含轻量级准则预测特征置换收益、神经重连算法动态重排特征，以及结合位置嵌入、重要性门控和掩码注意力的顺序感知处理模块，并采用动态特征排序和分散损失进行端到端训练。
contributions: 提出动态特征排序机制，通过神经重连自适应调整特征顺序。
设计轻量级准则预测特征置换对数据集的有效性。
在36个真实表格数据集上对比45个基线，验证了高维场景下的显著优势。
analysis.experiments: 在36个真实表格数据集上，与45个最先进基线进行对比，高维数据集上取得统计显著提升。
limitations: 可能对低维或简单数据集提升有限。
动态排序增加了计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.reason: 方法新颖，实验充分，但属于表格数据特定领域，与重点方向相关性中等。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: DynaTab通过动态特征排序和神经重连机制，显著提升了高维表格数据的深度学习性能。

papers.title: Replacing Parameters with Preferences: Federated Alignment of Heterogeneous Vision-Language Models
papers.abstract: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) have broad potential in privacy-sensitive domains such as healthcare and finance, yet strict data-sharing constraints render centralized training infeasible. Federated Learning mitigates this issue by enabling decentralized training, but practical deployments face challenges due to client heterogeneity in computational resources, application requirements, and model architectures. Under extreme model and data heterogeneity, replacing parameter aggregation with preference-based collaboration offers a more suitable interface, as it eliminates the need for direct parameter or data exchange. Motivated by this, we propose MoR, a federated alignment framework that combines GRPO with Mixture-of-Rewards for heterogeneous VLMs. In MoR, each client locally trains a reward model from local preference annotations, capturing specific evaluation signals without exposing raw data. To combine these heterogeneous supervision signals, MoR introduces a Mixture-of-Rewards mechanism with learned routing, which adaptively fuses client reward models according to the input and alignment objective. The server then optimizes a base VLM using GRPO with a KL penalty to a reference model, enabling preference alignment without requiring client models to share architectures or parameters. Experiments on diverse public vision-language benchmarks demonstrate that MoR consistently outperforms federated alignment baselines in generalization and cross-client adaptability. Our approach provides a scalable solution for privacy-preserving alignment of heterogeneous VLMs under federated settings.

analysis.tldr: 提出MoR框架，通过偏好奖励融合实现异构VLM的联邦对齐，无需共享参数或数据。
analysis.research_motivation: 隐私敏感领域（如医疗、金融）中VLM的集中训练不可行，联邦学习虽能实现去中心化训练，但客户端在计算资源、应用需求和模型架构上的异构性带来挑战，传统参数聚合方法在极端异构下效果不佳。
analysis.problem: 如何在客户端模型和数据高度异构的联邦场景下，实现VLM的有效对齐，同时避免直接交换参数或数据。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出在极端模型和数据异构下，参数聚合不再适用，偏好协作成为更合适的接口。
analysis.method: 提出MoR框架，结合GRPO与混合奖励机制（Mixture-of-Rewards）。每个客户端本地训练奖励模型，服务器通过可学习路由融合这些奖励模型，并利用GRPO优化基础VLM，实现偏好对齐。
contributions: 提出MoR，首个结合GRPO与混合奖励的联邦对齐框架，支持异构VLM。
引入Mixture-of-Rewards机制，自适应融合客户端奖励模型，无需共享架构或参数。
在多个视觉-语言基准上验证了MoR在泛化和跨客户端适应性上的优势。
analysis.experiments: 在多个公开视觉-语言基准上，MoR在泛化和跨客户端适应性上持续优于联邦对齐基线。
limitations: 可能依赖客户端奖励模型的训练质量，若标注偏好噪声大可能影响性能。
未讨论服务器端基础VLM的初始选择对最终效果的影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 方法新颖，针对联邦异构VLM对齐问题，实验充分，与重点方向强相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出MoR框架，通过偏好奖励融合实现异构VLM的联邦对齐，无需共享参数或数据。

papers.title: Adaptive Dual-Path Framework for Covert Semantic Communication
papers.abstract: This paper proposes a novel adaptive dual-path framework for covert semantic communication (SemCom), which integrates covert information transmission with task-oriented semantic coding. Unlike conventional covert communication methods that embed hidden messages through power-domain signal superposition, our framework embeds covert data within task-specific features via semantic-level intrinsic encoding. This new architecture introduces dual encoding paths with adaptive block selection: an Explicit path for public task execution and a Stego path that jointly encodes both public and covert information through contrastive representation alignment. A Gumbel-Softmax enabled adaptive path selection mechanism dynamically activates network blocks based on task require- ments. We formulate a multi-objective optimization framework that simultaneously ensures accurate semantic understanding and reliable covert transmission. We rigorously evaluate our framework's security against a powerful, independently trained attacker. Experimental results on the Cityscapes dataset demon- strate a state-of-the-art level of covertness: our method suppresses the attacker's detection accuracy to a near-random guessing level of 56.12%. This robust security is achieved while simultaneously maintaining superior performance on the primary semantic tasks compared to the baselines.

analysis.tldr: 提出自适应双路径框架，通过语义级隐写实现隐蔽通信，在Cityscapes上使攻击者检测精度降至56.12%。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统隐蔽通信依赖功率域信号叠加，易被检测且与语义任务脱节，亟需一种与任务语义编码深度融合的隐蔽传输方法。
analysis.problem: 如何在保证主任务语义理解性能的同时，实现高安全性的隐蔽信息传输。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。

contributions: 提出语义级内在编码的隐蔽通信框架，将隐蔽数据嵌入任务特定特征而非信号功率域。
设计自适应双路径架构与Gumbel-Softmax路径选择机制，实现任务驱动的动态编码。
在Cityscapes上达到SOTA隐蔽性，攻击者检测精度降至56.12%，同时保持主任务性能。
analysis.experiments: 在Cityscapes数据集上评估，攻击者检测精度为56.12%（接近随机猜测），主任务性能优于基线。

papers.title: Deepfake Audio Detection Using Self-supervised Fusion Representations
papers.abstract: This paper describes a submission to the Environment-Aware Speech and Sound Deepfake Detection Challenge (ESDD2) 2026, which addresses component-level deepfake detection using the CompSpoofV2 dataset, where speech and environmental sounds may be independently manipulated. To address this challenge, a dual-branch deepfake detection framework is proposed to jointly model speech and environmental contextual representations from input audio. Two pretrained models, XLS-R for speech and BEATs for environmental sound, are used to extract complementary contextual representations. A Matching Head is introduced to model representation differences through statistical normalization and representation interaction, enabling estimation of the original class. In parallel, multi-head cross-attention enables effective information exchange between speech and environmental components. The refined representations are processed with residual connections and layer normalization, and passed to an AASIST classifier to predict speech-based and environment-based spoofing probabilities. The model outputs original, speech, and environment predictions. On the test set, the proposed system achieves an F1-score of 70.20% and an environmental EER of 16.54%, outperforming the baseline system.

analysis.tldr: 提出双分支融合框架，利用自监督模型XLS-R和BEATs提取语音与环境表征，通过匹配头与交叉注意力实现深度伪造音频检测。
analysis.research_motivation: 环境感知语音与声音深度伪造检测挑战中，语音和环境声音可能被独立操控，现有方法难以有效建模两者的联合表征。
analysis.problem: 解决组件级深度伪造音频检测中语音与环境声音独立操控的联合建模问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 双分支框架：XLS-R提取语音表征，BEATs提取环境表征；Matching Head通过统计归一化和表征交互建模差异；多头部交叉注意力实现信息交换；残差连接与层归一化后经AASIST分类器输出三类预测。
contributions: 提出双分支融合框架联合建模语音与环境上下文表征
引入Matching Head和交叉注意力机制提升深度伪造检测性能
analysis.experiments: 在CompSpoofV2测试集上，F1-score为70.20%，环境EER为16.54%，优于基线系统。
limitations: 依赖预训练模型XLS-R和BEATs，可能泛化性受限
仅针对特定数据集和挑战，未验证跨场景性能

papers.title: KARMA-MV: A Benchmark for Causal Question Answering on Music Videos
papers.abstract: While significant progress has been made in Video Question Answering and cross-modal understanding, causal reasoning about how visual dynamics drive musical structure in music videos remains under-explored. We introduce KARMA-MV, a large-scale multiple-choice QA dataset derived from 2,682 YouTube music videos, designed to test models' ability to integrate temporal audio-visual cues and reason about visual-to-musical influence across reasoning, prediction, and counterfactual questions. Unlike traditional datasets requiring manual annotation, KARMA-MV leverages LLM reasoning for scalable generation and validation, yielding 37,737 MCQs. We propose a causal knowledge graph (CKG) approach that augments vision-language models (VLMs) with structured retrieval of cross-modal dependencies. Experiments on state-of-the-art VLMs and LLMs show consistent gains from CKG grounding -- especially for smaller models -- establishing the value of explicit causal structure for music-video reasoning. KARMA-MV provides a new benchmark for advancing causal audio-visual understanding beyond correlation.

analysis.tldr: KARMA-MV 是一个用于音乐视频中因果问答的大规模基准数据集，通过因果知识图谱增强视觉-语言模型，显著提升因果推理能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有视频问答和跨模态理解研究主要关注相关性，而音乐视频中视觉动态如何驱动音乐结构的因果推理尚未被充分探索。
analysis.problem: 缺乏专门评估音乐视频中视觉-音乐因果推理能力的数据集和方法。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建大规模多选题问答数据集 KARMA-MV（来自 2,682 个 YouTube 音乐视频，含 37,737 道题），并设计因果知识图谱（CKG）方法增强视觉-语言模型的结构化检索能力。
contributions: 提出 KARMA-MV，首个大规模音乐视频因果问答基准数据集。
提出因果知识图谱（CKG）方法，通过结构化跨模态依赖检索提升 VLM 的因果推理能力。
analysis.experiments: 在多个 SOTA VLM 和 LLM 上实验，CKG 方法持续带来性能提升，尤其对小模型效果显著。
limitations: 数据集仅涵盖音乐视频领域，泛化性未知。

papers.title: Learning to Theorize the World from Observation
papers.abstract: What does it mean to understand the world? Contemporary world models often operationalize understanding as accurate future prediction in latent or observation space. Developmental cognitive science, however, suggests a different view: human understanding emerges through the construction of internal theories of how the world works, even before mature language is acquired. Inspired by this theory-building view of cognition, we introduce Learning-to-Theorize, a learning paradigm for inferring explicit explanatory theories of the world from raw, non-textual observations. We instantiate this paradigm with the Neural Theorizer (NEO), a probabilistic neural model that induces latent programs as a learned Language of Thought and executes them through a shared transition model. In NEO, a theory is represented as an executable, compositional program whose learned primitives can be systematically recombined to explain novel phenomena. Experiments show that this formulation enables explanation-driven generalization, allowing observations to be understood in terms of the programs that generate them.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种从原始观测中推断显式解释性理论的认知学习范式，并实例化为神经理论化器（NEO）。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有世界模型通常将理解等同于准确预测，而发展认知科学表明人类理解是通过构建内部理论实现的，这启发了从原始观测中学习显式理论的新范式。
analysis.problem: 如何让机器从非文本的原始观测中推断出可解释、可组合的显式理论，而非仅进行隐式预测。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Learning-to-Theorize范式，并实例化为NEO模型，该模型使用概率神经模型将观测归纳为潜在程序（作为学习到的思维语言），并通过共享转移模型执行这些程序，从而得到可执行、可组合的显式理论。
contributions: 提出Learning-to-Theorize学习范式，从认知科学理论构建视角重新定义世界理解。
提出NEO模型，能够从原始观测中学习可组合的显式程序化理论，并实现解释驱动的泛化。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。

papers.title: Smart Passive Acoustic Monitoring: Embedding a Classifier on AudioMoth Microcontroller
papers.abstract: Passive Acoustic Monitoring (PAM) is an efficient and non-invasive method for surveying ecosystems at a reduced cost. Typically, autonomous recorders allow the acquisition of vast bioacoustic datasets which are then analyzed. However, power consumption and data storage are both scarce and limit the duration of acquisition campaigns. To address this issue, we propose a smart PAM system which allows the in-situ analysis of the soundscape by embedding a classifier directly onto an AudioMoth microcontroller. Specifically, we propose an optimized yet simple 1D Convolutional Neural Network (1D-CNN) to classify the raw audio. The model focuses on the specific call of Scopoli Shearwater seabirds (endangered species) and is trained on a real-world dataset with a classification accuracy of 91\% (balanced accuracy of 89\%). We also propose a process to optimize the model to fit the severe resource constraints of the AudioMoth, achieving a \~10kB RAM memory footprint and 20ms inference time. Finally, we present an open-source tutorial of our model optimization and export strategy which can be used for embedding models beyond the scope of our study. Our modified version of the AudioMoth firmware adds two functions: (F1) which selectively records data when the target species has been detected and (F2) which logs the continuous classification results in real time. This work intends to facilitate the conception of intelligent sensors, enhancing the efficiency and scalability of bioacoustic monitoring campaigns.

analysis.tldr: 在AudioMoth微控制器上嵌入1D-CNN实现濒危海鸟叫声的实时分类，降低功耗与存储需求。
analysis.research_motivation: 被动声学监测（PAM）中，自主录音设备功耗高、存储有限，限制了采集时长；传统方法需事后分析，无法实时处理。
analysis.problem: 如何在资源极度受限的微控制器（如AudioMoth）上实现高效的音频分类，以支持原位声景分析。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出一个优化的1D卷积神经网络（1D-CNN），直接处理原始音频；通过模型压缩（~10kB RAM、20ms推理）适配AudioMoth硬件；修改固件增加选择性记录（F1）和实时分类日志（F2）功能。
contributions: 首个在AudioMoth微控制器上嵌入1D-CNN实现实时鸟类叫声分类的系统。
开源模型优化与导出教程，可推广至其他嵌入式生物声学应用。
analysis.experiments: 在真实数据集上达到91%分类准确率（平衡准确率89%），模型内存占用约10kB，推理时间20ms。
limitations: 仅针对单一物种（Scopoli Shearwater）进行验证，泛化性未知。
