papers.title: Geometry over Density: Few-Shot Cross-Domain OOD Detection
papers.abstract: Out-of-distribution (OOD) detection identifies test samples that fall outside a model's training distribution, a capability critical for safe deployment in high-stakes applications. Standard OOD detectors are trained on a specific in-distribution (ID) dataset and detect deviations from that single domain. In contrast, we study few-shot cross-domain OOD detection: given a \emph{single} pre-trained model, can we perform OOD detection on \emph{arbitrary} new ID-OOD task pairs using only a handful of ID samples at inference time, with no additional training? We propose \textbf{UFCOD}, a unified framework that achieves this goal through information-geometric analysis of diffusion trajectories. Our key insight is that diffusion noise predictions are score functions (gradients of log-density), and we extract two energy features: \emph{Path Energy} (integrated score magnitude) and \emph{Dynamics Energy} (score smoothness), that form a discrete Sobolev norm capturing how samples interact with the learned diffusion process. The central contribution is a \textbf{train-once, deploy-anywhere} paradigm: a diffusion model trained on a single dataset (e.g., CelebA) serves as a universal feature extractor for OOD detection across semantically unrelated domains (e.g., CIFAR-10, SVHN, Textures). At deployment, each new task requires only $\sim$100 unlabeled ID samples for inference: no retraining, no fine-tuning, no task-specific adaptation. Using 100 ID samples per task, UFCOD achieves 93.7\% average AUROC across 12 cross-domain benchmarks, competitive with methods trained on 50k--163k samples, demonstrating $\sim$500$\times$ improvement in sample efficiency. See our code in https://github.com/lili0415/UFCOD.

analysis.tldr: 提出UFCOD框架，利用扩散轨迹的几何能量特征实现无需重训练的少样本跨域OOD检测。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有OOD检测方法需要针对特定ID数据集训练，无法灵活适应任意新ID-OOD任务对，且样本效率低。
analysis.problem: 如何仅用少量ID样本（约100个）实现任意新域对的OOD检测，无需额外训练或微调。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 扩散模型的噪声预测本质上是得分函数，其轨迹的路径能量和动力学能量构成离散Sobolev范数，能有效区分ID和OOD样本。
analysis.method: 提出UFCOD框架，基于扩散轨迹的信息几何分析，提取路径能量和动力学能量两种特征，构建统一OOD检测器。
contributions: 提出train-once, deploy-anywhere范式，单个扩散模型即可作为通用特征提取器用于任意跨域OOD检测。
设计基于扩散轨迹几何能量的特征，无需任务特定训练，仅需约100个ID样本即可达到高AUROC。
analysis.experiments: 在12个跨域基准上，使用100个ID样本平均AUROC达93.7%，与使用5万-16.3万样本训练的方法相当，样本效率提升约500倍。
limitations: 依赖扩散模型作为特征提取器，可能受限于扩散模型本身的质量。
仅验证了图像域，未涉及其他模态（如文本、音频）。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，样本效率提升显著，实验充分，与视觉理解方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出UFCOD框架，利用扩散轨迹的几何能量特征实现无需重训练的少样本跨域OOD检测。

papers.title: Robust Agent Compensation (RAC): Teaching AI Agents to Compensate
papers.abstract: We present Robust Agent Compensation (RAC), a log-based recovery paradigm (providing a safety net) implemented through an architectural extension that can be applied to most Agent frameworks to support reliable executions (avoiding unintended side effects). Users can choose to enable RAC without changing their current agent code (e.g., LangGraph agents). The proposed approach can be implemented in most existing agent frameworks via their existing extension points. We present an implementation based on LangChain, demonstrate its viability through the $τ$-bench and REALM-Bench, and show that when solving complex problems, RAC is 1.5-8X or more better in both latency and token economy compared to state-of-the-art LLM-based recovery approaches.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种日志驱动的恢复范式RAC，通过架构扩展提升AI Agent的鲁棒性，在复杂任务中比LLM恢复方法延迟和token消耗降低1.5-8倍。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有AI Agent在执行复杂任务时容易产生意外副作用，缺乏可靠的恢复机制，而基于LLM的恢复方法延迟高、token消耗大。
analysis.problem: 如何在不修改现有Agent代码的前提下，实现高效、低开销的故障恢复，避免执行中的意外副作用。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Robust Agent Compensation (RAC)，一种基于日志的恢复范式，通过架构扩展（如LangChain扩展点）实现，用户无需修改现有Agent代码即可启用。
contributions: 提出RAC范式，一种日志驱动的恢复机制，可应用于大多数Agent框架。
在τ-bench和REALM-Bench上验证，相比SOTA LLM恢复方法，延迟和token消耗降低1.5-8倍。
analysis.experiments: 在τ-bench和REALM-Bench上评估，与基于LLM的恢复方法对比，RAC在延迟和token经济性上提升1.5-8倍。
limitations: 可能仅适用于日志可记录的场景。
未讨论对非确定性Agent行为的恢复效果。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 方法创新且实验显示显著效率提升，与Agent方向强相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种日志驱动的恢复范式RAC，通过架构扩展提升AI Agent的鲁棒性，在复杂任务中比LLM恢复方法延迟和token消耗降低1.5-8倍。

papers.title: Discovering Reinforcement Learning Interfaces with Large Language Models
papers.abstract: Reinforcement learning systems rely on environment interfaces that specify observations and reward functions, yet constructing these interfaces for new tasks often requires substantial manual effort. While recent work has automated reward design using large language models (LLMs), these approaches assume fixed observations and do not address the broader challenge of synthesizing complete task interfaces. We study RL task interface discovery from raw simulator state, where both observation mappings and reward functions must be generated. We propose LIMEN (Code available at https://github.com/Lossfunk/LIMEN), a LLM guided evolutionary framework that produces candidate interfaces as executable programs and iteratively refines them using policy training feedback. Across novel discrete gridworld tasks and continuous control domains spanning locomotion and manipulation, joint evolution of observations and rewards discovers effective interfaces given only a trajectory-level success metric, while optimizing either component alone fails on at least one domain. These results demonstrate that automatic construction of RL interfaces from raw state can substantially reduce manual engineering and that observation and reward components often benefit from co-design, as single-component optimization fails catastrophically on at least one domain in our evaluation suite.

analysis.tldr: 提出LIMEN框架，利用LLM引导进化搜索，从原始模拟器状态自动发现强化学习任务接口（观测映射+奖励函数），减少人工设计。
analysis.research_motivation: 构建强化学习环境接口（观测和奖励函数）通常需要大量人工设计，现有自动化方法仅关注奖励设计且假设观测固定，无法解决完整接口合成的挑战。
analysis.problem: 如何从原始模拟器状态自动合成完整的RL任务接口，包括观测映射和奖励函数。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出LIMEN，一种LLM引导的进化框架，将候选接口表示为可执行程序，利用策略训练反馈迭代优化，联合进化观测和奖励。
contributions: 提出LIMEN框架，首次实现从原始状态自动发现完整的RL任务接口（观测+奖励）。
实验表明联合进化观测和奖励优于单独优化任一组件，且单组件优化在至少一个领域失败。
analysis.experiments: 在离散网格世界任务和连续控制域（包括运动与操作）上评估，仅使用轨迹级成功度量，联合进化发现有效接口。
limitations: 可能依赖LLM的初始候选质量。
进化搜索的计算成本可能较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.reason: 方法新颖，结合LLM与进化搜索解决RL接口设计痛点，实验验证有效，但技术细节和局限性需进一步阅读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出LIMEN框架，利用LLM引导进化搜索，从原始模拟器状态自动发现强化学习任务接口（观测映射+奖励函数），减少人工设计。

papers.title: TsallisPGD: Adaptive Gradient Weighting for Adversarial Attacks on Semantic Segmentation
papers.abstract: Attacking semantic segmentation models is significantly harder than image classification models because an attacker must flip thousands of pixel predictions simultaneously. Standard pixel-wise cross-entropy (CE) is ill-suited to this setting: it tends to overemphasize already-misclassified pixels, which slows optimization and overstates model robustness. To address these issues, we introduce TsallisPGD, an adversarial attack built on the Tsallis cross-entropy, a generalization of CE parameterized by $q$, which adaptively reshapes the gradient landscape by controlling gradient concentration across pixels. By varying $q$, we steer the attack toward pixels at different confidence levels. We first show that no single fixed-$q$ is universally optimal, as its effectiveness depends on the dataset, model architecture, and perturbation budget. Motivated by this, we propose a dynamic $q$-schedule that sweeps $q$ during optimization. Extensive experiments on Cityscapes, Pascal VOC, and ADE20K show that TsallisPGD, using a single validation-selected schedule, achieves the best average attack rank across all evaluated settings and improves over CEPGD, SegPGD, CosPGD, JSPGD, and MaskedPGD in reducing accuracy and mIoU on both standard and robust models.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于Tsallis交叉熵的自适应梯度加权攻击TsallisPGD，通过动态调整参数q提升语义分割对抗攻击效果。
analysis.research_motivation: 语义分割攻击需要同时翻转大量像素预测，标准交叉熵过度关注已错分像素，导致优化缓慢且高估模型鲁棒性。
analysis.problem: 现有基于交叉熵的对抗攻击在语义分割任务中效率低、效果差，无法自适应调整像素级梯度权重。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 固定q值无法在所有数据集、模型和扰动预算下通用最优，攻击效果依赖于具体设置。
analysis.method: 基于Tsallis交叉熵（CE的推广，参数q控制梯度集中度），提出动态q调度策略，在优化过程中扫描q值以自适应调整梯度权重。
contributions: 首次将Tsallis交叉熵用于语义分割对抗攻击，揭示固定q的局限性。
提出动态q调度策略，通过单一验证集选择的调度实现跨设置最优平均攻击排名。
analysis.experiments: 在Cityscapes、Pascal VOC、ADE20K上对比CEPGD、SegPGD、CosPGD、JSPGD、MaskedPGD，TsallisPGD在降低准确率和mIoU上表现最佳。
limitations: 动态q调度需验证集选择，可能增加计算开销。
未在更大规模或实时场景中验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 方法新颖，实验充分，对语义分割对抗攻击有明确改进，但未涉及更广泛安全场景。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于Tsallis交叉熵的自适应梯度加权攻击TsallisPGD，通过动态调整参数q提升语义分割对抗攻击效果。

papers.title: GRPO-TTA: Test-Time Visual Tuning for Vision-Language Models via GRPO-Driven Reinforcement Learning
papers.abstract: Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) has recently shown strong performance in post-training large language models and vision-language models. It raises a question of whether the GRPO also significantly promotes the test-time adaptation (TTA) of vision language models. In this paper, we propose Group Relative Policy Optimization for Test-Time Adaptation (GRPO-TTA), which adapts GRPO to the TTA setting by reformulating class-specific prompt prediction as a group-wise policy optimization problem. Specifically, we construct output groups by sampling top-K class candidates from CLIP similarity distributions, enabling probability-driven optimization without access to ground-truth labels. Moreover, we design reward functions tailored to test-time adaptation, including alignment rewards and dispersion rewards, to guide effective visual encoder tuning. Extensive experiments across diverse benchmarks demonstrate that GRPO-TTA consistently outperforms existing test-time adaptation methods, with notably larger performance gains under natural distribution shifts.

analysis.tldr: 将GRPO强化学习引入VLM测试时适应，通过无标签的组策略优化和定制奖励函数提升分布偏移下的性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 测试时适应（TTA）能提升视觉语言模型（VLM）在分布偏移下的鲁棒性，但现有方法多依赖启发式或无监督目标，缺乏有效的策略优化机制。GRPO在模型后训练中表现优异，但其在TTA场景的潜力尚未被探索。
analysis.problem: 如何将GRPO适配到VLM的测试时适应中，在无真实标签条件下实现有效的视觉编码器调优。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将类别特定提示预测重构为组策略优化问题：从CLIP相似度分布中采样top-K类别构建输出组，设计对齐奖励和分散奖励以指导无标签的视觉编码器调优。
contributions: 提出GRPO-TTA，首次将GRPO应用于VLM的测试时适应。
设计无标签的组策略优化框架和针对TTA的奖励函数（对齐奖励与分散奖励）。
在多个基准上验证了方法在自然分布偏移下的显著性能提升。
analysis.experiments: 在多个不同基准上进行了实验，结果显示GRPO-TTA一致优于现有测试时适应方法，尤其在自然分布偏移下性能增益更大。
limitations: 可能依赖CLIP相似度分布的可靠性，在极端分布偏移下采样质量可能下降。
奖励函数设计可能需针对不同任务调整，泛化性有待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性较强，将GRPO引入TTA，实验充分且性能提升显著，与VLM方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 将GRPO强化学习引入VLM测试时适应，通过无标签的组策略优化和定制奖励函数提升分布偏移下的性能。

papers.title: MASRA: MLLM-Assisted Semantic-Relational Consistent Alignment for Video Temporal Grounding
papers.abstract: Video Temporal Grounding (VTG) faces a cross-modal semantic gap that often leads to background features being incorrectly aligned with the query, while directly matching the query to moments results in insufficient discriminability and consistency of temporal semantics. To address this issue, we propose MLLM-Assisted Semantic-Relational Consistent Alignment (MASRA), a training-time MLLM-based optimization framework for VTG. MASRA leverages an MLLM during training to produce two forms of textual priors, namely event-level descriptions with temporal spans and clip-level captions, and instantiates two MLLM-assisted alignments. Event Semantic Temporal Alignment (ESTA) aligns temporal context with event semantics to explicitly strengthen the correspondence between semantics and temporal events and improve span-level separability. Local Relational Consistency Alignment (LRCA) constructs a textual relation matrix derived from clip-level captions and aligns it with the temporal feature similarity matrix in the model, enhancing temporal consistency while capturing local structural information. MASRA includes two simple supporting modules, semantic-guided enhancement and second-order relational attention, to better utilize the learned semantic context and relational structure. Moreover, we introduce Decoupled Alignment Interaction (DAI) with a context-aware codebook to adaptively absorb query-irrelevant semantics and alleviate the cross-modal gap. The MLLM is only invoked during training and is not used at inference. Extensive experiments show that MASRA outperforms existing methods, and ablation studies validate its effectiveness.

analysis.tldr: 提出MLLM辅助的语义-关系一致性对齐框架MASRA，通过事件级和片段级文本先验增强视频时间定位的跨模态对齐。
analysis.research_motivation: 视频时间定位面临跨模态语义鸿沟，背景特征常被错误对齐到查询，而直接匹配查询与时刻导致时间语义的判别性和一致性不足。
analysis.problem: 解决视频时间定位中跨模态语义对齐不准确、时间语义判别性和一致性差的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 背景特征与查询错误对齐，直接匹配导致时间语义判别性和一致性不足。
analysis.method: 提出MASRA框架，利用MLLM生成事件级描述和片段级字幕，通过事件语义时间对齐（ESTA）和局部关系一致性对齐（LRCA）增强语义-时间对应和时序一致性，并引入解耦对齐交互（DAI）和上下文感知码本。
contributions: 提出MLLM辅助的语义-关系一致性对齐框架MASRA，利用事件级和片段级文本先验进行对齐。
设计事件语义时间对齐（ESTA）和局部关系一致性对齐（LRCA）两种对齐机制。
引入解耦对齐交互（DAI）和上下文感知码本，自适应吸收查询无关语义。
analysis.experiments: 在多个视频时间定位基准上，MASRA优于现有方法，消融实验验证了各模块的有效性。
limitations: 依赖MLLM生成文本先验，可能受限于MLLM的质量。
训练时引入额外计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，实验充分，与VLM/MLLM方向高度相关，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出MLLM辅助的语义-关系一致性对齐框架MASRA，通过事件级和片段级文本先验增强视频时间定位的跨模态对齐。

papers.title: APEX: Large-scale Multi-task Aesthetic-Informed Popularity Prediction for AI-Generated Music
papers.abstract: Music popularity prediction has attracted growing research interest, with relevance to artists, platforms, and recommendation systems. However, the explosive rise of AI-generated music platforms has created an entirely new and largely unexplored landscape, where a surge of songs is produced and consumed daily without the traditional markers of artist reputation or label backing. Key, yet unexplored in this pursuit is aesthetic quality. We propose APEX, the first large-scale multi-task learning framework for AI-generated music, trained on over 211k songs (10k hours of audio) from Suno and Udio, that jointly predicts engagement-based popularity signals - streams and likes scores - alongside five perceptual aesthetic quality dimensions from frozen audio embeddings extracted from MERT, a self-supervised music understanding model. Aesthetic quality and popularity capture complementary aspects of music that together prove valuable: in an out-of-distribution evaluation on the Music Arena dataset, comprising pairwise human preference battles across eleven generative music systems unseen during training, including aesthetic features consistently improves preference prediction, demonstrating strong generalisation of the learned representations across generative architectures.

analysis.tldr: 提出首个大规模多任务学习框架APEX，联合预测AI生成音乐的流行度与审美质量，在未见系统上展现强泛化性。
analysis.research_motivation: AI生成音乐平台爆发式增长，但缺乏传统艺术家声誉或厂牌支持，现有流行度预测方法未考虑审美质量这一关键维度。
analysis.problem: 如何联合预测AI生成音乐的流行度（流媒体播放量、点赞数）与多维审美质量，并实现跨生成架构的泛化。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 审美质量与流行度捕捉音乐的互补方面，联合建模能提升偏好预测效果。
analysis.method: 基于MERT自监督音乐理解模型提取冻结音频嵌入，构建多任务学习框架，同时预测流行度信号（流媒体播放量、点赞数）和五个感知审美质量维度。
contributions: 首个大规模AI生成音乐多任务学习框架APEX，训练数据包含21.1万首歌曲（1万小时音频）。
在Music Arena数据集上验证，引入审美特征一致提升偏好预测，展现跨生成架构的强泛化性。
analysis.experiments: 在Music Arena数据集上进行分布外评估，该数据集包含11个未见过的生成音乐系统的人类偏好对决，加入审美特征后偏好预测一致提升。
limitations: 仅使用冻结音频嵌入，可能限制对细粒度特征的捕捉。
审美质量维度定义可能依赖主观标注，泛化性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 针对新兴AI音乐领域提出首个多任务框架，方法创新且实验验证泛化性，但技术细节未充分展开。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出首个大规模多任务学习框架APEX，联合预测AI生成音乐的流行度与审美质量，在未见系统上展现强泛化性。

papers.title: A Fast Model Counting Algorithm for Two-Variable Logic with Counting and Modulo Counting Quantifiers
papers.abstract: Weighted first-order model counting (WFOMC) is a central task in lifted probabilistic inference: It asks for the weighted sum of all models of a first-order sentence over a finite domain. A long line of work has identified domain-liftable fragments of first-order logic, that is, syntactic classes for which WFOMC can be solved in time polynomial in the domain size. Among them, the two-variable fragment with counting quantifiers, $\mathbf{C}^2$, is one of the most expressive known liftable fragments. Existing algorithms for $\mathbf{C}^2$, however, establish tractability through multi-stage reductions that eliminate counting quantifiers via cardinality constraints, which introduces substantial practical overhead as the domain size grows. In this paper, we introduce IncrementalWFOMC3, a lifted algorithm for WFOMC on $\mathbf{C}^2$ and its modulo counting extension, $\mathbf{C}^2_{\text{mod}}$. Instead of relying on reduction techniques, IncrementalWFOMC3 operates directly on a Scott normal form that retains counting quantifiers throughout inference. This direct treatment yields two main results. First, we derive a tighter data-complexity bound for WFOMC in $\mathbf{C}^2$, reducing the degree of the polynomial from quadratic to linear in the counting parameters. Second, we prove that $\mathbf{C}^2_{\text{mod}}$ is domain-liftable, extending tractability from $\mathbf{C}^2$ to a richer fragment with native modulo counting support. Finally, our empirical evaluation shows that IncrementalWFOMC3 delivers orders-of-magnitude runtime improvements and better scalability than both existing WFOMC algorithms and state-of-the-art propositional model counters.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种直接处理计数量词的增量WFOMC算法，显著提升C²和C²_mod的推理效率与可扩展性。
analysis.research_motivation: 加权一阶模型计数（WFOMC）是提升概率推理的核心任务，现有C²算法通过多阶段归约消除计数量词，导致领域规模增大时计算开销巨大。
analysis.problem: 如何在不依赖归约技术的情况下，高效求解C²及其模计数扩展C²_mod的WFOMC问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出IncrementalWFOMC3算法，直接在保留计数量词的Scott范式上操作，通过增量计算避免多阶段归约。
contributions: 推导出C²中WFOMC更紧的数据复杂度界，将多项式次数从二次降至线性。
证明C²_mod是领域可提升的，将可处理性扩展到支持模计数的更丰富片段。
实验表明IncrementalWFOMC3比现有WFOMC算法和命题模型计数器快数个数量级，可扩展性更好。
analysis.experiments: 在多个基准上评估，显示IncrementalWFOMC3比现有WFOMC算法和命题模型计数器有数量级的运行时改进和更好的可扩展性。
limitations: 可能仅适用于C²和C²_mod片段，对更复杂逻辑的扩展性未知。
增量方法的实际性能可能依赖于特定领域结构。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.reason: 算法创新性强，但属于概率推理子领域，与主流ML方向关联度一般。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种直接处理计数量词的增量WFOMC算法，显著提升C²和C²_mod的推理效率与可扩展性。

papers.title: Enhancing Self-Supervised Talking Head Forgery Detection via a Training-Free Dual-System Framework
papers.abstract: Supervised talking head forgery detection faces severe generalization challenges due to the continuous evolution of generators. By reducing reliance on generator-specific forgery patterns, self-supervised detectors offer stronger cross-generator robustness. However, existing research has mainly focused on building stronger detectors, while the discriminative capacity of trained detectors remains insufficiently exploited. In particular, for score-based self-supervised detectors, the limited discriminative ability on hard cases is often reflected in unreliable anomaly ordering, leaving room for further refinement. Motivated by this observation, we draw inspiration from the dual-system theory of human cognition and propose a Training-Free Dual-System (TFDS) framework to further exploit the latent discriminative capacity of existing score-based self-supervised detectors. TFDS treats anomaly-like scores as the basis of System-1, using lightweight threshold-based routing to partition samples into confident and uncertain subsets. System-2 then revisits only the uncertain subset, performing fine-grained evidence-guided reasoning to refine the relative ordering of ambiguous samples within the original score distribution. Extensive experiments demonstrate consistent improvements across datasets and perturbation settings, with the gains arising mainly from corrected ordering within the uncertain subset. These findings show that existing self-supervised talking head forgery detectors still contain underexploited discriminative cues that can be effectively unlocked through training-free dual-system reasoning.

analysis.tldr: 提出无需训练的双系统框架，通过轻量路由和细粒度推理提升自监督说话人换脸检测的判别能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有自监督换脸检测器在困难样本上判别能力不足，表现为异常排序不可靠，而现有研究主要关注构建更强的检测器，未充分挖掘已训练检测器的潜在判别能力。
analysis.problem: 如何在不额外训练的情况下，提升基于分数的自监督说话人换脸检测器对困难样本的判别排序能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，基于分数的自监督检测器在困难样本上判别能力有限，常表现为不可靠的异常排序，这为通过后处理优化留下了空间。
analysis.method: 提出无需训练的双系统（TFDS）框架：System-1 使用轻量阈值路由将样本分为置信和不确定子集；System-2 仅对不确定子集进行细粒度证据引导推理，以优化原始分数分布中的相对排序。
contributions: 提出一种无需训练的双系统框架，可即插即用地增强现有自监督说话人换脸检测器的判别能力。
通过轻量路由和细粒度推理，有效提升了困难样本的排序准确性，并在多个数据集和扰动设置下取得一致改进。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 框架依赖现有检测器的分数输出，可能受限于原始检测器的质量。
System-2 的推理机制可能引入额外计算开销，尽管是轻量级。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法有一定创新性，但摘要未提供实验细节，影响评估受限。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出无需训练的双系统框架，通过轻量路由和细粒度推理提升自监督说话人换脸检测的判别能力。

papers.title: Local Truncation Error-Guided Neural ODEs for Large Scale Traffic Forecasting
papers.abstract: Spatiotemporal forecasting in physical systems, such as large-scale traffic networks, requires modeling a dual dynamic: continuous macroscopic rhythms and discrete, unpredictable microscopic shocks. While Neural Ordinary Differential Equations (ODEs) excel at capturing smooth evolution, their inherent Lipschitz continuity constraints inevitably cause severe over-smoothing when confronting abrupt anomalies. Recent physics-informed methods attempt to bypass this by penalizing numerical integration errors to enforce manifold smoothness. However, we mathematically reveal that such rigid regularization inherently triggers gradient conflicts and ``attention collapse,'' stripping the model of its sensitivity to anomalies. To resolve this continuity-shock dilemma, we propose Local Truncation Error-Guided Neural ODEs (LTE-ODE). Rather than treating numerical error as a nuisance to be eliminated, we innovatively repurpose the Local Truncation Error (LTE) as an unsupervised forward inductive bias. By mapping the LTE into a dynamic spatial attention mask, our architecture gracefully preserves high-precision continuous ODE evolution in stable regions, while adaptively triggering a discrete compensation branch exclusively at shock points. Trained purely end-to-end without manifold penalties, LTE-ODE achieves state-of-the-art performance on multiple large-scale benchmarks, exhibiting exceptional robustness against highly non-linear fluctuations. Furthermore, our ablation on integration steps demonstrates high deployment flexibility, allowing the model to seamlessly adapt to varying hardware memory constraints in real-world applications.

analysis.tldr: 提出LTE-ODE，利用局部截断误差作为无监督归纳偏置，在交通预测中兼顾连续演化与离散冲击。
analysis.research_motivation: 大规模交通网络等物理系统中的时空预测需要同时建模连续的宏观节律和离散的微观冲击，但神经ODE的Lipschitz连续性会导致过平滑，而现有物理信息方法通过惩罚数值误差来强制流形平滑，却引发梯度冲突和注意力崩溃，削弱了对异常的敏感性。
analysis.problem: 解决神经ODE在交通预测中无法同时处理连续平滑演化与离散异常冲击的连续性-冲击困境。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要揭示：刚性正则化会引发梯度冲突和注意力崩溃，使模型失去对异常的敏感性；神经ODE的Lipschitz连续性约束导致严重过平滑。
analysis.method: 提出LTE-ODE，将局部截断误差（LTE）映射为动态空间注意力掩码，在稳定区域保持高精度连续ODE演化，在冲击点自适应触发离散补偿分支，纯端到端训练，无需流形惩罚。
contributions: 数学上揭示了物理信息方法中刚性正则化导致梯度冲突和注意力崩溃的机制。
创新性地将局部截断误差重新用作无监督前向归纳偏置，设计动态注意力掩码实现连续-离散自适应切换。
在多个大规模交通基准上取得最先进性能，对高度非线性波动表现出卓越鲁棒性，且部署灵活。
analysis.experiments: 在多个大规模交通基准上评估，取得最先进性能；消融实验表明对积分步长具有高部署灵活性。
limitations: 可能对LTE的计算精度敏感，需要高效的数值积分器。
离散补偿分支的设计可能依赖特定任务，泛化性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法新颖，理论分析深入，实验充分，但交通预测非核心方向，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出LTE-ODE，利用局部截断误差作为无监督归纳偏置，在交通预测中兼顾连续演化与离散冲击。

papers.title: GeoDecider: A Coarse-to-Fine Agentic Workflow for Explainable Lithology Classification
papers.abstract: Lithology classification aims to infer subsurface rock types from well-logging signals, supporting downstream applications like reservoir characterization. Despite substantial progress, most existing methods still treat lithology classification as a single-pass classification task. In contrast, practical experts incorporate geological principles, external knowledge, and tool-use capabilities to perform accurate classification. In this work, we propose GeoDecider, a coarse-to-fine agentic workflow that enables accurate and explainable lithology classification through training-free use of large language models (LLMs). GeoDecider reformulates lithology classification as an expert-like structured process and organizes it into a multi-stage workflow involving coarse-to-fine reasoning. Specifically, GeoDecider includes the following stages: (1) base classifier-guided coarse classification, which uses a pre-trained classifier to provide a rough reference for downstream tasks, thus reducing the overall cost of downstream reasoning, (2) tool-augmented reasoning, which utilizes several tools such as contextual analysis and neighbor retrieval to achieve finer and more precise classifications, (3) geological refinement, which post-processes the final results to enforce geological consistency. Experiments on four benchmarks show that GeoDecider outperforms representative baselines. Further analysis demonstrates that the proposed framework produces geologically interpretable predictions while achieving a better trade-off between classification performance and inference efficiency.

analysis.tldr: GeoDecider 提出一种粗到细的智能体工作流，利用 LLM 实现可解释的岩性分类。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有岩性分类方法多为单次分类任务，缺乏地质专家式的结构化推理、外部知识利用和工具调用能力，导致准确性和可解释性不足。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个无需训练、可解释且高效的岩性分类方法，使其能够像地质专家一样进行粗到细的推理。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: GeoDecider 是一个粗到细的智能体工作流，包含三个阶段：(1) 基础分类器引导的粗分类，提供粗略参考并降低推理成本；(2) 工具增强推理，利用上下文分析和邻域检索等工具实现更精细的分类；(3) 地质精炼，后处理结果以保证地质一致性。
contributions: 提出 GeoDecider，首个将岩性分类重构为粗到细智能体工作流的方法，无需训练即可使用 LLM。
设计多阶段工作流，结合基础分类器、工具增强推理和地质精炼，实现准确且可解释的分类。
analysis.experiments: 在四个基准上实验，GeoDecider 优于代表性基线，并实现了地质可解释的预测，在分类性能和推理效率之间取得更好权衡。
limitations: 可能依赖预训练分类器的质量，若粗分类不准可能影响后续推理。
工具调用和 LLM 推理可能引入额外延迟，尽管摘要提到效率权衡。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法新颖，将岩性分类转化为智能体工作流，但属于特定领域应用，通用性有限。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: GeoDecider 提出一种粗到细的智能体工作流，利用 LLM 实现可解释的岩性分类。

papers.title: CERSA: Cumulative Energy-Retaining Subspace Adaptation for Memory-Efficient Fine-Tuning
papers.abstract: To mitigate the memory constraints associated with fine-tuning large pre-trained models, existing parameter-efficient fine-tuning (PEFT) methods, such as LoRA, rely on low-rank updates. However, such updates fail to fully capture the rank characteristics of the weight modifications observed in full-parameter fine-tuning, resulting in a performance gap. Furthermore, LoRA and other existing PEFT methods still require substantial memory to store the full set of frozen weights, limiting their efficiency in resource-constrained settings. To addres these limitations, we introduce Cumulative Energy-Retaining Subspace Adaptation (CERSA), a novel fine-tuning paradigm that leverages singular value decomposition (SVD) to retain only the principal components responsible for 90% to 95% of the spectral energy. By fine-tuning low-rank representations derived from this principal subspace, CERSA significantly reduces memory consumption. We conduct extensive evaluations of CERSA across models of varying scales and domains, including image recognition, text-to-image generation, and natural language understanding. Empirical results demonstrate that CERSA consistently outperforms state-of-the-art PEFT methods while achieving substantially lower memory requirements. The code will be publicly released.

analysis.tldr: CERSA 通过 SVD 保留主成分能量，在低秩子空间微调，实现比 LoRA 更优的性能和更低的内存消耗。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有 PEFT 方法（如 LoRA）的低秩更新无法完全捕捉全参数微调的秩特性，导致性能差距，且仍需存储完整冻结权重，内存效率有限。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种内存高效的微调方法，既能逼近全参数微调的秩特性，又能显著降低内存占用。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 利用奇异值分解（SVD）保留 90%-95% 谱能量的主成分，仅微调该主子空间的低秩表示。
contributions: 提出 CERSA，一种基于 SVD 主成分保留的内存高效微调范式。
在图像识别、文本到图像生成和自然语言理解等多个领域和规模模型上验证了 CERSA 优于现有 PEFT 方法且内存需求更低。
analysis.experiments: 在图像识别、文本到图像生成和自然语言理解任务上，使用不同规模模型进行评估，CERSA 一致优于 SOTA PEFT 方法并显著降低内存。
limitations: SVD 分解可能带来额外计算开销。
主成分比例（90%-95%）可能需针对不同任务调整。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 方法新颖且实验充分，与LLM微调效率高度相关，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: CERSA 通过 SVD 保留主成分能量，在低秩子空间微调，实现比 LoRA 更优的性能和更低的内存消耗。

papers.title: SoDa2: Single-Stage Open-Set Domain Adaptation via Decoupled Alignment for Cross-Scene Hyperspectral Image Classification
papers.abstract: Cross-scene hyperspectral image (HSI) classification stands as a fundamental research topic in remote sensing, with extensive applications spanning various fields. Owing to the inclusion of unknown categories in the target domain and the existence of domain shift across different scenes, open-set domain adaptation techniques are commonly employed to address cross-scene HSI classification. However, existing open-set cross-scene HSI classification methods still face two critical challenges: (1) domain shift issues arising from the direct alignment of mixed spectral-spatial features; (2) high computational costs caused by two-stage training strategies. To address these issues, this paper proposes a single-stage open-set domain adaptation method with decoupled alignment (SoDa$^2$) for cross-scene HSI classification. A contribution-aware dual-modality feature extraction is customized to disentangle the characteristics from spectral sequence signals and spatial details, selectively and adaptively enhancing discriminative features. The decoupled alignment module minimizes the Maximum Mean Discrepancy to independently reduce the spectral discrepancy and the spatial discrepancy between the source and target domains, extracting more fine-grained domain-invariant features. A cost-effective single-stage dual-branch framework is designed to learn MMD-constrainted aligned features and constraint-free intrinsic features for adaptive distinction between known and unknown classes. This framework employs a Gaussian Mixture Model to model the squared cosine similarity distribution between the two feature types, enabling open-set recognition without prior knowledge of unknown classes. Extensive experiments on three groups of HSI datasets demonstrate that SoDa$^2$ outperforms state-of-the-art methods, achieving superior classification accuracy and model transferability for open-set cross-scene tasks.

analysis.tldr: 提出单阶段开集域适应方法SoDa²，通过解耦对齐实现跨场景高光谱图像分类，在三个数据集上取得SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 跨场景高光谱图像分类在遥感中应用广泛，但现有开集域适应方法面临两个挑战：混合光谱-空间特征直接对齐导致的域偏移，以及两阶段训练策略带来的高计算成本。
analysis.problem: 解决开集跨场景HSI分类中域偏移和计算效率低的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出单阶段开集域适应方法SoDa²，包含贡献感知双模态特征提取（解耦光谱序列和空间细节）、解耦对齐模块（独立最小化光谱和空间MMD）、单阶段双分支框架（MMD约束对齐特征和无约束内在特征），并利用高斯混合模型建模余弦相似度分布实现开集识别。
contributions: 提出贡献感知双模态特征提取，选择性增强判别特征。
设计解耦对齐模块，独立减少光谱和空间域差异。
提出单阶段双分支框架，高效学习对齐特征和内在特征，无需先验知识实现开集识别。
analysis.experiments: 在三个HSI数据集组上进行实验，SoDa²优于现有方法，在开集跨场景任务中取得更高分类精度和模型迁移性。
limitations: 可能依赖MMD假设，对复杂分布对齐效果有限。
单阶段框架可能对超参数敏感。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性较强，实验充分，但属于遥感领域特定应用，与核心方向中等相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出单阶段开集域适应方法SoDa²，通过解耦对齐实现跨场景高光谱图像分类，在三个数据集上取得SOTA。

papers.title: Dual-Foundation Models for Unsupervised Domain Adaptation
papers.abstract: Semantic segmentation provides pixel-level scene understanding essential for autonomous driving and fine-grained perception tasks. However, training segmentation models requires costly, labor-intensive annotations on real-world datasets. Unsupervised Domain Adaptation (UDA) addresses this by training models on labeled synthetic data and adapting them to unlabeled real images. While conceptually simple, adaptation is challenging due to the domain gap, i.e., differences in visual appearance and scene structure between synthetic and real data. Prior approaches bridge this gap through pixel-level mixing or feature-level contrastive learning. Yet, these techniques suffer from two major limitations: (1) reliance on high-confidence pseudo-labels restricts learning to a subset of the target domain, and (2) prototype-based contrastive methods initialize class prototypes from source-trained models, yielding biased and unstable anchors during adaptation. To address these issues, we propose a dual-foundation UDA framework that leverages two complementary foundation models. First, we employ the Segment Anything Model (SAM) with superpixel-guided prompting to enable learning from a broader range of target pixels beyond high-confidence predictions. Second, we incorporate DINOv3 to construct stable, domain-invariant class prototypes through its robust representation learning. Our method achieves consistent improvements of +1.3% and +1.4% mIoU over strong UDA baselines on GTA-to-Cityscapes and SYNTHIA-to-Cityscapes, respectively.

analysis.tldr: 利用SAM和DINOv3双基础模型提升无监督域适应语义分割性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 语义分割需要大量人工标注，无监督域适应利用合成数据训练并适应真实场景，但现有方法因依赖高置信伪标签和有偏原型而受限。
analysis.problem: 现有UDA方法仅从高置信伪标签学习，且原型初始化有偏，导致目标域学习不充分。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出高置信伪标签限制学习范围，原型对比方法因源域初始化导致锚点有偏且不稳定。
analysis.method: 提出双基础模型UDA框架：SAM结合超像素引导提示学习更多目标像素，DINOv3构建稳定域不变类原型。
contributions: 提出利用SAM和DINOv3双基础模型解决UDA中伪标签和原型偏差问题。
在GTA→Cityscapes和SYNTHIA→Cityscapes上分别提升1.3%和1.4% mIoU。
analysis.experiments: 在GTA-to-Cityscapes和SYNTHIA-to-Cityscapes两个标准UDA基准上评估，相比强基线有稳定提升。
limitations: 可能依赖SAM和DINOv3的预训练质量。
超像素引导提示的泛化性未充分讨论。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法有创新但提升幅度有限，适合关注UDA和基础模型应用的读者。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用SAM和DINOv3双基础模型提升无监督域适应语义分割性能。

papers.title: Dynamic Distillation and Gradient Consistency for Robust Long-Tailed Incremental Learning
papers.abstract: The task of Long-tailed Class Incremental Learning (LT-CIL) addresses the sequential learning of new classes from datasets with imbalanced class distributions. This scenario intensifies the fundamental problem of catastrophic forgetting, inherent to continual learning, with the dual challenges of under-learning minority classes and overfitting majority classes. To tackle these combined issues, this paper proposes two main techniques. First, we introduce gradient consistency regularization, which leverages the moving average of gradients to suppress abrupt fluctuations and stabilize the training process. Second, we dynamically adjust the weight of the distillation loss by measuring the degree of class imbalance with normalized entropy. This adaptive weighting establishes an optimal balance between retaining old knowledge and acquiring new information. Experiments on the CIFAR-100-LT, ImageNetSubset-LT, and Food101-LT benchmarks show that our method achieves consistent accuracy improvements of up to 5.0\%. Furthermore, we demonstrate dramatic gains in the challenging 'In-ordered' setting, where tasks progress from majority to minority classes, highlighting our method's robustness in mitigating forgetting under unfavorable learning dynamics. This enhanced performance is achieved without a significant increase in computational overhead, demonstrating the practicality of our framework.

analysis.tldr: 提出梯度一致性正则化和动态蒸馏权重，缓解长尾类增量学习中的灾难性遗忘和不平衡问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 长尾类增量学习（LT-CIL）面临灾难性遗忘和类别不平衡的双重挑战，现有方法难以同时应对少类别欠学习与多类别过拟合。
analysis.problem: 在类增量学习中，数据分布长尾导致模型对少数类遗忘严重，且多数类过拟合，需要一种鲁棒的训练方法。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 梯度一致性正则化（利用梯度移动平均抑制波动）和动态蒸馏权重（基于归一化熵调整蒸馏损失权重）。
contributions: 提出梯度一致性正则化，稳定训练过程。
提出动态蒸馏权重，自适应平衡旧知识保留与新知识获取。
analysis.experiments: 在CIFAR-100-LT、ImageNetSubset-LT和Food101-LT基准上，准确率提升最高达5.0%，在'In-ordered'设置下表现显著。
limitations: 可能仅在特定长尾分布下有效。

analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出梯度一致性正则化和动态蒸馏权重，缓解长尾类增量学习中的灾难性遗忘和不平衡问题。

papers.title: ReasonAudio: A Benchmark for Evaluating Reasoning Beyond Matching in Text-Audio Retrieval
papers.abstract: As multimodal content continues to expand at a rapid pace, audio retrieval has emerged as a key enabling technology for media search, content organization, and intelligent assistants. However, most existing benchmarks concentrate on semantic matching and fail to capture the fact that real-world queries often demand advanced reasoning abilities, including negation understanding, temporal ordering, concurrent event recognition, and duration discrimination. To address this gap, we introduce ReasonAudio, the first reasoning-intensive benchmark for Text-Audio Retrieval, comprising 1,000 queries and 10,000 composite audio clips across five fundamental reasoning tasks: Negation, Order, Overlap, Duration, and Mix. Despite their intuitive nature for humans and straightforward construction, these tasks pose significant challenges to current models. Our evaluation of ten state-of-the-art models reveals the following findings: All models struggle with reasoning-intensive audio retrieval, performing particularly poorly on Negation and Duration while showing relatively better results on Overlap and Order. Moreover, Multimodal Large Language Model-based embedding models fail to inherit the reasoning capabilities of their backbones through contrastive fine-tuning, suggesting that current training paradigms are insufficient to preserve reasoning capacity in retrieval settings

analysis.tldr: 首个面向文本-音频检索的推理密集型基准ReasonAudio，揭示现有模型在否定理解、时序推理等任务上表现不佳。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有音频检索基准主要关注语义匹配，无法应对真实场景中需要高级推理能力的查询（如否定、时序、并发事件识别等），亟需一个专门评估推理能力的基准。
analysis.problem: 缺乏一个系统评估文本-音频检索中推理能力（而非简单匹配）的基准。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 所有模型在推理密集型音频检索上表现挣扎，尤其在否定和时长任务上表现极差；多模态大语言模型嵌入模型通过对比微调未能继承其骨干网络的推理能力，表明当前训练范式不足以在检索设置中保留推理能力。
analysis.method: 构建ReasonAudio基准，包含1,000个查询和10,000个复合音频片段，覆盖否定、顺序、重叠、时长和混合五种推理任务。
contributions: 提出首个推理密集型文本-音频检索基准ReasonAudio。
系统评估十个SOTA模型，揭示其在推理任务上的显著不足。
发现多模态大语言模型嵌入模型在对比微调后丢失推理能力的问题。
analysis.experiments: 在十个SOTA模型上进行评估，包括多模态大语言模型嵌入模型，具体结果摘要未提供。
limitations: 基准规模有限（1,000查询/10,000音频），可能无法覆盖所有推理场景。

papers.title: Mix3R: Mixing Feed-forward Reconstruction and Generative 3D Priors for Joint Multi-view Aligned 3D Reconstruction and Pose Estimation
papers.abstract: Recent trends in sparse-view 3D reconstruction have taken two different paths: feed-forward reconstruction that predicts pixel-aligned point maps without a complete geometry, and generative 3D reconstruction that generates complete geometry but often with poor input-alignment. We present Mix3R, a novel generative 3D reconstruction method which mixes feed-forward reconstruction and 3D generation into a single framework in an aligned manner. Mix3R generates a 3D shape in two stages: a sparse voxel generation stage and a textured geometry generation stage. Unlike pure generative methods, our first-stage generation jointly produces a coarse 3D structure (sparse voxels), per-view point maps and camera parameters aligned to that 3D structure. This is made possible by introducing a Mixture-of-Transformers architecture that inserts global self-attentions to a feed-forward reconstruction model and a 3D generative model, both pretrained on large-scale data. This design effectively retains the pretrained priors but enables better 2D-3D alignment. Based on the initial aligned generations of sparse 3D voxels and point maps, we compute an overlap-based attention bias that is directly added to another pretrained textured geometry generation model, enabling it to correctly place input textures onto generated shapes in a training-free manner. Our design brings mutual benefits to both feed-forward reconstruction and 3D generation: The feed-forward branch learns to ground its predictions to a generative 3D prior, and conversely, the 3D generation branch is conditioned on geometrically informative features from the feed-forward branch. As a result, our method produces 3D shapes with better input alignment compared with pure 3D generative methods, together with camera pose estimations more accurate than previous feed-forward reconstruction methods. Our project page is at https://jsnln.github.io/mix3r/

analysis.tldr: Mix3R 融合前馈重建与生成式 3D 先验，实现多视图对齐的 3D 重建与姿态估计。
analysis.research_motivation: 稀疏视图 3D 重建中，前馈方法预测点图但缺乏完整几何，生成方法产生完整几何但输入对齐差，两者优势难以兼得。
analysis.problem: 如何在一个框架中同时实现前馈重建的像素级对齐和生成方法的完整几何输出，并联合估计相机姿态。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 纯生成方法生成的 3D 形状与输入图像对齐不佳；前馈重建方法无法生成完整几何。
analysis.method: 两阶段生成：稀疏体素生成阶段（联合生成稀疏体素、每视图点图和相机参数，使用 Mixture-of-Transformers 架构融合前馈与生成先验），纹理几何生成阶段（基于重叠注意力偏置，无训练地将输入纹理放置到生成形状上）。
contributions: 提出 Mix3R，首次将前馈重建与生成式 3D 先验混合到统一框架中，实现对齐的 3D 重建与姿态估计。
设计 Mixture-of-Transformers 架构，有效保留预训练先验并改善 2D-3D 对齐。
提出基于重叠的注意力偏置，无需训练即可将输入纹理正确映射到生成形状上。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖大规模预训练数据，泛化到未见类别或极端视角时性能未知。
