analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，融合前馈与生成范式，但摘要未提供实验细节，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Mix3R 融合前馈重建与生成式 3D 先验，实现多视图对齐的 3D 重建与姿态估计。

papers.title: Tracing Like a Clinician: Anatomy-Guided Spatial Priors for Cephalometric Landmark Detection
papers.abstract: When orthodontists trace cephalometric radiographs, they follow a structured workflow: identify the soft tissue profile, partition the skull into anatomical regions, trace contours, and locate landmarks using geometric definitions -- yet no automated system replicates this reasoning. We present a five-phase anatomy-guided initialization pipeline that translates this clinical workflow into computational operations, producing confidence-weighted spatial attention priors for a downstream HRNet-W32 detector. On 1,502 radiographs from three sources spanning 7+ imaging devices, the system achieves 1.04 mm mean radial error on 25 landmarks -- surpassing prior state-of-the-art (1.23 mm on 19 landmarks) by 15.4%, with twelve landmarks below 1 mm. A three-way controlled ablation reveals two striking findings. First, removing anatomical priors does not merely slow convergence -- it destroys generalization: both models converge to ~1.03 mm on validation, but diverge to 1.94 vs. 1.04 mm on the test set. Second, replacing anatomical priors with random-position Gaussians produces even worse generalization (2.24 mm), confirming that the improvement derives from anatomically correct positioning, not additional input channels. Clinical domain knowledge encoded as spatial priors provides an inductive bias that architecture and data augmentation alone do not provide.

analysis.tldr: 将临床医生解剖学引导的工作流转化为计算先验，显著提升头影测量标志点检测精度与泛化性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有自动头影测量标志点检测方法未模拟临床医生结构化推理流程（如识别软组织轮廓、分区、追踪轮廓等），导致泛化性不足。
analysis.problem: 如何将临床解剖学知识编码为空间先验，以提升头影测量标志点检测的精度和跨设备泛化能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 消融实验表明，移除解剖先验不仅减慢收敛，更破坏泛化（验证集~1.03 mm，测试集从1.04 mm恶化至1.94 mm）；随机位置高斯先验泛化更差（2.24 mm），证实改进源于解剖正确位置而非额外输入通道。
analysis.method: 五阶段解剖引导初始化流程：模拟临床工作流，生成置信度加权的空间注意力先验，输入下游HRNet-W32检测器。
contributions: 提出首个模拟临床医生结构化工作流的解剖引导初始化管线，将软组织轮廓识别、颅骨分区等步骤转化为计算操作。
在1502张来自7+设备的放射片上，以1.04 mm平均径向误差超越先前最优（1.23 mm），12个标志点误差低于1 mm。
通过三路控制消融实验揭示解剖先验对泛化性的关键作用，证明其提供架构和数据增强无法替代的归纳偏置。
analysis.experiments: 在1502张来自三个来源、7+成像设备的头影测量放射片上评估，25个标志点平均径向误差1.04 mm，优于先前最优（19个标志点1.23 mm），12个标志点低于1 mm。
limitations: 方法依赖特定解剖区域划分，可能需针对不同解剖结构调整。
仅验证于头影测量任务，泛化至其他医学图像标志点检测需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强（模拟临床工作流），实验充分且效果显著，与医学图像方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 将临床医生解剖学引导的工作流转化为计算先验，显著提升头影测量标志点检测精度与泛化性。

papers.title: What Happens Inside Agent Memory? Circuit Analysis from Emergence to Diagnosis
papers.abstract: Agent memory failures are silent: an LLM-based agent can produce a fluent response even when it fails to extract, retain, or retrieve the information needed across sessions. The write-manage-read loop describes the external pipeline of these systems but leaves open which internal computations implement each stage. Tracing feature circuits across the Qwen-3 family (0.6B--14B) and two memory frameworks (mem0 and A-MEM), we report two mechanistic findings and one deliverable. First, control is detectable before content: routing circuitry is causally active at 0.6B, while content circuitry produces no detectable signal until 4B, exposing a deployment regime where small models route memory decisions before they can reliably extract or ground the underlying facts. Second, the shared hub is recruited, not created: Write and Read converge on a late-layer hub that already exists in the base model as a context-grounding substrate, and memory framing recruits a memory-specific functional direction on this substrate rather than building one of its own. Both findings transfer across mem0 and A-MEM, indicating that the underlying computations are properties of the base model rather than of any particular interface. Building on this circuit structure, we develop an unsupervised stage-level diagnostic that localizes silent failures to the responsible operation up to 76.2% accuracy, outperforming the strongest supervised baseline by 13 points. Together, these results point to circuit-level signatures as a practical handle for monitoring and structurally-guided design of agent memory.

analysis.tldr: 通过电路分析揭示LLM智能体记忆的内部控制机制，发现路由电路先于内容电路出现，且共享枢纽是基座模型固有的，并基于此开发了无监督阶段级诊断方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 智能体记忆故障是隐性的，即使无法正确提取、保留或检索信息，LLM智能体仍能生成流畅响应，现有外部流水线描述无法揭示内部计算实现，亟需理解其内部机制以进行监控和设计。
analysis.problem: 理解LLM智能体记忆的内部控制电路（写-管理-读循环）如何实现，并开发诊断方法定位隐性故障。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到两个机制性发现：1）控制电路在0.6B参数时即可检测，而内容电路直到4B才产生可检测信号，表明小模型在能可靠提取事实之前就已进行路由决策；2）写和读操作汇聚于基座模型已有的晚期层枢纽，记忆框架只是在该基底上招募特定功能方向，而非创建新电路。这些发现跨不同记忆框架（mem0和A-MEM）迁移。
analysis.method: 对Qwen-3系列（0.6B-14B）和两个记忆框架进行特征电路追踪，并基于电路结构开发无监督阶段级诊断方法。
contributions: 发现智能体记忆中控制电路先于内容电路出现，揭示了小模型部署中的路由决策与事实提取能力不匹配问题。
证明写和读操作共享基座模型已有的上下文接地枢纽，记忆框架仅招募功能方向而非创建新电路。
开发无监督阶段级诊断方法，以76.2%准确率定位隐性故障，超过最强监督基线13个百分点。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但提及在Qwen-3系列（0.6B-14B）和两个记忆框架（mem0和A-MEM）上进行实验，诊断准确率76.2%。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定模型系列和记忆框架，泛化性需进一步验证。
诊断方法为无监督，可能在某些场景下精度不足。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，揭示了智能体记忆的内部机制并开发了实用诊断工具，与LLM和Agent方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过电路分析揭示LLM智能体记忆的内部控制机制，发现路由电路先于内容电路出现，且共享枢纽是基座模型固有的，并基于此开发了无监督阶段级诊断方法。

papers.title: SkCC: Portable and Secure Skill Compilation for Cross-Framework LLM Agents
papers.abstract: LLM agents increasingly rely on reusable skills (e.g., `SKILL.md`) to execute complex tasks, yet these artifacts lack portability: agent frameworks are highly sensitive to prompt formatting, leading to a large performance variation for the same skill. Nevertheless, most skills are authored once as format-agnostic Markdown, necessitating costly per-framework rewrites and also leaving security largely unaddressed, with widespread vulnerabilities in practice. To address this, we present SkCC, a compiler for LLM agents that introduces classical compilation design into agent skill development. SkCC centers on SkIR, a strongly-typed intermediate representation that decouples skill semantics from framework-specific formatting, thus enabling portable deployment across agent frameworks. Atop of this IR, a static Optimizer enforces security constraints, blocking vulnerabilities before deployment. Implemented as a four-phase pipeline, SkCC effectively reduces adaptation complexity from $O(m \times n)$ to $O(m + n)$ across $m$ skills and $n$ frameworks. Experiments on SkillsBench demonstrate that SkCC delivers consistent and substantial gains over original counterparts, with pass rate increases from 21.1% to 33.3% on Claude Code and from 35.1% to 48.7% on Kimi CLI. Further, the design achieves sub-10ms compilation latency, 94.8% proactive security trigger rate, and 10-46% runtime token savings across frameworks.

analysis.tldr: SkCC 是一个跨框架 LLM Agent 技能编译器，通过强类型中间表示和静态优化实现技能的可移植性与安全性。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM Agent 技能缺乏可移植性，不同框架对提示格式敏感导致性能差异大，且安全漏洞普遍存在，手动重写成本高。
analysis.problem: 如何实现 LLM Agent 技能的跨框架可移植部署并同时保证安全性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 相同技能在不同框架上性能差异大，且现有技能开发缺乏安全机制。
analysis.method: 提出 SkCC 编译器，包含 SkIR 强类型中间表示解耦语义与格式，以及静态优化器强制执行安全约束，采用四阶段流水线。
contributions: 提出 SkCC 编译器，将经典编译设计引入 Agent 技能开发。
设计 SkIR 中间表示实现技能语义与框架格式的解耦。
实现静态安全优化器，在部署前阻断漏洞。
将适配复杂度从 O(m×n) 降至 O(m+n)。
analysis.experiments: 在 SkillsBench 上测试，Claude Code 通过率从 21.1% 提升至 33.3%，Kimi CLI 从 35.1% 提升至 48.7%；编译延迟低于 10ms，安全触发率 94.8%，token 节省 10-46%。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定类型的技能格式。
安全策略可能无法覆盖所有漏洞类型。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，实验充分且效果显著，与 LLM Agent 方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: SkCC 是一个跨框架 LLM Agent 技能编译器，通过强类型中间表示和静态优化实现技能的可移植性与安全性。

papers.title: Can Multimodal Large Language Models Understand Pathologic Movements? A Pilot Study on Seizure Semiology
papers.abstract: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have demonstrated robust capabilities in recognizing everyday human activities, yet their potential for analyzing clinically significant involuntary movements in neurological disorders remains largely unexplored. This pilot study evaluates the capability of MLLMs for automated recognition of pathological movements in seizure videos. We assessed the zero-shot performance of state-of-the-art MLLMs on 20 ILAE-defined semiological features across 90 clinical seizure recordings. MLLMs outperformed fine-tuned Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) and Vision Transformer (ViT) baseline models on 13 of 18 features without task-specific training, demonstrating particular strength in recognizing salient postural and contextual features while struggling with subtle, high-frequency movements. Feature-targeted signal enhancement (facial cropping, pose estimation, audio denoising) improved performance on 10 of 20 features. Expert evaluation showed that 94.3 percent of MLLM-generated explanations for correctly predicted cases achieved at least 60 percent faithfulness scores, aligning with epileptologist reasoning. These findings demonstrate the potential of adapting general-purpose MLLMs for specialized clinical video analysis through targeted preprocessing strategies, offering a path toward interpretable, efficient diagnostic assistance. Our code is publicly available at https://github.com/LinaZhangUCLA/PathMotionMLLM.

analysis.tldr: 多模态大模型在癫痫发作视频病理运动识别中零样本表现优于专用CNN/ViT，但难以捕捉细微高频运动。
analysis.research_motivation: 临床神经疾病中非自主运动的自动分析需求迫切，但现有方法依赖任务特定训练，通用MLLM在此领域的潜力未被探索。
analysis.problem: 评估多模态大模型在癫痫发作视频中自动识别病理运动的零样本能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: MLLM在识别显著姿态和上下文特征上表现强，但在细微高频运动上表现弱；特征增强（如面部裁剪、姿态估计、音频去噪）可提升部分特征性能。
analysis.method: 零样本评估多个SOTA MLLM在90个临床癫痫视频上的20个ILAE定义半学特征，并与微调CNN/ViT基线对比；引入特征目标信号增强策略。
contributions: 首次系统评估MLLM在癫痫病理运动识别中的零样本能力，揭示其优势与局限。
提出特征目标信号增强方法，有效提升MLLM在部分特征上的性能。
通过专家评估验证MLLM生成解释的忠实度，证明其可解释性潜力。
analysis.experiments: 在90个临床癫痫视频上评估20个半学特征，对比微调CNN/ViT基线；专家评估94.3%正确预测案例的解释忠实度≥60%。
limitations: 样本量较小（90个视频），可能限制泛化性。
仅评估零样本性能，未探索微调或提示工程优化。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 创新性较高（首次将MLLM用于癫痫病理运动识别），实验设计合理，但样本量有限，技术深度中等。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 多模态大模型在癫痫发作视频病理运动识别中零样本表现优于专用CNN/ViT，但难以捕捉细微高频运动。

papers.title: VLMaxxing through FrameMogging Training-Free Anti-Recomputation for Video Vision-Language Models
papers.abstract: Video vision-language models (VLMs) keep paying for visual state the stream already told us was stable. The factory wall did not move, but most VLM pipelines still hand the model dense RGB frames or a fresh prefix again. We study that waste as training-free anti-recomputation: reuse state when validation says it survives, and buy fresh evidence when the scene, query, or cache topology requires it. The largest measured win is after ingest. On frozen Qwen2.5-VL-7B-Instruct-4bit, adaptive same-video follow-up reuse preserves paired choices and correctness on a 93-query VideoMME breadth setting while reducing follow-up latency by 14.90-35.92x. The first query is still cold; the win starts when later questions reuse the same video state. Stress tests bound the result: repeated-question schedules hold through 50 turns, while dense-answer-anchored prompt variation separates conservative fixed K=1 repair from faster aggressive policies that drift. Fresh-video pruning is smaller but real. C-VISION skips timed vision-tower work before the first answer is generated. On Gemma 4-E4B-4bit, the clean 32f short cell reaches 1.316x first-query speedup with no paired drift or parse failures on 20 items; Qwen shows the fidelity/speed boundary. Stage-share ceiling (C-CEILING) is the accounting guardrail: a component speedup becomes an end-to-end speedup only in proportion to the wall-clock share it accelerates, so C-VISION and after-ingest follow-up reuse do not multiply. Candidate C-STREAM remains a native-rate target, not a headline result here. The broader direction is VLM-native media that expose change, motion, uncertainty, object state, sensor time, and active tiles directly, so models do not have to rediscover the world from dense RGB every frame.

analysis.tldr: 提出训练无关的反重计算策略，通过复用稳定视频状态显著降低视频VLM推理延迟。
analysis.research_motivation: 视频VLM处理静态场景时重复计算冗余视觉特征，导致高延迟和计算浪费，现有方法缺乏高效的训练无关优化手段。
analysis.problem: 如何在不重新训练模型的前提下，通过智能复用视频状态来减少视频VLM的推理计算量，同时保持任务准确性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出视频VLM在后续查询中可复用已验证稳定的视觉状态，但首次查询仍需完整计算；不同策略（保守固定K=1与激进策略）在重复查询场景下存在漂移与保真度权衡。
analysis.method: 提出训练无关的反重计算框架，包含：1) 后摄入复用：在验证状态稳定时复用，否则重新计算；2) 新鲜视频剪枝（C-VISION）：跳过首次回答前的部分视觉编码；3) 阶段共享上限（C-CEILING）作为端到端加速的核算护栏。
contributions: 提出训练无关的反重计算概念，用于视频VLM推理加速
设计后摄入复用策略，在93查询VideoMME上实现14.90-35.92x延迟降低
引入C-VISION剪枝和C-CEILING核算方法，量化加速边界
analysis.experiments: 在Qwen2.5-VL-7B-Instruct-4bit和Gemma 4-E4B-4bit上评估，使用VideoMME广度设置和20项测试集，测量延迟、准确率和漂移。
limitations: 首次查询仍为冷启动，无法加速
激进策略在密集答案锚定提示变化下可能漂移
C-VISION加速幅度较小，且受阶段共享上限约束
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 针对视频VLM推理效率问题提出新颖的训练无关反重计算策略，实验显示显著延迟降低，与VLM方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出训练无关的反重计算策略，通过复用稳定视频状态显著降低视频VLM推理延迟。

papers.title: Toward Structural Multimodal Representations: Specialization, Selection, and Sparsification via Mixture-of-Experts
papers.abstract: We propose S3 (Specialization, Selection, Sparsification), a framework that rethinks multimodal learning through a structural perspective. Instead of encoding all signals into a fixed embedding, S3 decomposes multimodal inputs into semantic experts and selectively routes them for each task. Specialization forms concept-level experts in a shared latent space, Selection adapts routing for task-specific needs, and Sparsification prunes low-utility paths to yield compact, information-minimal representations. Across four MultiBench benchmarks, S3 improves accuracy and shows a consistent reverse U-shaped sparsity-performance trend, with peak performance at intermediate sparsity. These results suggest that structuring multimodal representations as selectable semantic components provides a practical and principled alternative to contrastive learning or InfoMax-driven approaches.

analysis.tldr: 提出S3框架，通过专家混合实现多模态表征的结构化分解与稀疏路由。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有多模态学习通常将所有信号编码为固定嵌入，缺乏结构化和可选择性，导致表征冗余且任务适应性差。
analysis.problem: 如何将多模态输入分解为可选择的语义组件，并实现高效、紧凑的表征。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 观察到中间稀疏度下性能最优的倒U型稀疏-性能趋势。
analysis.method: S3框架包含三个步骤：Specialization（在共享潜空间形成概念级专家）、Selection（根据任务自适应路由）、Sparsification（剪枝低效用路径得到紧凑表征）。
contributions: 提出结构化多模态表征的新视角，将输入分解为语义专家并选择性路由。
在MultiBench基准上验证了S3的有效性，并揭示了稀疏性与性能的倒U型关系。
analysis.experiments: 在MultiBench的四个基准上评估，S3提升了准确率。
limitations: 摘要未提及跨模态对齐的具体机制。
稀疏性剪枝可能丢失部分语义信息。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 方法创新性较高，实验验证了有效性，但摘要未提供详细对比，适合精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出S3框架，通过专家混合实现多模态表征的结构化分解与稀疏路由。

papers.title: RAG over Thinking Traces Can Improve Reasoning Tasks
papers.abstract: Retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) has proven effective for knowledge-intensive tasks, but is widely believed to offer limited benefit for reasoning-intensive problems such as math and code generation. We challenge this assumption by showing that the limitation lies not in RAG itself, but in the choice of corpus. Instead of retrieving documents, we propose retrieving thinking traces, i.e., intermediate thinking trajectories generated during problem solving attempts. We show that thinking traces are already a strong retrieval source, and further introduce T3, an offline method that transforms them into structured, retrieval-friendly representations, to improve usability. Using these traces as a corpus, a simple retrieve-then-generate pipeline consistently improves reasoning performance across strong models and benchmarks such as AIME 2025--2026, LiveCodeBench, and GPQA-Diamond, outperforming both non-RAG baselines and retrieval over standard web corpora. For instance, on AIME, RAG with traces generated by Gemini-2-thinking achieves relative gains of +56.3%, +8.6%, and +7.6% for Gemini-2.5-Flash, GPT-OSS-120B, and GPT-5, respectively, even though these are more recent models. Interestingly, RAG on T3 also incurs little or no extra inference cost, and can even reduce inference cost by up to $15%$. Overall, our results suggest that thinking traces are an effective retrieval corpus for reasoning tasks, and transforming them into structured, compact, or diagnostic representations unlocks even stronger gains. Code available at https://github.com/Narabzad/t3.

analysis.tldr: 通过检索思考轨迹（thinking traces）而非文档，RAG 在推理任务上取得显著提升。
analysis.research_motivation: RAG 在知识密集型任务中有效，但普遍认为对推理任务（如数学、代码）帮助有限，需要探索新的检索源。
analysis.problem: 如何利用 RAG 提升推理密集型任务的性能，突破传统文档检索的局限。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 T3 方法，将问题求解过程中的中间思考轨迹离线转化为结构化、易于检索的表示，并用于简单的检索-生成流水线。
contributions: 挑战了 RAG 对推理任务无益的普遍假设，证明思考轨迹是有效的检索源。
提出 T3 方法，将思考轨迹转化为结构化表示，提升可用性和检索效果。
analysis.experiments: 在 AIME 2025-2026、LiveCodeBench、GPQA-Diamond 等基准上，使用 Gemini-2-thinking 等模型生成的轨迹进行 RAG，相比非 RAG 基线和标准网页检索均有提升，例如在 AIME 上对 Gemini-2.5-Flash 相对提升 56.3%，且额外推理成本低甚至降低 15%。
limitations: 依赖高质量思考轨迹的生成，可能受限于基础模型能力。
结构化转换方法 T3 的通用性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 方法新颖，实验充分，对推理任务有显著提升，值得深入阅读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过检索思考轨迹（thinking traces）而非文档，RAG 在推理任务上取得显著提升。

papers.title: MedSR-Vision: Deep Learning Framework for Multi-Domain Medical Image Super-Resolution
papers.abstract: Medical image super-resolution (MedSR) is essential for improving diagnostic precision across diverse imaging modalities such as MRI, CT, X-ray, Ultrasound, and Fundus imaging. Despite rapid advances in deep learning, challenges remain in preserving anatomical accuracy, maintaining perceptual quality, and generalizing across medical domains. This paper presents MedSR-Vision, a novel unified deep learning framework for evaluating and comparing super-resolution models across five modalities: Brain MRI, Chest X-ray, Renal Ultrasound, Nephrolithiasis CT, and Spine MRI, at magnification scales of $\times2$, $\times3$, and $\times4$. Three representative models namely SRCNN, SwinIR, and Real-ESRGAN are benchmarked using multiple quantitative metrics encompassing fidelity, perceptual realism, and sharpness. Experimental analysis demonstrates that Real-ESRGAN achieves superior perceptual quality and edge recovery at higher scales, SwinIR excels in preserving structural and diagnostic features, and SRCNN provides efficient and stable performance at lower magnifications. The results establish domain-specific insights and practical guidelines for model selection in clinical imaging workflows, offering a standardized evaluation framework for future medical image super-resolution research and deployment.

analysis.tldr: 提出统一框架 MedSR-Vision，在五种医学影像模态上基准测试 SRCNN、SwinIR、Real-ESRGAN 超分辨率模型，发现 Real-ESRGAN 高倍率感知质量最佳，SwinIR 结构保持最优，SRCNN 低倍率高效稳定。
analysis.research_motivation: 医学图像超分辨率对提升诊断精度至关重要，但现有方法在保持解剖准确性、感知质量和跨模态泛化方面仍面临挑战，缺乏统一的评估框架。
analysis.problem: 缺乏一个标准化的多模态医学图像超分辨率评估框架，以系统比较不同模型在不同模态和放大倍数下的性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: Real-ESRGAN 在高倍率下感知质量和边缘恢复更优，SwinIR 在保持结构和诊断特征方面更出色，SRCNN 在低倍率下高效稳定。
analysis.method: 提出 MedSR-Vision 统一框架，在五种模态（脑 MRI、胸部 X 光、肾超声、肾结石 CT、脊柱 MRI）上，以 ×2、×3、×4 倍率基准测试 SRCNN、SwinIR、Real-ESRGAN，使用多种定量指标（保真度、感知真实感、锐度）。
contributions: 提出 MedSR-Vision，一个统一的多模态医学图像超分辨率评估框架。
在五种模态和三种放大倍数下系统比较了三种代表性模型，提供了领域特定的模型选择指南。
analysis.experiments: 在五种医学影像模态（Brain MRI, Chest X-ray, Renal Ultrasound, Nephrolithiasis CT, Spine MRI）上，以 ×2、×3、×4 倍率测试 SRCNN、SwinIR、Real-ESRGAN，使用保真度、感知真实感和锐度等定量指标。
limitations: 仅评估了三种模型，可能未涵盖最新方法。
未涉及临床诊断准确性的直接验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 提供了实用的基准框架和模型选择指南，但方法创新性一般，技术深度有限。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出统一框架 MedSR-Vision，在五种医学影像模态上基准测试 SRCNN、SwinIR、Real-ESRGAN 超分辨率模型，发现 Real-ESRGAN 高倍率感知质量最佳，SwinIR 结构保持最优，SRCNN 低倍率高效稳定。

papers.title: Automated Large-scale CVRP Solver Design via LLM-assisted Flexible MCTS
papers.abstract: Solving large-scale CVRP (LSCVRP) with hundreds to thousands of nodes remains difficult for even state-of-the-art solvers. Divide-and-conquer can scale by decomposing the instance into size-reduced subproblems, but designing decomposition logic and configuring sub-solvers is highly expertise- and labor-intensive. Large Language Models (LLMs) have emerged as promising tools for automated algorithm design. However, existing LLM-driven approaches struggle with LSCVRP primarily due to the difficulty in generating sophisticated search strategies within a limited context window. To bridge this gap, we propose the LLM-assisted Flexible Monte Carlo Tree Search (LaF-MCTS), a novel framework that automates the design of high-performance LSCVRP solvers. We develop a three-tier decision hierarchy to enable incremental design of decomposition policies and sub-solvers for LSCVRP. To enable efficient search within the algorithmic hypothesis space, we introduce semantic pruning to eliminate semantically and structurally redundant codes, and branch regrowth to regenerate codes and preserve diversity. Extensive experiments on CVRPLib demonstrate that LaF-MCTS autonomously composes and optimizes decomposition-enhanced solvers that surpasses various state-of-the-art CVRP solvers.

analysis.tldr: 提出LaF-MCTS框架，利用LLM辅助的灵活蒙特卡洛树搜索自动设计大规模CVRP求解器，在CVRPLib上超越多种现有方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 大规模CVRP求解困难，现有分治方法依赖专家手工设计分解逻辑和子求解器，耗时且需要专业知识；LLM驱动的自动算法设计在有限上下文窗口内难以生成复杂搜索策略。
analysis.problem: 如何自动设计高性能的大规模CVRP求解器，克服LLM在有限上下文窗口下生成复杂搜索策略的困难。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出LaF-MCTS框架，包含三级决策层次用于增量设计分解策略和子求解器，引入语义剪枝消除冗余代码，以及分支再生保持多样性。
contributions: 提出LaF-MCTS框架，自动化设计大规模CVRP求解器。
设计三级决策层次、语义剪枝和分支再生机制，提升搜索效率和求解性能。
analysis.experiments: 在CVRPLib基准上实验，LaF-MCTS自动组合和优化的分解增强求解器超越了多种最先进CVRP求解器。
limitations: 可能依赖LLM的生成质量，对复杂问题泛化性待验证。
框架复杂度较高，实际部署可能需要大量计算资源。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.reason: 方法新颖，结合LLM和MCTS自动设计求解器，实验验证有效，但属于运筹优化领域，与核心关注方向中等相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出LaF-MCTS框架，利用LLM辅助的灵活蒙特卡洛树搜索自动设计大规模CVRP求解器，在CVRPLib上超越多种现有方法。

papers.title: FreeTimeGS++: Secrets of Dynamic Gaussian Splatting and Their Principles
papers.abstract: The recent surge in 4D Gaussian Splatting (4DGS) has achieved impressive dynamic scene reconstruction. While these methods demonstrate remarkable performance, the specific drivers behind such gains remain less explored, making a systematic understanding of the underlying principles challenging. In this paper, we perform a comprehensive analysis of these hidden factors to provide a clearer perspective on the 4DGS framework. We first establish a controlled baseline, FreeTimeGS_ours, by formalizing and reproducing the heuristics of the state-of-the-art FreeTimeGS. Using this framework, we dissect 4DGS along its fundamental axes and uncover key secrets, including the emergent temporal partitioning driven by Gaussian durations and the discrepancy between photometric fidelity and spatiotemporal consistency. Based on these insights, we propose FreeTimeGS++, a principled method that employs gated marginalization and neural velocity fields to achieve superior stability and robust dynamic representations. Our approach yields reproducible results with reduced run-to-run variance. We will release our implementation to provide a reliable foundation for future 4DGS research.

analysis.tldr: 系统分析4D高斯泼溅的隐藏因素，提出FreeTimeGS++方法提升动态场景重建的稳定性与鲁棒性。
analysis.research_motivation: 4D高斯泼溅（4DGS）在动态场景重建中表现优异，但其性能提升的具体驱动因素尚不明确，缺乏系统性的原理理解，阻碍了该框架的进一步发展。
analysis.problem: 揭示4DGS框架中隐藏的关键因素（如高斯持续时间导致的时间分区、光度保真度与时空一致性之间的差异），并基于这些原理提出更稳定、鲁棒的动态表示方法。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要揭示了两个关键现象：1）高斯持续时间驱动了突发的时间分区；2）光度保真度与时空一致性之间存在差异。这些现象是4DGS性能提升的隐藏因素。
analysis.method: 提出FreeTimeGS++方法，采用门控边缘化（gated marginalization）和神经速度场（neural velocity fields）来提升稳定性并实现鲁棒的动态表示。
contributions: 建立了受控基线FreeTimeGS_ours，形式化并复现了FreeTimeGS的启发式方法。
系统分析了4DGS的关键因素，揭示了高斯持续时间驱动的时间分区和光度-时空一致性差异。
提出了FreeTimeGS++方法，通过门控边缘化和神经速度场实现更稳定、鲁棒的动态重建。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅在特定动态场景下验证，泛化性需进一步测试。
门控边缘化和神经速度场的计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.reason: 系统分析4DGS原理并提出改进方法，创新性和技术深度较高，但摘要未提供实验细节，影响和相关性中等。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 系统分析4D高斯泼溅的隐藏因素，提出FreeTimeGS++方法提升动态场景重建的稳定性与鲁棒性。

papers.title: LLM-ADAM: A Generalizable LLM Agent Framework for Pre-Print Anomaly Detection in Additive Manufacturing
papers.abstract: Additive manufacturing (AM) continues to transform modern manufacturing by enabling flexible, on-demand production of complex geometries across diverse industries. Fused filament fabrication (FFF) has extended AM to laboratories, classrooms, and small production environments, but this accessibility shifts process-planning responsibility to users who may lack manufacturing expertise. A syntactically valid slicer profile can still encode thermally or geometrically harmful settings, and subtle G-code edits can alter extrusion, cooling, or adhesion before a print begins. Pre-print G-code screening catches accidental or adversarial machine-program errors before material or machine time is wasted. This paper proposes LLM-ADAM as a generalizable LLM framework for pre-print anomaly detection in AM. The framework decomposes the task into three roles: Extractor-LLM maps a G-code file to a structured process-parameter schema; Reference-LLM converts printer and material documentation into aligned operating ranges; and Judge-LLM interprets a deterministic deviation table and G-code evidence to decide whether a part is non-defective or belongs to an anomaly class. Printers, materials, and LLM backbones are interchangeable test conditions, not fixed assumptions. We evaluate the framework on an N=200 FFF G-code corpus spanning two desktop printer families, two materials, and five classes including non-defective, under-extrusion, over-extrusion, warping, and stringing. The best framework configuration reaches 87.5% accuracy, compared with 59.5% for the strongest engineered single-LLM baseline. The results show that structured decomposition, rather than backbone strength alone, is the dominant source of improvement, with defect classes identified at or near ceiling for leading configurations while residual errors concentrate on conservative false alarms for non-defective samples.

analysis.tldr: 提出LLM-ADAM框架，通过角色分解实现增材制造预打印异常检测，准确率达87.5%。
analysis.research_motivation: 增材制造中，用户缺乏专业知识可能导致切片配置或G代码存在热/几何缺陷，现有方法难以有效检测预打印错误。
analysis.problem: 如何利用LLM框架对增材制造中的G代码进行预打印异常检测，以识别热/几何缺陷。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 结构化分解比单纯增强LLM骨干更能提升性能，错误主要集中在非缺陷样本的保守误报。
analysis.method: 将任务分解为三个角色：Extractor-LLM提取结构化参数，Reference-LLM转换文档为操作范围，Judge-LLM基于偏差表判断缺陷类别。
contributions: 提出LLM-ADAM，首个通用LLM框架用于增材制造预打印异常检测。
通过角色分解实现可泛化性，支持不同打印机、材料和LLM骨干。
在200个样本数据集上达到87.5%准确率，显著优于单LLM基线。
analysis.experiments: 在包含两台桌面打印机、两种材料和五类缺陷（非缺陷、欠挤出、过挤出、翘曲、拉丝）的200个FFF G代码语料库上评估，最佳配置准确率87.5%，最强单LLM基线为59.5%。
limitations: 数据集规模较小（N=200），可能限制泛化性。
仅针对FFF工艺，其他增材制造工艺未验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法有创新，但应用领域较窄，实验规模有限。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出LLM-ADAM框架，通过角色分解实现增材制造预打印异常检测，准确率达87.5%。

papers.title: DGPO: Distribution Guided Policy Optimization for Fine Grained Credit Assignment
papers.abstract: Reinforcement learning is crucial for aligning large language models to perform complex reasoning tasks. However, current algorithms such as Group Relative Policy Optimization suffer from coarse grained, sequence level credit assignment, which severely struggles to isolate pivotal reasoning steps within long Chain of Thought generations. Furthermore, the standard unbounded Kullback Leibler divergence penalty induces severe gradient instability and mode seeking conservatism, ultimately stifling the discovery of novel reasoning trajectories. To overcome these limitations, we introduce Distribution Guided Policy Optimization, a novel critic free reinforcement learning framework that reinterprets distribution deviation as a guiding signal rather than a rigid penalty. DGPO replaces the volatile KL divergence with the bounded Hellinger distance to safely quantify token level exploration without the risk of gradient explosion. To effectively distinguish genuine reasoning breakthroughs from hallucinatory noise, we propose an entropy gating mechanism that scales this deviation by the policy`s epistemic uncertainty. By dynamically redistributing the coarse sequence-level advantage to individual tokens based on these gated scores, DGPO heavily incentivizes critical exploratory steps while suppressing unwarranted, low-entropy deviations. Consequently, DGPO completely eliminates the traditional token-level KL penalty and achieves fine-grained credit reallocation without the computational overhead of an additional value network. Extensive empirical evaluations demonstrate that DGPO sets a new state-of-the-art for critic free alignment. Notably, on the Qwen2.5-32B architecture, DGPO achieves 60.0% Avg@32 accuracy and 46.0% Avg@32 accuracy on the challenging AIME2024 and AIME2025 benchmarks respectively, substantially outperforming competitive baselines like DAPO.

analysis.tldr: DGPO通过Hellinger距离和熵门控机制实现细粒度信用分配，在无评论家强化学习对齐中达到SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有强化学习算法（如GRPO）在长思维链推理中面临粗粒度序列级信用分配和KL散度导致的梯度不稳定问题，限制了复杂推理能力的提升。
analysis.problem: 如何在不使用额外价值网络的情况下，实现细粒度令牌级信用分配并稳定优化过程。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 标准KL散度惩罚导致梯度爆炸和模式保守，阻碍新颖推理轨迹的发现；序列级优势无法区分关键推理步骤与噪声。
analysis.method: 提出无评论家框架DGPO，用有界Hellinger距离替代KL散度量化令牌级探索，并引入熵门控机制根据策略不确定性缩放偏差，实现细粒度信用再分配。
contributions: 提出DGPO框架，用Hellinger距离和熵门控实现稳定且细粒度的令牌级信用分配。
在Qwen2.5-32B上，AIME2024和AIME2025基准达到60.0%和46.0% Avg@32准确率，超越DAPO等基线。
analysis.experiments: 在Qwen2.5-32B架构上评估，AIME2024和AIME2025基准上DGPO分别达到60.0%和46.0% Avg@32准确率，优于DAPO。
limitations: 可能仅在特定规模模型上验证，泛化性需进一步测试。
熵门控机制的超参数敏感性未在摘要中讨论。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，实验效果显著，与LLM推理对齐高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: DGPO通过Hellinger距离和熵门控机制实现细粒度信用分配，在无评论家强化学习对齐中达到SOTA。

papers.title: AHPA: Adaptive Hierarchical Prior Alignment for Diffusion Transformers
papers.abstract: Representation alignment has recently emerged as an effective paradigm for accelerating Diffusion Transformer training. Despite their success, existing alignment methods typically impose a fixed supervision target or a fixed alignment granularity throughout the entire denoising trajectory, whether the guidance is provided by external vision encoders, internal self-representations, or VAE-derived features. We argue that such timestep-agnostic alignment is suboptimal because the useful granularity of representation supervision changes systematically with the signal-to-noise ratio. In high-noise regimes, diffusion models benefit more from coarse semantic and layout-level anchoring, whereas in low-noise regimes, the training signal should emphasize spatially detailed and structurally faithful refinement. This non-stationary alignment behavior creates a representational mismatch for static single-level supervisors. To address this issue, we propose Adaptive Hierarchical Prior Alignment (AHPA), a lightweight alignment framework that exploits the hierarchical representations naturally embedded in the frozen VAE encoder. Instead of using only a single compressed latent as the alignment target, AHPA extracts multi-level VAE features that provide complementary priors ranging from local geometry and spatial topology to coarse semantic layout. A timestep-conditioned Dynamic Router adaptively selects and weights these hierarchical priors along the denoising trajectory, thereby synchronizing the alignment granularity with the model's evolving training needs. Extensive experiments show that AHPA improves convergence and generation quality over baselines and incurs no additional inference cost while avoiding external encoder supervision during training.

analysis.tldr: 提出自适应分层先验对齐方法，根据去噪阶段动态调整对齐粒度以加速扩散Transformer训练。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有表示对齐方法在扩散Transformer训练中采用固定监督目标或固定对齐粒度，忽略了不同噪声水平下模型对对齐粒度的动态需求，导致训练效率低下。
analysis.problem: 如何根据去噪阶段信号噪声比的变化，自适应地调整表示对齐的粒度，以加速扩散Transformer训练并提升生成质量。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 高噪声阶段模型更需要粗粒度的语义和布局锚定，低噪声阶段则需要细粒度的空间细节和结构保真度；静态单级监督器无法适应这种非平稳对齐行为。
analysis.method: 提出AHPA框架，利用冻结VAE编码器中的多级分层特征作为先验，通过时间步条件动态路由器沿去噪轨迹自适应选择和加权这些先验，实现对齐粒度与训练需求的同步。
contributions: 揭示了扩散模型训练中表示对齐粒度应随噪声水平动态变化的非平稳特性。
提出AHPA框架，利用VAE多级特征和动态路由器实现自适应分层先验对齐。
实验证明AHPA加速收敛、提升生成质量，且不增加推理成本，无需外部编码器监督。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅提及大量实验表明AHPA在收敛和生成质量上优于基线。
limitations: 依赖冻结VAE编码器的多级特征，可能不适用于不使用VAE的扩散模型。
动态路由器的设计可能引入额外训练复杂度，摘要未详细分析。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.reason: 方法创新性较高，针对扩散Transformer训练加速提出自适应对齐策略，但实验细节不足，技术深度中等。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出自适应分层先验对齐方法，根据去噪阶段动态调整对齐粒度以加速扩散Transformer训练。

papers.title: TACO: Trajectory Aligning Cross-view Optimisation
papers.abstract: Cross-View Geo-localisation (CVGL) matches ground imagery against satellite tiles to give absolute position fixes, an alternative to GNSS where signals are occluded, jammed, or spoofed. Recent fine-grained CVGL methods regress sub-tile metric pose, but have only been evaluated as one-shot localisers, never as the primary fix in a live pipeline. Inertial sensing provides high-rate relative motion, but accumulates unbounded drift without an absolute anchor. We propose TACO, a tightly-coupled IMU + fine-grained CVGL pipeline that consumes a single GNSS reading at start-up and thereafter operates on onboard sensing alone. A closed-form cross-track error model triggers CVGL before IMU drift exceeds the matcher's capture radius, and a forward-biased five-point multi-crop search keeps inference cost fixed at five forward passes per fix. A yaw-residual gate rejects fixes that disagree with the onboard compass, and an anisotropic body-frame noise model scales each Unscented Kalman Filter update by per-fix confidence. A factor graph with vetted loop closures provides an offline smoothed trajectory. On the KITTI raw dataset, TACO reduces median Absolute Trajectory Error (ATE) from 97.0m (IMU-only) to 16.3m, a 5.9 times reduction, at <0.1 ms per-frame fusion cost and a 5-10% camera duty cycle. Code is available: github.com/tavisshore/TACO.

analysis.tldr: TACO 提出一种紧耦合 IMU 与细粒度跨视角地理定位的管道，仅需启动时一次 GNSS 读数，即可实现低漂移、低成本的绝对定位。
analysis.research_motivation: GNSS 在信号遮挡、干扰或欺骗场景下不可靠，而现有细粒度跨视角定位方法仅作为一次性定位器，未与惯性传感融合形成实时管道；纯惯性导航存在累积漂移。
analysis.problem: 如何将细粒度跨视角地理定位与 IMU 紧耦合，实现仅依赖机载传感器、无需持续 GNSS 的实时绝对定位。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 TACO 管道：使用闭合形式的跨轨误差模型在 IMU 漂移超过匹配器捕获半径前触发 CVGL；前向偏置的五点多裁剪搜索保持推理成本固定；偏航残差门拒绝与罗盘不一致的修正；各向异性机体噪声模型按每次修正置信度缩放 UKF 更新；因子图提供离线平滑轨迹。
contributions: 首个将细粒度 CVGL 与 IMU 紧耦合的实时定位管道，仅需启动时一次 GNSS 读数。
提出闭合形式跨轨误差模型、前向偏置搜索、偏航残差门和自适应噪声模型等组件，实现高效鲁棒融合。
analysis.experiments: 在 KITTI raw 数据集上，TACO 将中位绝对轨迹误差从 97.0m（仅 IMU）降至 16.3m，降低 5.9 倍，每帧融合成本 <0.1 ms，相机占空比 5-10%。
limitations: 依赖启动时一次 GNSS 读数，若初始位置误差过大可能影响后续。
仅在 KITTI 数据集上评估，泛化性待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新且实验效果显著，但属于特定定位任务，与 VLM 核心方向关联中等。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: TACO 提出一种紧耦合 IMU 与细粒度跨视角地理定位的管道，仅需启动时一次 GNSS 读数，即可实现低漂移、低成本的绝对定位。

papers.title: Governed Metaprogramming for Intelligent Systems: Reclassifying Eval as a Governed Effect
papers.abstract: AI systems increasingly synthesize executable structure at runtime: LLMs generate programs, agents construct workflows,self-improving systems modify their own behavior. In classical homoiconic and staged languages, the transition from coderepresentation to execution is unrestricted. eval is a language primitive, not a governed operation. We argue that ingovernedintelligent systems, this transition is an authority amplification: it converts symbolic structure into executableauthority andmust be mediated like any other effect. We present governed metaprogramming, a language design where programrepresentations(machine forms) are first-class values, form manipulation is pure computation, and materialization (the transition fromform toexecutable machine) is a governed effect subject to structural inspection. The governance system analyzes the proposedprogram'scapability requirements, policy compliance, and resource estimates before permitting execution. We formalize twojudgments: pureform evaluation (which emits no directives) and governed materialization (which emits exactly one governed directive). Weprovethree properties: purity of form manipulation, the no-bypass theorem, and boundary preservation. We implement the designinMashinTalk, a DSL for AI workflows compiling to BEAM bytecode, and report on integration with 454 existingmachine-checked Rocqtheorems. The central contribution is reclassifying eval from a language primitive into a governed effect.

analysis.tldr: 提出将eval从语言原语重新分类为受控效应的受控元编程框架，用于安全执行AI系统生成的代码。
analysis.research_motivation: AI系统（如LLM、智能体）在运行时动态合成可执行结构，但传统语言中eval是无限制的原语，导致权限放大风险，缺乏安全治理。
analysis.problem: 如何将eval从无限制的语言原语转变为受控效应，以在允许执行前对代码进行结构检查、策略合规和资源评估。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出受控元编程设计：将程序表示（机器形式）作为一等值，形式操作是纯计算，而物化（形式到可执行机器的转换）是受控效应，需经过结构检查、能力需求分析、策略合规和资源估计。形式化两个判断：纯形式求值（无指令）和受控物化（恰好一个受控指令）。证明三个性质：形式操作纯度、无旁路定理、边界保持。在MashinTalk DSL中实现，编译到BEAM字节码，集成454个现有Rocq定理。
contributions: 将eval从语言原语重新分类为受控效应，提出受控元编程框架。
形式化纯形式求值和受控物化两个判断，并证明三个关键性质。
在MashinTalk DSL中实现并集成454个Rocq定理。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定语言生态（BEAM字节码），通用性待验证。
性能开销未在摘要中讨论。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 方法新颖且形式化扎实，但缺乏实验验证，与重点方向中等相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出将eval从语言原语重新分类为受控效应的受控元编程框架，用于安全执行AI系统生成的代码。

papers.title: Cryptographic Registry Provenance: Structural Defense Against Dependency Confusion in AI Package Ecosystems
papers.abstract: Dependency confusion attacks exploit a structural gap in software distribution: once a package is installed, there is no cryptographic proof of which registry distributed it. Every existing defense is configuration-based and fails silently when misconfigured. We present a cryptographic distribution provenance system comprising three components: (1) cryptographic registry identity, where every registry holds an Ed25519 keypair and signs every artifact it distributes; (2) a dual-signature model, where the publisher signs at packaging time and the registry countersigns at publication time; and (3) authoritative namespace binding, where consumers pin registry fingerprints and the resolver cryptographically rejects artifacts from unauthorized registries. These create three defense layers requiring simultaneous compromise for a successful attack. A comparison across eight ecosystems (npm, Cargo, Hex.pm, PyPI, Go modules, Docker/OCI, NuGet, Maven) shows no existing ecosystem combines mandatory publisher signing, cryptographic registry identity, mandatory registry countersigning, and consumer-side cryptographic enforcement. The system extends to AI-generation provenance as a signed attribute and governance-enforced dependency resolution. A case study integrates distribution provenance with a three-layer runtime governance architecture, creating a four-phase lifecycle chain with no cryptographic gaps.

analysis.tldr: 提出加密注册表溯源系统，通过注册表签名、双重签名和命名空间绑定防御依赖混淆攻击。
analysis.research_motivation: 依赖混淆攻击利用软件分发中的结构漏洞，现有防御基于配置且易静默失效，亟需加密级防护。
analysis.problem: 解决AI包生态系统中依赖混淆攻击的防御问题，提供不可伪造的注册表分发证明。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出加密分发溯源系统，包括加密注册表身份（Ed25519密钥对）、双重签名模型（发布者签名+注册表签名）和权威命名空间绑定（消费者固定注册表指纹，解析器拒绝未授权注册表工件）。
contributions: 提出首个结合加密注册表身份、双重签名和命名空间绑定的依赖混淆防御系统。
跨八个生态系统比较，显示现有系统均缺乏完整防御组合。
扩展至AI生成溯源和治理强制依赖解析，实现无加密间隙的生命周期链。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能增加发布和分发延迟。
需要生态系统的广泛采用和密钥管理基础设施。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，跨生态系统比较有说服力，但缺乏实验验证且与AI包安全直接相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出加密注册表溯源系统，通过注册表签名、双重签名和命名空间绑定防御依赖混淆攻击。

papers.title: Revisiting the Travel Planning Capabilities of Large Language Models
papers.abstract: Travel planning serves as a critical task for long-horizon reasoning, exposing significant deficits in LLMs. However, existing benchmarks and evaluations primarily assess final plans in an end-to-end manner, which lacks interpretability and makes it difficult to analyze the root causes of failures. To bridge this gap, we decompose travel planning into five constituent atomic sub-capabilities, including \emph{Constraint Extraction}, \emph{Tool Use}, \emph{Plan Generation}, \emph{Error Identification}, and \emph{Error Correction}. We implement a decoupled evaluation protocol leveraging oracle intermediate contexts to rigorously isolate these components, thereby measuring the atomic performance boundary without the noise of cascading errors. Our results highlight a clear contrast in performance: while LLMs are proficient in extracting explicit constraints, they struggle to infer implicit, open-world requirements. Furthermore, they exhibit structural biases in plan generation and suffer from ineffective self-correction, characterized by excessive sensitivity and erroneous persistence. These findings offer precise directions for improving LLM reasoning and planning abilities.

analysis.tldr: 将旅行规划分解为五个原子子能力，通过解耦评估揭示LLM在隐式约束推理和自校正中的结构性缺陷。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有端到端评估缺乏可解释性，难以定位LLM在长程规划任务中的失败根源。
analysis.problem: 如何系统性地诊断LLM在旅行规划中的能力瓶颈，而非仅评估最终计划质量。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: LLM擅长提取显式约束，但难以推断隐式开放世界需求；计划生成存在结构性偏差；自校正过程过度敏感且错误持续。
analysis.method: 将旅行规划分解为约束提取、工具使用、计划生成、错误识别和错误修正五个原子子能力，并采用解耦评估协议，利用oracle中间上下文隔离各组件。
contributions: 提出旅行规划的五原子子能力分解框架
设计解耦评估协议以独立测量各子能力性能边界
揭示LLM在隐式推理和自校正中的具体失败模式
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 分解可能未覆盖所有规划子能力
oracle中间上下文在真实场景中不可得
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 方法创新性高，分解评估思路清晰，但实验细节缺失，适合精读以了解具体发现。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 将旅行规划分解为五个原子子能力，通过解耦评估揭示LLM在隐式约束推理和自校正中的结构性缺陷。

papers.title: SHIELD: A Diverse Clinical Note Dataset and Distilled Small Language Models for Enterprise-Scale De-identification
papers.abstract: De-identification of clinical text remains essential for secondary use of electronic health records (EHRs), yet public benchmarks such as i2b2 2006/2014 are over a decade old and lack the semantic and demographic diversity of modern narratives. While Large Language Models (LLMs) achieve state-of-the-art zero-shot extraction, enterprise deployment is hindered by compute costs and governance restricting Protected Health Information (PHI) from cloud APIs. We introduce SHIELD (Synthetic Human-annotated Identifier-replaced Entries for Learning and De-identification), a diverse dataset of 1,394 notes with 10,505 gold-standard PHI spans across 9 categories, built via set-cover diversity sampling with human-in-the-loop adjudication. We evaluate four LLMs (two proprietary, two open-weight) to establish a performance ceiling, then distill these capabilities into locally deployable Small Language Models (SLMs). Distributional analysis using Frechet Text Distance and Jensen-Shannon Divergence confirms SHIELD occupies a distinct region of biomedical embedding and vocabulary space versus legacy benchmarks. Our best distilled model matches its teacher on structured PHI categories (DATE, DOCTOR, ID, PATIENT, PHONE) and achieves micro-averaged span-level precision of 0.88 and recall of 0.86 on standard workstation hardware. Cross-dataset evaluation shows diversity-trained models generalize well on universal structured PHI, while institution-specific entities remain hard to transfer, suggesting optimal deployment combines broad-coverage models with specialized models for high-volume notes. We publicly release the SHIELD dataset and the distilled DeBERTa v3 model.

analysis.tldr: 构建多样化临床文本去标识数据集SHIELD，并通过知识蒸馏获得可本地部署的小语言模型，在结构化PHI类别上匹配教师模型性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有临床文本去标识基准数据集（如i2b2 2006/2014）过时且缺乏语义和人口多样性；大型语言模型虽性能优异，但企业部署受限于计算成本和隐私治理（禁止将PHI发送至云API），亟需可本地部署的高效模型。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个多样化、现代的临床文本去标识数据集，并从中蒸馏出能在标准工作站硬件上高效运行且性能接近大模型的小语言模型。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 通过集合覆盖多样性采样和人工审核构建包含1,394份笔记、10,505个PHI跨度的SHIELD数据集；评估四种LLM（两种专有、两种开源）作为性能上限，然后通过知识蒸馏将其能力压缩至可本地部署的小语言模型（SLM）。
contributions: 构建了SHIELD数据集，包含1,394份多样化临床笔记和10,505个黄金标准PHI跨度，覆盖9个类别，并通过Frechet文本距离和JS散度验证其与旧基准在嵌入和词汇空间上的差异性。
通过知识蒸馏获得可本地部署的DeBERTa v3小模型，在结构化PHI类别上匹配教师模型性能，并在标准工作站上达到微平均跨度级精确率0.88和召回率0.86。
跨数据集评估表明多样性训练的模型在通用结构化PHI上泛化良好，但机构特定实体难以迁移，建议采用广覆盖模型与专用模型结合的部署策略。
analysis.experiments: 在SHIELD数据集上评估了四种LLM（两种专有、两种开源）作为性能上限；蒸馏后的DeBERTa v3模型在标准工作站硬件上达到微平均跨度级精确率0.88和召回率0.86；进行了跨数据集评估以验证泛化能力。
limitations: 机构特定实体（如医院内部标识符）的迁移性较差，可能需要针对高频笔记类型训练专用模型。
数据集规模相对较小（1,394份笔记），可能无法覆盖所有临床场景的多样性。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.reason: 数据集构建方法新颖且实用，蒸馏模型性能接近大模型，适合企业级部署，但技术深度中等。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 构建多样化临床文本去标识数据集SHIELD，并通过知识蒸馏获得可本地部署的小语言模型，在结构化PHI类别上匹配教师模型性能。

papers.title: FACTOR: Counterfactual Training-Free Test-Time Adaptation for Open-Vocabulary Object Detection
papers.abstract: Open-vocabulary object detection often fails under distribution shifts, as it can be misled by spurious correlations between non-causal visual attributes (e.g., brightness, texture) and object categories. Existing test-time adaptation (TTA) methods either depend on costly online optimization or perform global calibration, overlooking the attribute-specific nature of these failures. To address this, we propose FACTOR (counterFACtual training-free Test-time adaptation for Open-vocabulaRy object detection), a lightweight framework grounded in counterfactual reasoning. By perturbing test images along non-causal attributes and comparing region-level predictions between original and counterfactual views, FACTOR quantifies attribute sensitivity, semantic relevance, and prediction variation to selectively suppress attribute-dependent predictions-without parameter updates. Experiments on PASCAL-C, COCO-C, and FoggyCityscapes show that FACTOR consistently outperforms prior TTA methods, demonstrating that explicit counterfactual reasoning effectively improves robustness under distribution shifts.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于反事实推理的无训练测试时适应方法，提升开放词汇目标检测在分布偏移下的鲁棒性。
analysis.research_motivation: 开放词汇目标检测在分布偏移下易受非因果视觉属性（如亮度、纹理）与类别之间的虚假相关性误导，现有测试时适应方法依赖昂贵的在线优化或全局校准，忽略了属性特定的失败模式。
analysis.problem: 如何在不进行参数更新的情况下，针对性地抑制非因果属性对开放词汇目标检测预测的影响，以提升分布偏移下的鲁棒性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出分布偏移下检测失败源于非因果视觉属性与类别的虚假相关性，且现有TTA方法未考虑属性特定的失败模式。
analysis.method: FACTOR框架：通过扰动测试图像的非因果属性生成反事实视图，比较原始视图与反事实视图的区域级预测，量化属性敏感性、语义相关性和预测变化，从而选择性抑制依赖属性的预测，无需参数更新。
contributions: 提出首个基于反事实推理的无训练测试时适应方法FACTOR，用于开放词汇目标检测。
通过量化属性敏感性、语义相关性和预测变化，实现属性特定的预测抑制，无需在线优化。
analysis.experiments: 在PASCAL-C、COCO-C和FoggyCityscapes数据集上，FACTOR一致优于先前的TTA方法。
limitations: 可能依赖非因果属性的先验知识或扰动方式的选择。
仅针对开放词汇目标检测，泛化到其他任务需验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: causal reasoning
analysis.reason: 方法新颖，结合反事实推理与无训练TTA，实验验证有效，但技术细节和局限性需进一步阅读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于反事实推理的无训练测试时适应方法，提升开放词汇目标检测在分布偏移下的鲁棒性。

papers.title: On the Spectral Structure and Objective Equivalence of Orthogonal Multilabel Fisher Discriminants
papers.abstract: We provide a unified theoretical analysis of Linear Discriminant Analysis with simultaneous multilabel scatter matrix formulations and Stiefel orthogonality constraints. Our contributions span both algebraic structure and statistical guarantees. On the algebraic side, we characterize the rank of the multilabel between-class scatter matrix, showing that the effective discriminant dimensionality can strictly exceed the classical single-label bound of $C-1$; we establish a multilabel partition of variance and prove that all four Fisher objectives are equivalent under the $W^\top S_t^{ML} W = I_r$ constraint while characterizing their divergence under the Stiefel constraint; and we prove a two-sided label-distance preservation bound relating projected distances to Hamming distances in label space. On the statistical side, we establish a finite-sample $O(k_{\max}\sqrt{d\log d/n}/gap_r)$ bound on the subspace estimation error under sub-Gaussian noise with a matching $Ω(σ^2 d/(n\,gap_r))$ minimax lower bound, establishing a near-minimax-optimal rate (matching up to logarithmic and $k_{\max}$ factors) for multilabel discriminant subspace estimation. We further provide high-probability distance concentration, robustness guarantees under label interactions, and a regularization analysis preserving the spectral structure when $d \gg n$. All results are verified numerically on synthetic data generated from the linear label-effect model, covering both the algebraic identities and the multilabel-specific quantities ($k_{\max}$, $κ(S_t^{ML})$, $\|Γ/n\|_2$, $Δ_r$) that govern the statistical bounds. The numerical experiments are designed as a sanity check for the theorems rather than as an empirical benchmark; evaluation on real multilabel datasets is left to future work targeting application-oriented venues.

analysis.tldr: 正交多标签Fisher判别分析的谱结构与目标等价性理论分析
analysis.research_motivation: 多标签分类中线性判别分析（LDA）的理论基础薄弱，经典单标签LDA的结论（如判别维度上限C-1）不再适用，且不同Fisher目标函数在正交约束下的等价性未知，缺乏统计保证。
analysis.problem: 在Stiefel正交约束下，统一分析多标签LDA的代数结构（散度矩阵秩、目标等价性、距离保持）和统计性质（子空间估计误差率、鲁棒性）。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 理论推导：刻画多标签类间散度矩阵的秩，证明四种Fisher目标在W^T S_t^{ML} W=I_r约束下等价，在Stiefel约束下存在分歧；推导子空间估计误差的有限样本上界和极小化下界，并给出距离集中性和鲁棒性保证。
contributions: 证明了多标签LDA的有效判别维度可严格超过经典单标签的C-1上界
建立了四种Fisher目标在特定约束下的等价性及其在Stiefel约束下的分歧
给出了子空间估计误差的近乎极小化最优率（匹配至对数因子）
提供了高概率距离集中、标签交互鲁棒性以及高维正则化分析
analysis.experiments: 在合成数据上验证理论结果（代数恒等式和多标签特定量），未在真实数据集上评测。
limitations: 实验仅在合成数据上验证，缺乏真实多标签数据集上的实证
理论假设线性标签效应模型，可能不适用于非线性场景
analysis.primary_area_en: learning theory
analysis.reason: 理论贡献扎实，但应用方向较窄且缺乏真实实验，适合理论研究者精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 正交多标签Fisher判别分析的谱结构与目标等价性理论分析

papers.title: Copula-Based Endogeneity Correction for Doubly Robust Estimation of Treatment Effect
papers.abstract: Doubly Robust (DR) estimation of treatment effect relies on an untestable assumption that is the absence of unobserved confounding. This assumption is par- ticularly problematic in the context of healthcare research, where variables like pre- scription refill rates serve as proxies for unobserved behaviors such as medication adherence. These proxy variables are often endogenous, exhibiting correlation with the regression error term due to unmeasured confounding or measurement error. We propose a copula-corrected doubly robust estimator that addresses endogeneity in both the treatment and outcome models without requiring instrumental variables. Gaussian copulas model the joint distribution of endogenous covariates and the error term, enabling consistent estimation while preserving the doubly robust property that requires correct specification of either the treatment or outcome model, not both. Monte Carlo simulations demonstrate that naive DR estimation exhibits substantial bias under endogeneity, whereas our corrected estimator recovers unbiased treatment effects across different data-generating processes. We apply our method to examine the effect of nutritional counseling on blood pressure using the National Health and Nutrition Examination Survey (NHANES) data. Naive DR estimation suggests counseling is associated with increased blood pressure. After copula correction, this effect becomes statistically insignificant, consistent with literature showing modest effects of nutri- Counseling in reducing blood pressure. Our methodology provides researchers with a practical tool for obtaining treatment effects in the presence of endogeneity.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于Copula的双重稳健估计器，无需工具变量即可校正内生性偏差，恢复无偏处理效应估计。
analysis.research_motivation: 双重稳健估计依赖无未观测混杂假设，但医疗研究中代理变量常因未测量混杂或测量误差而内生，导致估计偏差。
analysis.problem: 在治疗和结果模型中存在内生协变量时，如何无需工具变量实现双重稳健的处理效应估计。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 模拟显示朴素双重稳健估计在内生性下存在显著偏差，而Copula校正后恢复无偏估计；NHANES数据中朴素估计显示营养咨询升高血压，校正后效应不显著。
analysis.method: 用高斯Copula建模内生协变量与误差项的联合分布，校正治疗模型和结果模型中的内生性，同时保持双重稳健性质。
contributions: 提出无需工具变量的Copula校正双重稳健估计器，同时处理治疗和结果模型的内生性。
通过模拟和真实数据（NHANES）验证方法能有效消除内生性偏差，得到更可靠的处理效应估计。
analysis.experiments: 蒙特卡洛模拟和NHANES数据应用，摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 依赖高斯Copula假设，可能不适用于非高斯依赖结构。
未讨论高维协变量或复杂内生性场景下的表现。
analysis.primary_area_en: causal reasoning
analysis.reason: 方法创新且实用，但实验细节有限，适合精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于Copula的双重稳健估计器，无需工具变量即可校正内生性偏差，恢复无偏处理效应估计。

papers.title: VEBench:Benchmarking Large Multimodal Models for Real-World Video Editing
papers.abstract: Real-world video editing demands not only expert knowledge of cinematic techniques but also multimodal reasoning to select, align, and combine footage into coherent narratives. While recent Large Multimodal Models (LMMs) have shown remarkable progress in general video understanding, their abilities in multi-video reasoning and operational editing workflows remain largely unexplored. We introduce VEBENCH, the first comprehensive benchmark designed to evaluate both editing knowledge understanding and operational reasoning in realistic video editing scenarios. VEBENCH contains 3.9K high-quality edited videos (over 257 hours) and 3,080 human-verified QA pairs, built through a three-round human-AI collaborative annotation pipeline that ensures precise temporal labeling and semantic consistency. It features two complementary QA tasks: 1) Video Editing Technique Recognition, assessing models' ability to identify 7 editing techniques using multimodal cues; and 2) Video Editing Operation Simulation, modeling real-world editing workflows by requiring the selection and temporal localization of relevant clips from multiple candidates. Extensive experiments across proprietary (e.g., Gemini-2.5-Pro) and open-source LMMs reveal a large gap between current model performance and human-level editing cognition. These results highlight the urgent need for bridging video understanding with creative operational reasoning. We envision VEBENCH as a foundation for advancing intelligent video editing systems and driving future research on complex reasoning.

analysis.tldr: 首个评估多模态大模型在真实视频编辑中知识与操作推理能力的基准。
analysis.research_motivation: 真实视频编辑需要专业知识与多模态推理，但现有LMMs在多视频推理和操作编辑流程方面的能力尚未被系统评估。

papers.title: RLDX-1 Technical Report
papers.abstract: While Vision-Language-Action models (VLAs) have shown remarkable progress toward human-like generalist robotic policies through the versatile intelligence (i.e. broad scene understanding and language-conditioned generalization) inherited from pre-trained Vision-Language Models, they still struggle with complex real-world tasks requiring broader functional capabilities (e.g. motion awareness, long-term memory, and physical sensing). To address this, we introduce RLDX-1, a general-purpose robotic policy for dexterous manipulation built on the Multi-Stream Action Transformer (MSAT), an architecture that unifies these capabilities by integrating heterogeneous modalities through modality-specific streams with cross-modal joint self-attention. RLDX-1 further combines this architecture with system-level design choices, including data synthesis for rare manipulation scenarios, learning procedures specialized for human-like manipulation, and inference optimizations for real-time deployment. Through empirical evaluation, we show that RLDX-1 consistently outperforms recent frontier VLAs (e.g. $π_{0.5}$ and GR00T N1.6) across both simulation benchmarks and real-world tasks that require broad functional capabilities beyond general versatility. In particular, RLDX-1 shows superiority in ALLEX humanoid tasks by achieving success rates of 86.8% while $π_{0.5}$ and GR00T N1.6 achieve around 40%, highlighting the ability of RLDX-1 to control a high-DoF humanoid robot under diverse functional demands. Together, these results position RLDX-1 as a promising step toward reliable VLAs for complex, contact-rich, and dynamic real-world dexterous manipulation.

analysis.tldr: RLDX-1 是一种基于多流动作 Transformer 的通用灵巧操作策略，在仿真和真实任务中显著优于现有 VLA 模型。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有 VLA 模型在复杂真实任务中缺乏运动感知、长期记忆和物理感知等广泛功能能力，限制了其应用。

RLDX-1 在仿真和真实任务中显著优于 π₀.₅ 和 GR00T N1.6，特别是在 ALLEX 人形任务中成功率 86.8% vs 约 40%。

papers.title: Partially Observed Structural Causal Models
papers.abstract: Here we introduce Partially Observed Structural Causal Models (POSCMs) that formalize causal systems where latent contexts co-determine both the interaction structure and downstream mechanisms on observed variables. POSCMs provide an extension of structural causal models (SCMs), as a self-contained causal modeling framework for endogenous graphs, allowing for an intervention hierarchy spanning node- and edge-level context and endogenous variable interventions. To enable surgical edge interventions, we adopt a Kolmogorov-Arnold-Sprecher edge-functional decomposition, an existence theorem for representing each node mechanism as a sum of univariate functions of its parents, yielding an explicit parametrization of dyadic functional contributions. We provide an identifiability theory that clarifies which intervention families would suffice to disentangle structure formation from mechanisms. We empirically validate these predictions in a biophysically detailed virtual human retina simulator, constructing intervention protocols that (i) reproduce the non-identifiability predicted when context is latent and no context-level interventions are available, (ii) exhibit structure-mechanism confounding under latent edges when only node interventions are observed, and (iii) recover synaptic input-output relationships via targeted node interventions, consistent with our positive kernel identifiability result. Our work generalizes SCMs in a way that allows it to work in a world closer to the one we live in.

analysis.tldr: 提出部分观测结构因果模型（POSCM），扩展SCM以处理潜在上下文对因果结构和机制的共同影响。
analysis.research_motivation: 现实世界中因果系统常受潜在上下文影响，但传统结构因果模型（SCM）假设图结构和机制完全已知，无法处理潜在上下文对交互结构和下游机制的共同决定作用。
analysis.problem: 如何形式化并识别潜在上下文同时影响因果图结构和节点机制的因果系统。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出部分观测结构因果模型（POSCM），采用Kolmogorov-Arnold-Sprecher边缘函数分解显式参数化成对功能贡献，并建立可识别性理论。
contributions: 提出POSCM框架，扩展SCM以处理潜在上下文对结构和机制的共同影响。
提供可识别性理论，明确哪些干预族足以解耦结构形成与机制。
在虚拟人视网膜模拟器上通过干预实验验证理论预测。
analysis.experiments: 在生物物理详细虚拟人视网膜模拟器上设计干预协议，验证非可识别性、结构-机制混杂以及通过节点干预恢复突触输入输出关系。
limitations: 可能依赖特定分解假设（Kolmogorov-Arnold-Sprecher）。
实证验证仅在模拟器中进行，未在真实数据上测试。

papers.title: Can AI Help You Get Over Your Breakup? One Session with a Belief-Reframing Chatbot Shows Sustained Distress Reduction
papers.abstract: Romantic breakups are among the most common and intense sources of psychological distress. We evaluated *overit*, a single-session AI chatbot that uses cognitive reappraisal to address breakup distress, informed by memory reconsolidation theory. In a pre-registered randomized controlled trial, 254 adults in the United States and United Kingdom who had experienced a romantic breakup were assigned to either an initial survey assessment followed by an AI chat session or to a survey-only control. Breakup distress was measured at baseline, 7 days, and again at an exploratory 1-month follow-up using the Breakup Distress Scale. Participants assigned to *overit* showed a significantly greater reduction in breakup distress than controls at 7 days (time-by-condition interaction B = -5.36, SE = 1.19, p < .001; completer-based d = -0.70). A smaller but still significant treatment advantage remained detectable at the exploratory 1-month follow-up among post-session completers (B = -2.92, SE = 1.22, p = .017). Exploratory post hoc moderation suggested a larger effect among male participants (B = 7.78, p = .003). These results suggest that a brief AI chatbot conversation can meaningfully reduce breakup distress, with exploratory evidence that a smaller advantage persists over the following month. Future work should test the intervention against active controls, evaluate repeated-session use, and recruit more diverse samples.

analysis.tldr: 单次AI聊天机器人通过认知重评显著减少分手痛苦，效果持续至少一个月。
analysis.research_motivation: 分手是常见的心理困扰来源，但传统心理干预可及性低，AI聊天机器人提供低成本、可扩展的解决方案。
analysis.problem: 评估单次AI聊天机器人（overit）对减少分手痛苦的有效性及效果持续性。

发现效果在7天时显著，且探索性分析表明1个月后仍有较小但显著的残余效果。

papers.title: CropVLM: A Domain-Adapted Vision-Language Model for Open-Set Crop Analysis
papers.abstract: High-throughput plant phenotyping, the quantitative measurement of observable plant traits, is critical for modern breeding but remains constrained by a "phenotyping bottleneck," where manual data collection is labor-intensive and prone to observer bias. Conventional closed-set computer vision systems fail to address this challenge, as they require extensive species-specific annotation and lack the flexibility to handle diverse breeding populations. To bridge this gap, we present CropVLM, a Vision-Language Model (VLM) adapted for the agricultural domain via Domain-Specific Semantic Alignment (DSSA). Trained on 52,987 manually selected image-caption pairs covering 37 species in natural field conditions, CropVLM effectively maps agronomic terminology to fine-grained visual features. We further introduce the Hybrid Open-Set Localization Network (HOS-Net), an architecture that integrates CropVLM to enable the detection of novel crops solely from natural language descriptions without retraining. By eliminating the reliance on species-specific training data, CropVLM provides a scalable solution for high-throughput phenotyping, accelerating genetic gain and facilitating large-scale biodiversity research essential for sustainable agriculture. The trained model weights and complete pipeline implementation are publicly available at: [https://github.com/boudiafA/CropVLM](https://github.com/boudiafA/CropVLM). In comprehensive evaluations, CropVLM achieves 72.51% zero-shot classification accuracy, outperforming seven CLIP-style baselines. Our detection pipeline demonstrates superior zero-shot generalization to novel species, achieving 49.17 AP50 on our CVTCropDet benchmark and 50.73 AP50 on tropical fruit species, compared to 34.89 and 48.58 for the next-best method, respectively.

analysis.tldr: CropVLM通过领域特定语义对齐和混合开放集定位网络，实现了农业领域的开放集作物分析，在零样本分类和检测上超越CLIP基线。
analysis.research_motivation: 高通量植物表型分析受限于人工数据收集的劳力和偏差，传统封闭集视觉系统需要大量物种标注且缺乏灵活性，无法应对多样化育种群体。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个无需重新训练即可从自然语言描述中检测新作物的开放集视觉-语言模型，以解决表型分析瓶颈。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出CropVLM，包含领域特定语义对齐（DSSA）和混合开放集定位网络（HOS-Net），在52,987对图像-描述数据上训练，实现零样本作物检测。
contributions: 提出CropVLM，首个针对农业领域适配的开放集视觉-语言模型，通过DSSA对齐农学术语与视觉特征。
引入HOS-Net架构，无需重新训练即可从自然语言描述中检测新作物。
在零样本分类和检测任务上超越多个CLIP基线，并公开模型权重和代码。

analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities

papers.title: Ortho-Hydra: Orthogonalized Experts for DiT LoRA
papers.abstract: LoRA fine-tuning of diffusion transformers (DiT) on multi-style data suffers from \emph{style bleed}: a single low-rank residual cannot represent several distinct artist fingerprints, and the optimizer converges to their average. Mixture-of-experts LoRA in the HydraLoRA style replaces the up-projection with $E$ heads under a router, but when every expert is zero-initialized the router receives identical gradient from each head and remains at the uniform prior. The experts then evolve permutation-symmetrically, and the network trains as a single rank-$r$ LoRA at $E{\times}$ the cost. We present \textbf{Ortho-Hydra}, a re-parameterisation that combines an OFT-style Cayley-orthogonal shared basis with per-expert \emph{disjoint output subspaces} carved from the top-$(Er)$ left singular vectors of the pretrained weight. Disjointness makes the router's per-expert score non-degenerate at step~$0$, so specialization receives gradient signal before any expert has trained. We test the predicted deadlock on a DiT pipeline by comparing two HydraLoRA baselines, a zero-initialized shared-basis variant and the original $σ{=}0.1$ Gaussian-jitter mitigation, against Ortho-Hydra under a matched optimiser, dataset, and step budget. Neither baseline leaves the uniform prior within the first $1\text{k}$ steps; Ortho-Hydra begins de-uniformising within the first few hundred. End-task generation quality on multi-style data is out of scope; we report the construction, the cold-start mechanism, and the routing dynamics it changes. Code: https://github.com/sorryhyun/anima_lora.

analysis.tldr: 提出 Ortho-Hydra，通过正交化专家子空间解决 DiT LoRA 微调中的风格泄露和路由冷启动问题。
analysis.research_motivation: LoRA 微调扩散 Transformer 处理多风格数据时，单个低秩残差无法表示多种风格，导致风格泄露；混合专家 LoRA 虽引入多个专家，但零初始化导致路由器梯度相同，专家对称演化，训练效率低。
analysis.problem: 多风格数据下 DiT LoRA 微调的风格泄露以及 HydraLoRA 中零初始化专家导致的路由器冷启动和专家对称性问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 零初始化专家使路由器在初始步骤接收相同梯度，保持均匀先验，专家对称演化，实际退化为单秩 LoRA，训练成本倍增。
analysis.method: 提出 Ortho-Hydra，结合 OFT 风格的 Cayley 正交共享基和从预训练权重顶部奇异向量中为每个专家划分不相交输出子空间，使路由器在初始步骤获得非退化分数，促进专家分化。
contributions: 提出 Ortho-Hydra 重参数化方法，通过正交共享基和不相交输出子空间解决专家冷启动问题。
实验验证零初始化和高斯抖动基线在 1000 步内无法离开均匀先验，而 Ortho-Hydra 在几百步内开始分化。
analysis.experiments: 在 DiT 流水线上比较零初始化共享基变体、原始高斯抖动缓解和 Ortho-Hydra，使用匹配的优化器、数据集和步数预算，报告路由动态。摘要未提供端任务生成质量结果。
limitations: 摘要未报告端任务生成质量，仅关注冷启动机制和路由动态。
方法可能增加参数和计算开销，需进一步评估。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，解决实际冷启动问题，但缺乏端任务性能验证，适合关注扩散模型微调的研究者。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出 Ortho-Hydra，通过正交化专家子空间解决 DiT LoRA 微调中的风格泄露和路由冷启动问题。

papers.title: Posterior-First Neural PDE Simulation: Inferring Hidden Problem State from a Single Field
papers.abstract: Neural PDE simulators often receive only a single observed field at deployment. In this setting, a field-to-future predictor can collapse distinct latent problem states into the same deterministic interface, losing the ambiguity needed for reliable rollout and downstream decisions. We propose posterior-first neural PDE simulation: first infer a posterior over the minimal task-sufficient problem state, then condition prediction on that posterior. The resulting theory connects the object, the learning target, and the failure mode: Bayes downstream values factor through this posterior, refinement labels make it learnable by proper scoring rules, and deterministic collapse incurs an ambiguity barrier whenever the true posterior is non-Dirac. Synthetic exact-ambiguity experiments show that point-versus-posterior gaps track the predicted barrier. On metadata-hidden PDEBench tasks, posterior recovery reduces pooled rollout nRMSE from 0.175 to 0.132, closing 59.4% of the direct-to-oracle gap. These results suggest that single-observation neural PDE simulation should be posterior-first rather than monolithic field-to-future prediction.

analysis.tldr: 提出后验优先的神经PDE模拟方法，通过推断隐状态后验提升单场预测的可靠性与精度。
analysis.research_motivation: 神经PDE模拟器在部署时通常仅能观测到单个场，但现有确定性场到未来预测器会混淆不同隐状态，导致预测不可靠，影响下游决策。
analysis.problem: 解决单观测场下神经PDE模拟中隐状态歧义导致的预测失效问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 确定性预测器会坍缩不同隐状态到相同界面，产生歧义障碍；后验优先方法可避免此问题。
analysis.method: 先推断最小任务充分隐状态的后验分布，再基于该后验进行条件预测；通过细化标签和适当评分规则使后验可学习。
contributions: 提出后验优先的神经PDE模拟框架，将贝叶斯下游值分解为后验函数。
理论证明确定性坍缩在非狄拉克后验下存在歧义障碍。
在PDEBench任务上验证方法有效性，显著降低滚动nRMSE并缩小与oracle的差距。
analysis.experiments: 在合成精确歧义实验和元数据隐藏的PDEBench任务上评估，后验恢复将池化滚动nRMSE从0.175降至0.132，缩小了59.4%的oracle差距。
limitations: 可能依赖任务充分隐状态的定义，复杂场景下难以确定。
后验推断的计算开销可能高于确定性方法。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to physical sciences (physics, chemistry, biology, etc.)
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，理论分析扎实，实验验证有效，但应用领域较专。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出后验优先的神经PDE模拟方法，通过推断隐状态后验提升单场预测的可靠性与精度。

papers.title: CASISR: Circular Arbitrary-Scale Image Super-Resolution
papers.abstract: The generalization performance (GP) of deep learning-based arbitrary-scale image super-resolution (ASISR) methods is subject to limited training datasets and unlimited testing datasets. It is vitally significant to enhance the GP of the pretrained ASISR models by making full use of the testing samples. The ASISR models usually employ an open-loop architecture from low-resolution (LR) images to super-resolution (SR) images. The degradation model from SR samples to LR samples is known bicubic down-sampling for the classical ASISR, is supposed down-sampling with additive random noise for the blind ASISR, and is learnable for the real-world ASISR. Combining the ASISR and degradation models, it is potentially possible to adopt a closed-loop architecture based on the automatic control theory for strengthening the GP of the ASISR methods. Therefore, this paper proposes a closed-loop architecture, circular ASISR (CASISR), to lift the capability of image reconstruction. A mathematical nonlinear loop equation is established to describe the CASISR, the reasonability of the CASISR is proven by conditional probability theory, and the stability of the CASISR is proven by Taylor series approximation. The first-order and second-order absolute difference images are defined to compare the image reconstruction performance of the ASISR and the CASISR methods. Comprehensive simulation experiments show that the proposed CASISR approach outperforms the eight state-of-the-art ASISR approaches in the quality of image reconstruction. Especially, the proposed CASISR is extraordinarily suitable for fractional SR scale factors and is extremely effective for text and stripe images with drastically changed edges.

analysis.tldr: 提出闭环架构CASISR，通过循环反馈提升任意尺度超分模型的泛化性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有任意尺度超分模型因训练数据有限而泛化性能不足，且采用开环架构无法利用测试样本信息。
analysis.problem: 如何通过闭环反馈机制增强预训练任意尺度超分模型在测试时的图像重建能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出闭环架构CASISR，结合超分模型与退化模型形成反馈回路，用非线性环路方程描述，并用条件概率和泰勒级数证明合理性与稳定性。
contributions: 提出闭环任意尺度超分架构CASISR，提升泛化性能
建立数学环路方程并证明其合理性与稳定性
定义一阶和二阶绝对差分图像用于性能比较
analysis.experiments: 在仿真实验中，CASISR在图像重建质量上优于八种最先进方法，尤其适用于分数缩放因子和边缘剧烈变化的文本/条纹图像。
limitations: 可能依赖已知退化模型（如双三次下采样）
闭环架构可能增加计算开销
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强（闭环架构），实验充分，但应用领域较专，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出闭环架构CASISR，通过循环反馈提升任意尺度超分模型的泛化性能。

papers.title: Text-Conditional JEPA for Learning Semantically Rich Visual Representations
papers.abstract: Image-based Joint-Embedding Predictive Architecture (I-JEPA) offers a promising approach to visual self-supervised learning through masked feature prediction. However with the inherent visual uncertainty at masked positions, feature prediction remains challenging and may fail to learn semantic representations. In this work, we propose Text-Conditional JEPA (TC-JEPA) that uses image captions to reduce the prediction uncertainty. Specifically, we modulate the predicted patch features using a fine-grained text conditioner that computes sparse cross-attention over input text tokens. With such conditioning, patch features become predictable as a function of text, thus are more semantically meaningful. We show TC-JEPA improves downstream performance and training stability, with promising scaling properties. TC-JEPA also offers a new vision-language pretraining paradigm based on feature prediction only, outperforming contrastive methods on diverse tasks, especially those requiring fine-grained visual understanding and reasoning.

analysis.tldr: TC-JEPA 通过文本条件降低视觉特征预测的不确定性，学习更语义化的视觉表征。
analysis.research_motivation: 基于图像的联合嵌入预测架构（I-JEPA）通过掩码特征预测进行视觉自监督学习，但掩码位置固有的视觉不确定性使特征预测困难，难以学到语义表征。
analysis.problem: 如何降低视觉特征预测中的不确定性，从而学习更语义化的视觉表征。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，I-JEPA 中掩码位置的特征预测因视觉不确定性而具有挑战性，可能导致无法学习语义表征。
analysis.method: 提出文本条件联合嵌入预测架构（TC-JEPA），使用图像描述（caption）作为条件，通过细粒度文本调节器计算输入文本标记上的稀疏交叉注意力，从而调制预测的块特征，使特征预测成为文本的函数，更具语义意义。
contributions: 提出 TC-JEPA，一种基于文本条件的视觉自监督学习方法，通过降低预测不确定性学习语义表征。
展示 TC-JEPA 在下游性能和训练稳定性上的提升，并具有可扩展性。
提出一种基于特征预测的视觉-语言预训练新范式，在多种任务上优于对比方法，尤其需要细粒度视觉理解和推理的任务。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量图像描述，在描述缺失或噪声时性能可能下降。
稀疏交叉注意力机制可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: unsupervised, self-supervised, semi-supervised, and supervised representation learning
analysis.reason: 方法新颖，结合文本条件解决视觉预测不确定性，实验显示有提升，但摘要未提供具体数据，故推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: TC-JEPA 通过文本条件降低视觉特征预测的不确定性，学习更语义化的视觉表征。

papers.title: S^2tory: Story Spine Distillation for Movie Script Summarization
papers.abstract: Movie scripts pose a fundamental challenge for automatic summarization due to their non-linear, cross-cut narrative structure, which makes surface-level saliency methods ineffective at preserving core story progression. To address this, we introduce S^2tory (Story Spine Distillation), a narratology-grounded framework that leverages character development trajectories to identify plot nuclei, the essential events that drive the narrative forward, while filtering out peripheral satellite events that merely enrich atmosphere or emotion. Our Narrative Expert Agent (NEAgent) performs theory-constrained reasoning, whose distilled knowledge conditions a small model to identify plot nuclei. Another model then uses these plot nuclei to generate the summary. Experiments on the MovieSum dataset demonstrate state-of-the-art semantic fidelity at approximately 3.5x compression, and zero-shot evaluation on BookSum confirms strong out-of-domain generalization. Human evaluation further validates that narratological theory provides an indispensable foundation for modeling complex, non-linear narratives.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于叙事学理论的电影脚本摘要框架S^2tory，通过角色发展轨迹识别情节核心，提升摘要语义保真度。
analysis.research_motivation: 电影脚本的非线性、交叉叙事结构使得传统基于表面显著性的摘要方法难以保留核心故事进展，亟需一种叙事学引导的摘要方法。
analysis.problem: 如何从非线性叙事的电影脚本中自动提取并保留驱动故事发展的核心情节事件。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出电影脚本的非线性、交叉叙事结构导致表面显著性方法失效，而叙事学理论（如角色发展轨迹）能有效区分情节核心与外围事件。
analysis.method: 提出S^2tory框架，包含叙事专家代理（NEAgent）进行理论约束推理，蒸馏知识到小模型以识别情节核心，再用另一模型基于情节核心生成摘要。
contributions: 提出叙事学引导的S^2tory框架，利用角色发展轨迹识别情节核心。
在MovieSum数据集上实现约3.5倍压缩下的最先进语义保真度，并在BookSum上展示强零样本泛化能力。
analysis.experiments: 在MovieSum数据集上评估，实现约3.5倍压缩下的最先进语义保真度；零样本评估在BookSum上验证了强跨域泛化；人工评估确认叙事学理论对建模复杂非线性叙事不可或缺。
limitations: 依赖叙事学理论，可能不适用于所有电影类型。
需要进一步验证在更长或更复杂脚本上的效果。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，结合叙事学理论，实验验证充分，但技术细节摘要未详述。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于叙事学理论的电影脚本摘要框架S^2tory，通过角色发展轨迹识别情节核心，提升摘要语义保真度。

papers.title: Enhancing Agent Safety Judgment: Controlled Benchmark Rewriting and Analogical Reasoning for Deceptive Out-of-Distribution Scenarios
papers.abstract: Tool-using agent systems powered by large language models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed across web, app, operating-system, and transactional environments. Yet existing safety benchmarks still emphasize explicit risks, potentially overstating a model's ability to judge deceptive or ambiguous trajectories. To address this gap, we introduce ROME (Red-team Orchestrated Multi-agent Evolution), a controlled benchmark-construction pipeline that rewrites known unsafe trajectories into more deceptive evaluation instances while preserving their underlying risk labels. Starting from 100 unsafe source trajectories, ROME produces 300 challenge instances spanning contextual ambiguity, implicit risks, and shortcut decision-making. Experiments show that these challenge sets substantially degrade safety-judgment performance, with hidden-risk cases remaining particularly non-trivial even for recent frontier models. We further study ARISE (Analogical Reasoning for Inference-time Safety Enhancement), a retrieval-guided inference-time enhancement that retrieves ReAct-style analogical safety trajectories from an external analogical base and injects them as structured reasoning exemplars. ARISE improves judgment quality without retraining, but is best viewed as a task-specific robustness enhancement rather than a standalone safety guarantee. Together, ROME and ARISE provide practical tools for stress-testing and improving agent safety judgment under deceptive distribution shifts.

analysis.tldr: 提出ROME基准构建管道和ARISE推理增强方法，用于测试和提升LLM Agent在欺骗性OOD场景下的安全判断能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有安全基准主要关注显式风险，可能高估模型对欺骗性或模糊轨迹的判断能力，亟需更贴近实际部署的评估方法。
analysis.problem: 如何构建包含欺骗性、模糊风险的评估基准，并提升LLM Agent在分布外场景下的安全判断能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 实验发现，ROME生成的挑战实例显著降低了模型的安全判断性能，尤其是隐藏风险案例对前沿模型仍具挑战性。
analysis.method: ROME：受红队启发的多智能体进化管道，将已知不安全轨迹重写为更欺骗性的评估实例；ARISE：检索引导的推理时增强，从外部类比库中检索类比安全轨迹作为结构化推理示例。
contributions: 提出ROME管道，系统性地生成欺骗性安全评估实例，填补现有基准的空白。
提出ARISE方法，无需重训练即可提升安全判断质量，作为任务特定的鲁棒性增强。
analysis.experiments: 在100个不安全源轨迹上生成300个挑战实例，测试多个前沿模型，显示隐藏风险案例仍具挑战性。摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: ARISE被视为任务特定的鲁棒性增强，而非独立的安全保证。
ROME生成的实例可能无法覆盖所有欺骗性场景。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 针对LLM Agent安全判断的欺骗性OOD场景，方法新颖且实用，实验显示有效性，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出ROME基准构建管道和ARISE推理增强方法，用于测试和提升LLM Agent在欺骗性OOD场景下的安全判断能力。

papers.title: OptiLookUp: An Optical ROM-Based Loop up Table Engine for Photonic Accelerators
papers.abstract: Read-only memory (ROM) provides deterministic access to predefined data mappings. Extending ROM concepts to the optical domain enables high-bandwidth, low-latency, and parallel memory access, but realizing compact and reconfigurable optical ROM remains challenging due to loss, wavelength control, and integration constraints. This work presents a high-speed, reconfigurable photonic ROM architecture implemented using integrated microring resonators (MRRs). The ROM encodes predefined input-output mappings directly in the spectral response of the photonic devices, enabling deterministic lookup-based operation without dynamic computation during readout. To improve scalability and reduce cumulative insertion loss, the architecture employs compact banked sub-arrays that are selectively addressed through an optical decoding mechanism. Reconfigurability is achieved using transistor-based optical selectors, allowing different ROM banks to be activated without physical light rerouting or interferometric structures. The proposed photonic ROM is designed and evaluated using device-level simulations based on the GlobalFoundries 45SPCLO silicon photonics platform. Simulation results demonstrate reliable operation at data rates up to 12.5 GHz, with stable light-to-current transfer characteristics obtained through integrated photodiode readout. The optical ROM can be used to implement nonlinear activation functions utilised in photonic accelerator architectures, including sigmoid, tanh, ReLU, and exponential mappings.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种基于微环谐振器的可重构光学ROM架构，用于光子加速器中的查找表操作。
analysis.research_motivation: 光学计算需要高带宽、低延迟的存储器，但传统光学ROM在紧凑性、可重构性和集成度方面存在挑战。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种紧凑、可重构且低损耗的光学ROM，以实现光子加速器中的确定性查找表操作。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 采用集成微环谐振器（MRR）编码输入-输出映射，通过紧凑的banked子阵列和光学解码机制降低损耗，利用晶体管光学选择器实现可重构性。
contributions: 提出一种基于MRR的高速可重构光学ROM架构。
通过banked子阵列和光学解码提高可扩展性并降低累积插入损耗。
在GlobalFoundries 45SPCLO平台上仿真验证了12.5 GHz数据率下的稳定操作。
analysis.experiments: 基于GlobalFoundries 45SPCLO硅光子平台的器件级仿真，数据率高达12.5 GHz，实现了稳定的光电流传输特性。
limitations: 仿真结果可能未考虑实际制造偏差和温度效应。
可重构性依赖于晶体管选择器，可能引入额外功耗。
analysis.primary_area_en: infrastructure, software libraries, hardware, systems, etc.
analysis.reason: 硬件创新明确，仿真结果支持高速操作，但缺乏实际芯片验证，与主流ML方向关联较弱。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种基于微环谐振器的可重构光学ROM架构，用于光子加速器中的查找表操作。
